Conclusion: DL models can achieve high prostate cancer detection and segmentation accuracy on bp-MRI based on annotations from histologic images. To further improve the performance, more data with annotations of both MRI and whole amount prostatectomy specimens are required.
abstract_zh: 目的：我们的目标是开发深度机器学习 (DL) 模型，通过使用基于全量前列腺切除标本的描绘来改进 bp-MRI 上前列腺内病变 (IL) 的检测和分割。我们还旨在研究迁移学习和自我训练是否会改善少量标记数据的结果。方法：158例患者基于bp-MRI在MRI上勾画出可疑病灶，64例患者基于全前列腺切除标本切片在MRI上勾画出IL，40例患者未标记。提出了一种非局部Mask R-CNN来提高分割精度。通过微调使用基于 MRI 的轮廓和基于前列腺切除术的轮廓训练的模型来研究迁移学习。在自我训练中研究了两种标签选择策略。通过3D检测率、骰子相似系数（DSC）、95百分位Hausdrauff（95 HD，mm）和真阳性率（TPR）来评估模型的性能。结果：通过基于前列腺切除术的勾画，具有微调和自我训练的非局部 Mask R-CNN 显着改善了所有评估指标。对于检出率和DSC最高的模型，所有格里森分级组（GGG）中80.5%（33/41）的病灶被检出，DSC为0.548[0.165]，95 HD为5.72[3.17]，TPR为0.613[0.193]。其中，94.7%（18/19）的GGG>2病灶被检出，DSC为0.604[0.135]，95 HD为6.26[3.44]，TPR为0.580[0.190]。结论：DL 模型可以根据组织学图像的注释在 bp-MRI 上实现较高的前列腺癌检测和分割精度。为了进一步提高性能，需要更多带有 MRI 和全量前列腺切除标本注释的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于非局部Mask R-CNN模型，结合组织病理学标注数据，提升前列腺癌在双参数MRI中的检测与分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI分割模型存在精度不足问题，且标注数据有限。通过利用前列腺切除标本的组织病理学标注数据，可提升模型性能并减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 采用158例MRI标注数据、64例前列腺切除标本标注数据及40例未标注数据，构建非局部Mask R-CNN模型。通过迁移学习（以MRI标注预训练模型为基础，微调前列腺切除标本数据）和自训练策略（两种标注选择方法）优化模型。
AI.result: 使用前列腺切除标本数据的模型在微调与自训练后显著提升性能，所有Gleason分级组检测率达80.5%（DSC=0.548，95 HD=5.72mm），其中高级别病变（GGG>2）检测率达94.7%（DSC=0.604）。
AI.conclusion: 基于组织病理学标注的深度学习模型可实现高精度前列腺癌检测与分割，但需更多结合MRI与前列腺切除标本标注的数据以进一步优化模型。

search_text: Accurate Prostate Cancer Detection and Segmentation on Biparametric MRI using Non-local Mask R-CNN with Histopathological Ground Truth 使用具有组织病理学基本事实的非局部掩模 R-CNN 在双参数 MRI 上进行准确的前列腺癌检测和分割 Purpose: We aimed to develop deep machine learning (DL) models to improve the detection and segmentation of intraprostatic lesions (IL) on bp-MRI by using whole amount prostatectomy specimen-based delineations. We also aimed to investigate whether transfer learning and self-training would improve results with small amount labelled data. Methods: 158 patients had suspicious lesions delineated on MRI based on bp-MRI, 64 patients had ILs delineated on MRI based on whole mount prostatectomy specimen sections, 40 patients were unlabelled. A non-local Mask R-CNN was proposed to improve the segmentation accuracy. Transfer learning was investigated by fine-tuning a model trained using MRI-based delineations with prostatectomy-based delineations. Two label selection strategies were investigated in self-training. The performance of models was evaluated by 3D detection rate, dice similarity coefficient (DSC), 95 percentile Hausdrauff (95 HD, mm) and true positive ratio (TPR). Results: With prostatectomy-based delineations, the non-local Mask R-CNN with fine-tuning and self-training significantly improved all evaluation metrics. For the model with the highest detection rate and DSC, 80.5% (33/41) of lesions in all Gleason Grade Groups (GGG) were detected with DSC of 0.548[0.165], 95 HD of 5.72[3.17] and TPR of 0.613[0.193]. Among them, 94.7% (18/19) of lesions with GGG > 2 were detected with DSC of 0.604[0.135], 95 HD of 6.26[3.44] and TPR of 0.580[0.190]. Conclusion: DL models can achieve high prostate cancer detection and segmentation accuracy on bp-MRI based on annotations from histologic images. To further improve the performance, more data with annotations of both MRI and whole amount prostatectomy specimens are required. 目的：我们的目标是开发深度机器学习 (DL) 模型，通过使用基于全量前列腺切除标本的描绘来改进 bp-MRI 上前列腺内病变 (IL) 的检测和分割。我们还旨在研究迁移学习和自我训练是否会改善少量标记数据的结果。方法：158例患者基于bp-MRI在MRI上勾画出可疑病灶，64例患者基于全前列腺切除标本切片在MRI上勾画出IL，40例患者未标记。提出了一种非局部Mask R-CNN来提高分割精度。通过微调使用基于 MRI 的轮廓和基于前列腺切除术的轮廓训练的模型来研究迁移学习。在自我训练中研究了两种标签选择策略。通过3D检测率、骰子相似系数（DSC）、95百分位Hausdrauff（95 HD，mm）和真阳性率（TPR）来评估模型的性能。结果：通过基于前列腺切除术的勾画，具有微调和自我训练的非局部 Mask R-CNN 显着改善了所有评估指标。对于检出率和DSC最高的模型，所有格里森分级组（GGG）中80.5%（33/41）的病灶被检出，DSC为0.548[0.165]，95 HD为5.72[3.17]，TPR为0.613[0.193]。其中，94.7%（18/19）的GGG>2病灶被检出，DSC为0.604[0.135]，95 HD为6.26[3.44]，TPR为0.580[0.190]。结论：DL 模型可以根据组织学图像的注释在 bp-MRI 上实现较高的前列腺癌检测和分割精度。为了进一步提高性能，需要更多带有 MRI 和全量前列腺切除标本注释的数据。 本文提出基于非局部Mask R-CNN模型，结合组织病理学标注数据，提升前列腺癌在双参数MRI中的检测与分割精度。 Zhenzhen Dai,Ivan Jambor,Pekka Taimen,Milan Pantelic,Mohamed Elshaikh,Craig Rogers,Otto Ettala,Peter Boström,Hannu Aronen,Harri Merisaari,Ning Wen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Construction Payment Automation Using Blockchain-Enabled Smart Contracts and Reality Capture Technologies
title_zh: 使用区块链智能合约和现实捕捉技术的建筑支付自动化
abstract: This paper presents a smart contract-based solution for autonomous administration of construction progress payments. It bridges the gap between payments (cash flow) and the progress assessments at job sites (product flow) enabled by reality capture technologies and building information modeling (BIM). The approach eliminates the reliance on the centralized and heavily intermediated mechanisms of existing payment applications. The construction progress is stored in a distributed manner using content addressable file sharing; it is broadcasted to a smart contract which automates the on-chain payment settlements and the transfer of lien rights. The method was successfully used for processing payments to 7 subcontractors in two commercial construction projects where progress monitoring was performed using a camera-equipped unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and an unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) equipped with a laser scanner. The results show promise for the method's potential for increasing the frequency, granularity, and transparency of payments. The paper is concluded with a discussion of implications for project management, introducing a new model of project as a singleton state machine.
summary: This paper presents a smart contract-based solution for autonomous administration of construction progress payments. It bridges the gap between payments (cash flow) and the progress assessments at job sites (product flow) enabled by reality capture technologies and building information modeling (BIM). The approach eliminates the reliance on the centralized and heavily intermediated mechanisms of existing payment applications. The construction progress is stored in a distributed manner using content addressable file sharing; it is broadcasted to a smart contract which automates the on-chain payment settlements and the transfer of lien rights. The method was successfully used for processing payments to 7 subcontractors in two commercial construction projects where progress monitoring was performed using a camera-equipped unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and an unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) equipped with a laser scanner. The results show promise for the method's potential for increasing the frequency, granularity, and transparency of payments. The paper is concluded with a discussion of implications for project management, introducing a new model of project as a singleton state machine.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于智能合约的施工进度付款自主管理解决方案。它通过现实捕捉技术和建筑信息模型 (BIM) 弥合了付款（现金流）和工作现场进度评估（产品流）之间的差距。该方法消除了对现有支付应用程序的集中式和高度中介机制的依赖。采用内容寻址文件共享的方式分布式存储施工进度；它被广播到一个智能合约，该合约自动执行链上支付结算和留置权的转让。该方法已成功用于处理两个商业建筑项目中 7 个分包商的付款，其中使用配备摄像头的无人机 (UAV) 和配备激光扫描仪的无人驾驶地面车辆 (UGV) 进行进度监控。结果表明该方法有望提高支付的频率、粒度和透明度。本文最后讨论了对项目管理的影响，介绍了一种新的项目模型作为单例状态机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于区块链智能合约和实景捕捉技术的建筑进度付款自动化解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统建筑付款依赖中心化机制且透明度不足，需通过技术手段提升支付频率、粒度及透明度。
AI.method: 利用区块链存储分布式施工进度数据，结合无人机和激光扫描机器人采集实景信息，通过智能合约自动结算付款并转移留置权。
AI.result: 在两个商业项目中成功处理7家分包商付款，验证了方法在提升支付效率和透明度方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为项目管理提供新模型，将项目视为单一状态机，推动建筑行业支付流程数字化转型。

title: Speech-Based Emotion Recognition using Neural Networks and Information Visualization
title_zh: 使用神经网络和信息可视化的基于语音的情绪识别
abstract: Emotions recognition is commonly employed for health assessment. However, the typical metric for evaluation in therapy is based on patient-doctor appraisal. This process can fall into the issue of subjectivity, while also requiring healthcare professionals to deal with copious amounts of information. Thus, machine learning algorithms can be a useful tool for the classification of emotions. While several models have been developed in this domain, there is a lack of userfriendly representations of the emotion classification systems for therapy. We propose a tool which enables users to take speech samples and identify a range of emotions (happy, sad, angry, surprised, neutral, clam, disgust, and fear) from audio elements through a machine learning model. The dashboard is designed based on local therapists' needs for intuitive representations of speech data in order to gain insights and informative analyses of their sessions with their patients.
summary: Emotions recognition is commonly employed for health assessment. However, the typical metric for evaluation in therapy is based on patient-doctor appraisal. This process can fall into the issue of subjectivity, while also requiring healthcare professionals to deal with copious amounts of information. Thus, machine learning algorithms can be a useful tool for the classification of emotions. While several models have been developed in this domain, there is a lack of userfriendly representations of the emotion classification systems for therapy. We propose a tool which enables users to take speech samples and identify a range of emotions (happy, sad, angry, surprised, neutral, clam, disgust, and fear) from audio elements through a machine learning model. The dashboard is designed based on local therapists' needs for intuitive representations of speech data in order to gain insights and informative analyses of their sessions with their patients.
abstract_zh: 情绪识别通常用于健康评估。然而，治疗评估的典型指标是基于医患评估。这个过程可能会陷入主观性问题，同时还需要医疗保健专业人员处理大量信息。因此，机器学习算法可以成为情绪分类的有用工具。虽然该领域已经开发了几种模型，但缺乏用于治疗的情绪分类系统的用户友好表示。我们提出了一种工具，使用户能够采集语音样本，并通过机器学习模型从音频元素中识别一系列情绪（快乐、悲伤、愤怒、惊讶、中性、冷静、厌恶和恐惧）。该仪表板是根据当地治疗师对语音数据直观表示的需求而设计的，以便获得对他们与患者的治疗的见解和信息分析。

AI.tldr: 开发一个基于机器学习的语音情绪识别工具，并结合信息可视化界面辅助治疗师分析患者情绪。
AI.motivation: 传统情绪评估依赖主观判断且信息处理繁琐，需借助机器学习提升客观性与效率，同时缺乏用户友好的可视化工具。
AI.method: 采用神经网络构建语音情绪分类模型，结合本地治疗师需求设计直观数据可视化仪表盘。
AI.result: 实现八种情绪（快乐、悲伤、愤怒等）的语音识别，并通过可视化界面提升治疗师对患者情绪数据的分析能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工具可有效辅助情绪评估，优化治疗流程，未来可进一步优化模型精度与扩展情绪类别。

search_text: Speech-Based Emotion Recognition using Neural Networks and Information Visualization 使用神经网络和信息可视化的基于语音的情绪识别 Emotions recognition is commonly employed for health assessment. However, the typical metric for evaluation in therapy is based on patient-doctor appraisal. This process can fall into the issue of subjectivity, while also requiring healthcare professionals to deal with copious amounts of information. Thus, machine learning algorithms can be a useful tool for the classification of emotions. While several models have been developed in this domain, there is a lack of userfriendly representations of the emotion classification systems for therapy. We propose a tool which enables users to take speech samples and identify a range of emotions (happy, sad, angry, surprised, neutral, clam, disgust, and fear) from audio elements through a machine learning model. The dashboard is designed based on local therapists' needs for intuitive representations of speech data in order to gain insights and informative analyses of their sessions with their patients. 情绪识别通常用于健康评估。然而，治疗评估的典型指标是基于医患评估。这个过程可能会陷入主观性问题，同时还需要医疗保健专业人员处理大量信息。因此，机器学习算法可以成为情绪分类的有用工具。虽然该领域已经开发了几种模型，但缺乏用于治疗的情绪分类系统的用户友好表示。我们提出了一种工具，使用户能够采集语音样本，并通过机器学习模型从音频元素中识别一系列情绪（快乐、悲伤、愤怒、惊讶、中性、冷静、厌恶和恐惧）。该仪表板是根据当地治疗师对语音数据直观表示的需求而设计的，以便获得对他们与患者的治疗的见解和信息分析。 开发一个基于机器学习的语音情绪识别工具，并结合信息可视化界面辅助治疗师分析患者情绪。 Jumana Almahmoud,Kruthika Kikkeri cs.HC,cs.LG

title: Away from Trolley Problems and Toward Risk Management
title_zh: 远离电车难题，走向风险管理
abstract: As automated vehicles receive more attention from the media, there has been an equivalent increase in the coverage of the ethical choices a vehicle may be forced to make in certain crash situations with no clear safe outcome. Much of this coverage has focused on a philosophical thought experiment known as the "trolley problem," and substituting an automated vehicle for the trolley and the car's software for the bystander. While this is a stark and straightforward example of ethical decision making for an automated vehicle, it risks marginalizing the entire field if it is to become the only ethical problem in the public's mind. In this chapter, I discuss the shortcomings of the trolley problem, and introduce more nuanced examples that involve crash risk and uncertainty. Risk management is introduced as an alternative approach, and its ethical dimensions are discussed.
summary: As automated vehicles receive more attention from the media, there has been an equivalent increase in the coverage of the ethical choices a vehicle may be forced to make in certain crash situations with no clear safe outcome. Much of this coverage has focused on a philosophical thought experiment known as the "trolley problem," and substituting an automated vehicle for the trolley and the car's software for the bystander. While this is a stark and straightforward example of ethical decision making for an automated vehicle, it risks marginalizing the entire field if it is to become the only ethical problem in the public's mind. In this chapter, I discuss the shortcomings of the trolley problem, and introduce more nuanced examples that involve crash risk and uncertainty. Risk management is introduced as an alternative approach, and its ethical dimensions are discussed.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶汽车受到媒体越来越多的关注，对车辆在某些没有明确安全结果的碰撞情况下可能被迫做出的道德选择的报道也相应增加。大部分报道都集中在一个被称为“电车问题”的哲学思想实验上，即用自动驾驶汽车代替电车，用汽车软件代替旁观者。虽然这是自动驾驶汽车道德决策的一个鲜明而直接的例子，但如果它成为公众心目中唯一的道德问题，它就有可能使整个领域边缘化。在本章中，我讨论了电车问题的缺点，并介绍了涉及碰撞风险和不确定性的更细致的例子。风险管理作为一种替代方法被引入，并讨论了其道德维度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨自动驾驶车辆伦理决策中过度依赖'电车难题'的局限性，并引入更复杂的风险管理体系作为替代方案。
AI.motivation: 媒体过度聚焦'电车难题'可能使公众对自动驾驶伦理问题产生片面认知，忽视实际道路中更复杂的风险管理需求。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析'电车难题'的不足，提出包含不确定性和风险因素的现实场景案例，并构建风险管理体系的伦理框架。
AI.result: 揭示了传统伦理模型的缺陷，论证了风险导向方法在处理自动驾驶实际决策中的适用性与优势。
AI.conclusion: 自动驾驶伦理研究应从单一道德困境转向动态风险评估，以更贴近现实的技术应用需求。

title: On Linearizability and the Termination of Randomized Algorithms
title_zh: 关于随机算法的线性化和终止
abstract: We study the question of whether the "termination with probability 1" property of a randomized algorithm is preserved when one replaces the atomic registers that the algorithm uses with linearizable (implementations of) registers. We show that in general this is not so: roughly speaking, every randomized algorithm A has a corresponding algorithm A' that solves the same problem if the registers that it uses are atomic or strongly-linearizable, but does not terminate if these registers are replaced with "merely" linearizable ones. Together with a previous result shown in [15], this implies that one cannot use the well-known ABD implementation of registers in message-passing systems to automatically transform any randomized algorithm that works in shared-memory systems into a randomized algorithm that works in message-passing systems: with a strong adversary the resulting algorithm may not terminate.
summary: We study the question of whether the "termination with probability 1" property of a randomized algorithm is preserved when one replaces the atomic registers that the algorithm uses with linearizable (implementations of) registers. We show that in general this is not so: roughly speaking, every randomized algorithm A has a corresponding algorithm A' that solves the same problem if the registers that it uses are atomic or strongly-linearizable, but does not terminate if these registers are replaced with "merely" linearizable ones. Together with a previous result shown in [15], this implies that one cannot use the well-known ABD implementation of registers in message-passing systems to automatically transform any randomized algorithm that works in shared-memory systems into a randomized algorithm that works in message-passing systems: with a strong adversary the resulting algorithm may not terminate.
abstract_zh: 我们研究的问题是，当将算法使用的原子寄存器替换为可线性化（实现）寄存器时，随机算法的“以概率 1 终止”属性是否得以保留。我们证明，一般情况并非如此：粗略地说，每个随机算法 A 都有一个相应的算法 A'，如果它使用的寄存器是原子的或强线性化的，则该算法解决相同的问题，但如果这些寄存器被“仅”线性化的寄存器替换，则不会终止。与[15]中显示的先前结果一起，这意味着不能在消息传递系统中使用众所周知的寄存器 ABD 实现来自动将在共享内存系统中工作的任何随机算法转换为在消息传递系统中工作的随机算法：对于强大的对手，生成的算法可能不会终止。

AI.tldr: 研究随机化算法在使用线性化寄存器实现时是否保持‘几乎必然终止’属性。
AI.motivation: 探讨在分布式系统中，使用不同寄存器实现对随机化算法终止性的影响，确保算法正确性。
AI.method: 通过构造特定算法A'，展示在不同寄存器实现下算法终止性差异，并结合先前结果分析ABD实现的局限性。
AI.result: 存在算法A'在原子或强线性化寄存器下终止，但在普通线性化下不终止，且ABD实现无法自动转换算法到消息传递系统。
AI.conclusion: 线性化寄存器无法保证随机算法终止，需更强条件，且ABD实现不能直接转换算法。

authors_text: Dario Augusto Borges Oliveira,Daniil Semin,Semen Zaytsev
title: Ground Roll Suppression using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络抑制地滚波
abstract: Seismic data processing plays a major role in seismic exploration as it conditions much of the seismic interpretation performance. In this context, generating reliable post-stack seismic data depends also on disposing of an efficient pre-stack noise attenuation tool. Here we tackle ground roll noise, one of the most challenging and common noises observed in pre-stack seismic data. Since ground roll is characterized by relative low frequencies and high amplitudes, most commonly used approaches for its suppression are based on frequency-amplitude filters for ground roll characteristic bands. However, when signal and noise share the same frequency ranges, these methods usually deliver also signal suppression or residual noise. In this paper we take advantage of the highly non-linear features of convolutional neural networks, and propose to use different architectures to detect ground roll in shot gathers and ultimately to suppress them using conditional generative adversarial networks. Additionally, we propose metrics to evaluate ground roll suppression, and report strong results compared to expert filtering. Finally, we discuss generalization of trained models for similar and different geologies to better understand the feasibility of our proposal in real applications.
summary: Seismic data processing plays a major role in seismic exploration as it conditions much of the seismic interpretation performance. In this context, generating reliable post-stack seismic data depends also on disposing of an efficient pre-stack noise attenuation tool. Here we tackle ground roll noise, one of the most challenging and common noises observed in pre-stack seismic data. Since ground roll is characterized by relative low frequencies and high amplitudes, most commonly used approaches for its suppression are based on frequency-amplitude filters for ground roll characteristic bands. However, when signal and noise share the same frequency ranges, these methods usually deliver also signal suppression or residual noise. In this paper we take advantage of the highly non-linear features of convolutional neural networks, and propose to use different architectures to detect ground roll in shot gathers and ultimately to suppress them using conditional generative adversarial networks. Additionally, we propose metrics to evaluate ground roll suppression, and report strong results compared to expert filtering. Finally, we discuss generalization of trained models for similar and different geologies to better understand the feasibility of our proposal in real applications.
abstract_zh: 地震数据处理在地震勘探中发挥着重要作用，因为它决定了地震解释性能。在这种情况下，生成可靠的叠后地震数据还取决于有效的叠前噪声衰减工具的部署。在这里，我们解决地滚噪声，这是叠前地震数据中观察到的最具挑战性和最常见的噪声之一。由于地滚波的特点是相对低频和高振幅，最常用的抑制方法是基于地滚波特征频带的频幅滤波器。然而，当信号和噪声共享相同的频率范围时，这些方法通常还提供信号抑制或残余噪声。在本文中，我们利用卷积神经网络的高度非线性特征，并提出使用不同的架构来检测炮集中的地滚波，并最终使用条件生成对抗网络来抑制它们。此外，我们提出了评估地滚波抑制的指标，并报告了与专家过滤相比的强劲结果。最后，我们讨论了相似和不同地质的训练模型的泛化，以更好地理解我们的建议在实际应用中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经网络和条件生成对抗网络抑制地震数据中的地面滚动噪声。
AI.motivation: 传统频率-幅度滤波方法在信号与噪声频率重叠时易导致信号丢失或残留噪声，需更高效的非线性处理手段。
AI.method: 设计多种CNN架构检测地面滚动噪声，结合条件生成对抗网络实现抑制，并提出专用评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明方法效果优于专家过滤，且模型在相似及不同地质条件下均具良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CNN与cGAN结合的深度学习方法可有效抑制地面滚动噪声，为实际地震数据处理提供可行方案。

search_text: Ground Roll Suppression using Convolutional Neural Networks 使用卷积神经网络抑制地滚波 Seismic data processing plays a major role in seismic exploration as it conditions much of the seismic interpretation performance. In this context, generating reliable post-stack seismic data depends also on disposing of an efficient pre-stack noise attenuation tool. Here we tackle ground roll noise, one of the most challenging and common noises observed in pre-stack seismic data. Since ground roll is characterized by relative low frequencies and high amplitudes, most commonly used approaches for its suppression are based on frequency-amplitude filters for ground roll characteristic bands. However, when signal and noise share the same frequency ranges, these methods usually deliver also signal suppression or residual noise. In this paper we take advantage of the highly non-linear features of convolutional neural networks, and propose to use different architectures to detect ground roll in shot gathers and ultimately to suppress them using conditional generative adversarial networks. Additionally, we propose metrics to evaluate ground roll suppression, and report strong results compared to expert filtering. Finally, we discuss generalization of trained models for similar and different geologies to better understand the feasibility of our proposal in real applications. 地震数据处理在地震勘探中发挥着重要作用，因为它决定了地震解释性能。在这种情况下，生成可靠的叠后地震数据还取决于有效的叠前噪声衰减工具的部署。在这里，我们解决地滚噪声，这是叠前地震数据中观察到的最具挑战性和最常见的噪声之一。由于地滚波的特点是相对低频和高振幅，最常用的抑制方法是基于地滚波特征频带的频幅滤波器。然而，当信号和噪声共享相同的频率范围时，这些方法通常还提供信号抑制或残余噪声。在本文中，我们利用卷积神经网络的高度非线性特征，并提出使用不同的架构来检测炮集中的地滚波，并最终使用条件生成对抗网络来抑制它们。此外，我们提出了评估地滚波抑制的指标，并报告了与专家过滤相比的强劲结果。最后，我们讨论了相似和不同地质的训练模型的泛化，以更好地理解我们的建议在实际应用中的可行性。 本文提出使用卷积神经网络和条件生成对抗网络抑制地震数据中的地面滚动噪声。 Dario Augusto Borges Oliveira,Daniil Semin,Semen Zaytsev eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wilka Carvalho,Anthony Liang,Kimin Lee,Sungryull Sohn,Honglak Lee,Richard L. Lewis,Satinder Singh
title: Reinforcement Learning for Sparse-Reward Object-Interaction Tasks in a First-person Simulated 3D Environment
title_zh: 第一人称模拟 3D 环境中稀疏奖励对象交互任务的强化学习
abstract: First-person object-interaction tasks in high-fidelity, 3D, simulated environments such as the AI2Thor virtual home-environment pose significant sample-efficiency challenges for reinforcement learning (RL) agents learning from sparse task rewards. To alleviate these challenges, prior work has provided extensive supervision via a combination of reward-shaping, ground-truth object-information, and expert demonstrations. In this work, we show that one can learn object-interaction tasks from scratch without supervision by learning an attentive object-model as an auxiliary task during task learning with an object-centric relational RL agent. Our key insight is that learning an object-model that incorporates object-attention into forward prediction provides a dense learning signal for unsupervised representation learning of both objects and their relationships. This, in turn, enables faster policy learning for an object-centric relational RL agent. We demonstrate our agent by introducing a set of challenging object-interaction tasks in the AI2Thor environment where learning with our attentive object-model is key to strong performance. Specifically, we compare our agent and relational RL agents with alternative auxiliary tasks to a relational RL agent equipped with ground-truth object-information, and show that learning with our object-model best closes the performance gap in terms of both learning speed and maximum success rate. Additionally, we find that incorporating object-attention into an object-model's forward predictions is key to learning representations which capture object-category and object-state.
summary: First-person object-interaction tasks in high-fidelity, 3D, simulated environments such as the AI2Thor virtual home-environment pose significant sample-efficiency challenges for reinforcement learning (RL) agents learning from sparse task rewards. To alleviate these challenges, prior work has provided extensive supervision via a combination of reward-shaping, ground-truth object-information, and expert demonstrations. In this work, we show that one can learn object-interaction tasks from scratch without supervision by learning an attentive object-model as an auxiliary task during task learning with an object-centric relational RL agent. Our key insight is that learning an object-model that incorporates object-attention into forward prediction provides a dense learning signal for unsupervised representation learning of both objects and their relationships. This, in turn, enables faster policy learning for an object-centric relational RL agent. We demonstrate our agent by introducing a set of challenging object-interaction tasks in the AI2Thor environment where learning with our attentive object-model is key to strong performance. Specifically, we compare our agent and relational RL agents with alternative auxiliary tasks to a relational RL agent equipped with ground-truth object-information, and show that learning with our object-model best closes the performance gap in terms of both learning speed and maximum success rate. Additionally, we find that incorporating object-attention into an object-model's forward predictions is key to learning representations which capture object-category and object-state.
abstract_zh: 高保真 3D 模拟环境（例如 AI2Thor 虚拟家庭环境）中的第一人称对象交互任务对从稀疏任务奖励中学习的强化学习 (RL) 代理提出了重大的样本效率挑战。为了缓解这些挑战，之前的工作通过奖励塑造、真实对象信息和专家演示的结合提供了广泛的监督。在这项工作中，我们表明，在使用以对象为中心的关系强化学习代理进行任务学习期间，通过学习注意力对象模型作为辅助任务，可以在没有监督的情况下从头开始学习对象交互任务。我们的主要见解是，学习将对象注意力纳入前向预测的对象模型为对象及其关系的无监督表示学习提供了密集的学习信号。反过来，这使得以对象为中心的关系强化学习代理能够更快地进行策略学习。我们通过在 AI2Thor 环境中引入一组具有挑战性的对象交互任务来展示我们的代理，其中使用我们的专注对象模型进行学习是强大性能的关键。具体来说，我们将我们的代理和具有替代辅助任务的关系强化学习代理与配备真实对象信息的关系强化学习代理进行比较，并表明使用我们的对象模型进行学习可以最好地缩小学习速度和最大成功率方面的性能差距。此外，我们发现将对象注意力合并到对象模型的前向预测中是学习捕获对象类别和对象状态的表示的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督的强化学习方法，通过学习注意力对象模型来解决第一人称3D环境中稀疏奖励对象交互任务的样本效率问题。
AI.motivation: 在高保真3D环境中，传统方法依赖奖励塑造、真实对象信息或专家演示来提高样本效率，但这些方法存在监督依赖性。本文旨在探索无监督学习对象模型以提供密集学习信号，从而提升策略学习效率。
AI.method: 设计了一个以对象为中心的关系强化学习代理，通过学习注意力对象模型作为辅助任务。该模型利用对象注意力进行前向预测，生成对象及其关系的密集表示，无需外部监督。
AI.result: 在AI2Thor环境中，该方法在学习速度和最大成功率上优于其他关系强化学习代理及使用真实对象信息的基线方法，显著缩小了性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 将对象注意力融入前向预测是学习有效对象类别和状态表示的关键，为稀疏奖励场景下的无监督强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Philip J. Ball,Yingzhen Li,Angus Lamb,Cheng Zhang
title: A Study on Efficiency in Continual Learning Inspired by Human Learning
title_zh: 受人类学习启发的持续学习效率研究
abstract: Humans are efficient continual learning systems; we continually learn new skills from birth with finite cells and resources. Our learning is highly optimized both in terms of capacity and time while not suffering from catastrophic forgetting. In this work we study the efficiency of continual learning systems, taking inspiration from human learning. In particular, inspired by the mechanisms of sleep, we evaluate popular pruning-based continual learning algorithms, using PackNet as a case study. First, we identify that weight freezing, which is used in continual learning without biological justification, can result in over $2\times$ as many weights being used for a given level of performance. Secondly, we note the similarity in human day and night time behaviors to the training and pruning phases respectively of PackNet. We study a setting where the pruning phase is given a time budget, and identify connections between iterative pruning and multiple sleep cycles in humans. We show there exists an optimal choice of iteration v.s. epochs given different tasks.
summary: Humans are efficient continual learning systems; we continually learn new skills from birth with finite cells and resources. Our learning is highly optimized both in terms of capacity and time while not suffering from catastrophic forgetting. In this work we study the efficiency of continual learning systems, taking inspiration from human learning. In particular, inspired by the mechanisms of sleep, we evaluate popular pruning-based continual learning algorithms, using PackNet as a case study. First, we identify that weight freezing, which is used in continual learning without biological justification, can result in over $2\times$ as many weights being used for a given level of performance. Secondly, we note the similarity in human day and night time behaviors to the training and pruning phases respectively of PackNet. We study a setting where the pruning phase is given a time budget, and identify connections between iterative pruning and multiple sleep cycles in humans. We show there exists an optimal choice of iteration v.s. epochs given different tasks.
abstract_zh: 人类是高效的持续学习系统；我们从出生起就利用有限的细胞和资源不断学习新技能。我们的学习在容量和时间方面都得到了高度优化，同时不会遭受灾难性遗忘。在这项工作中，我们从人类学习中汲取灵感，研究持续学习系统的效率。特别是，受到睡眠机制的启发，我们使用 PackNet 作为案例研究来评估流行的基于剪枝的持续学习算法。首先，我们发现，在没有生物学依据的情况下用于持续学习的体重冻结可能会导致在给定的表现水平上使用超过 2 倍的体重。其次，我们注意到人类白天和夜间行为分别与 PackNet 的训练和修剪阶段的相似性。我们研究了修剪阶段被给予时间预算的设置，并确定了迭代修剪与人类多个睡眠周期之间的联系。我们证明存在迭代与迭代的最佳选择。时代赋予了不同的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究受人类学习机制启发的持续学习系统效率，通过分析睡眠机制并以PackNet算法为案例，探讨基于剪枝的持续学习方法的优化。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法存在效率低下和过度依赖权重冻结的问题，而人类学习在有限资源下能高效完成任务且无灾难性遗忘，需借鉴生物机制提升算法效率。
AI.method: 以PackNet为案例，对比分析权重冻结机制的效率问题；模拟人类昼夜行为与训练/剪枝阶段的关联，设定剪枝时间预算，研究迭代剪枝与睡眠周期的关系，寻找任务间的迭代与训练轮次最优配比。
AI.result: 发现权重冻结导致权重使用量超出现有方法2倍以上；揭示剪枝阶段时间预算与多睡眠周期的关联性，证明存在任务依赖的迭代与训练轮次最优解。
AI.conclusion: 受人类睡眠机制启发的结构化剪枝方法可提升持续学习效率，通过合理分配剪枝迭代次数与训练轮次，可避免冗余权重冻结，实现资源优化利用。

search_text: A Study on Efficiency in Continual Learning Inspired by Human Learning 受人类学习启发的持续学习效率研究 Humans are efficient continual learning systems; we continually learn new skills from birth with finite cells and resources. Our learning is highly optimized both in terms of capacity and time while not suffering from catastrophic forgetting. In this work we study the efficiency of continual learning systems, taking inspiration from human learning. In particular, inspired by the mechanisms of sleep, we evaluate popular pruning-based continual learning algorithms, using PackNet as a case study. First, we identify that weight freezing, which is used in continual learning without biological justification, can result in over $2\times$ as many weights being used for a given level of performance. Secondly, we note the similarity in human day and night time behaviors to the training and pruning phases respectively of PackNet. We study a setting where the pruning phase is given a time budget, and identify connections between iterative pruning and multiple sleep cycles in humans. We show there exists an optimal choice of iteration v.s. epochs given different tasks. 人类是高效的持续学习系统；我们从出生起就利用有限的细胞和资源不断学习新技能。我们的学习在容量和时间方面都得到了高度优化，同时不会遭受灾难性遗忘。在这项工作中，我们从人类学习中汲取灵感，研究持续学习系统的效率。特别是，受到睡眠机制的启发，我们使用 PackNet 作为案例研究来评估流行的基于剪枝的持续学习算法。首先，我们发现，在没有生物学依据的情况下用于持续学习的体重冻结可能会导致在给定的表现水平上使用超过 2 倍的体重。其次，我们注意到人类白天和夜间行为分别与 PackNet 的训练和修剪阶段的相似性。我们研究了修剪阶段被给予时间预算的设置，并确定了迭代修剪与人类多个睡眠周期之间的联系。我们证明存在迭代与迭代的最佳选择。时代赋予了不同的任务。 本文研究受人类学习机制启发的持续学习系统效率，通过分析睡眠机制并以PackNet算法为案例，探讨基于剪枝的持续学习方法的优化。 Philip J. Ball,Yingzhen Li,Angus Lamb,Cheng Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tsun-An Hsieh,Cheng Yu,Szu-Wei Fu,Xugang Lu,Yu Tsao
title: Improving Perceptual Quality by Phone-Fortified Perceptual Loss using Wasserstein Distance for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 使用 Wasserstein 距离进行语音增强，通过电话强化感知损失来提高感知质量
abstract: Speech enhancement (SE) aims to improve speech quality and intelligibility, which are both related to a smooth transition in speech segments that may carry linguistic information, e.g. phones and syllables. In this study, we propose a novel phone-fortified perceptual loss (PFPL) that takes phonetic information into account for training SE models. To effectively incorporate the phonetic information, the PFPL is computed based on latent representations of the wav2vec model, a powerful self-supervised encoder that renders rich phonetic information. To more accurately measure the distribution distances of the latent representations, the PFPL adopts the Wasserstein distance as the distance measure. Our experimental results first reveal that the PFPL is more correlated with the perceptual evaluation metrics, as compared to signal-level losses. Moreover, the results showed that the PFPL can enable a deep complex U-Net SE model to achieve highly competitive performance in terms of standardized quality and intelligibility evaluations on the Voice Bank-DEMAND dataset.
summary: Speech enhancement (SE) aims to improve speech quality and intelligibility, which are both related to a smooth transition in speech segments that may carry linguistic information, e.g. phones and syllables. In this study, we propose a novel phone-fortified perceptual loss (PFPL) that takes phonetic information into account for training SE models. To effectively incorporate the phonetic information, the PFPL is computed based on latent representations of the wav2vec model, a powerful self-supervised encoder that renders rich phonetic information. To more accurately measure the distribution distances of the latent representations, the PFPL adopts the Wasserstein distance as the distance measure. Our experimental results first reveal that the PFPL is more correlated with the perceptual evaluation metrics, as compared to signal-level losses. Moreover, the results showed that the PFPL can enable a deep complex U-Net SE model to achieve highly competitive performance in terms of standardized quality and intelligibility evaluations on the Voice Bank-DEMAND dataset.
abstract_zh: 语音增强（SE）旨在提高语音质量和清晰度，这两者都与可能携带语言信息的语音片段的平滑过渡有关，例如，语音片段。电话和音节。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的电话强化感知损失（PFPL），它在训练 SE 模型时考虑了语音信息。为了有效地合并语音信息，PFPL 是基于 wav2vec 模型的潜在表示来计算的，wav2vec 模型是一个强大的自监督编码器，可以呈现丰富的语音信息。为了更准确地测量潜在表示的分布距离，PFPL 采用 Wasserstein 距离作为距离度量。我们的实验结果首先表明，与信号电平损失相比，PFPL 与感知评估指标的相关性更强。此外，结果表明，PFPL 可以使深度复杂的 U-Net SE 模型在 Voice Bank-DEMAND 数据集上的标准化质量和清晰度评估方面实现极具竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音素信息与Wasserstein距离的感知损失函数PFPL，用于提升语音增强模型的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 传统语音增强模型的损失函数难以准确捕捉语音中与音素相关的感知特性，导致质量与可懂度提升受限。
AI.method: 基于wav2vec模型的潜在表示提取音素信息，采用Wasserstein距离构建电话强化感知损失（PFPL）作为模型训练目标。
AI.result: PFPL在Voice Bank-DEMAND数据集上显著优于信号级损失，使深度复杂数U-Net模型在质量与可懂度评估中达到竞争性水平。
AI.conclusion: 引入音素感知损失与Wasserstein距离有效提升了语音增强的感知质量，验证了语音学特征与分布距离度量结合的可行性。

title: CNN Profiler on Polar Coordinate Images for Tropical Cyclone Structure Analysis
title_zh: 用于热带气旋结构分析的极坐标图像 CNN Profiler
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have achieved great success in analyzing tropical cyclones (TC) with satellite images in several tasks, such as TC intensity estimation. In contrast, TC structure, which is conventionally described by a few parameters estimated subjectively by meteorology specialists, is still hard to be profiled objectively and routinely. This study applies CNN on satellite images to create the entire TC structure profiles, covering all the structural parameters. By utilizing the meteorological domain knowledge to construct TC wind profiles based on historical structure parameters, we provide valuable labels for training in our newly released benchmark dataset. With such a dataset, we hope to attract more attention to this crucial issue among data scientists. Meanwhile, a baseline is established with a specialized convolutional model operating on polar-coordinates. We discovered that it is more feasible and physically reasonable to extract structural information on polar-coordinates, instead of Cartesian coordinates, according to a TC's rotational and spiral natures. Experimental results on the released benchmark dataset verified the robustness of the proposed model and demonstrated the potential for applying deep learning techniques for this barely developed yet important topic.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have achieved great success in analyzing tropical cyclones (TC) with satellite images in several tasks, such as TC intensity estimation. In contrast, TC structure, which is conventionally described by a few parameters estimated subjectively by meteorology specialists, is still hard to be profiled objectively and routinely. This study applies CNN on satellite images to create the entire TC structure profiles, covering all the structural parameters. By utilizing the meteorological domain knowledge to construct TC wind profiles based on historical structure parameters, we provide valuable labels for training in our newly released benchmark dataset. With such a dataset, we hope to attract more attention to this crucial issue among data scientists. Meanwhile, a baseline is established with a specialized convolutional model operating on polar-coordinates. We discovered that it is more feasible and physically reasonable to extract structural information on polar-coordinates, instead of Cartesian coordinates, according to a TC's rotational and spiral natures. Experimental results on the released benchmark dataset verified the robustness of the proposed model and demonstrated the potential for applying deep learning techniques for this barely developed yet important topic.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在利用卫星图像分析热带气旋 (TC) 的多项任务中取得了巨大成功，例如热带气旋强度估计。相比之下，传统上通过气象专家主观估计的一些参数来描述TC结构，仍然很难客观、常规地描绘。本研究在卫星图像上应用 CNN，创建整个 TC 结构剖面，涵盖所有结构参数。通过利用气象领域知识根据历史结构参数构建TC风廓线，我们为新发布的基准数据集的训练提供了有价值的标签。通过这样的数据集，我们希望引起数据科学家对这一关键问题的更多关注。同时，通过在极坐标上运行的专门卷积模型建立基线。我们发现，根据 TC 的旋转和螺旋性质，在极坐标而不是笛卡尔坐标上提取结构信息更加可行且物理合理。已发布的基准数据集的实验结果验证了所提出模型的稳健性，并证明了将深度学习技术应用于这个刚刚发展但重要的主题的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于极坐标图像的卷积神经网络（CNN）方法，用于生成热带气旋结构的完整剖面分析。
AI.motivation: 传统热带气旋结构分析依赖主观参数，缺乏客观且常规的自动化方法，需借助深度学习实现结构参数的系统化提取。
AI.method: 利用气象学知识构建历史结构参数的风场剖面作为标签，创建基准数据集，并设计极坐标专用卷积模型以适配气旋旋转与螺旋特性。
AI.result: 实验验证了极坐标下模型的鲁棒性，证明深度学习在热带气旋结构分析中的可行性与物理合理性。
AI.conclusion: 极坐标表示更符合气旋运动特性，所构建的数据集与基线模型为该领域研究提供了重要参考。

motivation: 传统热带气旋结构分析依赖主观参数，缺乏客观且常规的自动化方法，需借助深度学习实现结构参数的系统化提取。
method: 利用气象学知识构建历史结构参数的风场剖面作为标签，创建基准数据集，并设计极坐标专用卷积模型以适配气旋旋转与螺旋特性。
result: 实验验证了极坐标下模型的鲁棒性，证明深度学习在热带气旋结构分析中的可行性与物理合理性。
conclusion: 极坐标表示更符合气旋运动特性，所构建的数据集与基线模型为该领域研究提供了重要参考。
search_text: CNN Profiler on Polar Coordinate Images for Tropical Cyclone Structure Analysis 用于热带气旋结构分析的极坐标图像 CNN Profiler Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have achieved great success in analyzing tropical cyclones (TC) with satellite images in several tasks, such as TC intensity estimation. In contrast, TC structure, which is conventionally described by a few parameters estimated subjectively by meteorology specialists, is still hard to be profiled objectively and routinely. This study applies CNN on satellite images to create the entire TC structure profiles, covering all the structural parameters. By utilizing the meteorological domain knowledge to construct TC wind profiles based on historical structure parameters, we provide valuable labels for training in our newly released benchmark dataset. With such a dataset, we hope to attract more attention to this crucial issue among data scientists. Meanwhile, a baseline is established with a specialized convolutional model operating on polar-coordinates. We discovered that it is more feasible and physically reasonable to extract structural information on polar-coordinates, instead of Cartesian coordinates, according to a TC's rotational and spiral natures. Experimental results on the released benchmark dataset verified the robustness of the proposed model and demonstrated the potential for applying deep learning techniques for this barely developed yet important topic. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在利用卫星图像分析热带气旋 (TC) 的多项任务中取得了巨大成功，例如热带气旋强度估计。相比之下，传统上通过气象专家主观估计的一些参数来描述TC结构，仍然很难客观、常规地描绘。本研究在卫星图像上应用 CNN，创建整个 TC 结构剖面，涵盖所有结构参数。通过利用气象领域知识根据历史结构参数构建TC风廓线，我们为新发布的基准数据集的训练提供了有价值的标签。通过这样的数据集，我们希望引起数据科学家对这一关键问题的更多关注。同时，通过在极坐标上运行的专门卷积模型建立基线。我们发现，根据 TC 的旋转和螺旋性质，在极坐标而不是笛卡尔坐标上提取结构信息更加可行且物理合理。已发布的基准数据集的实验结果验证了所提出模型的稳健性，并证明了将深度学习技术应用于这个刚刚发展但重要的主题的潜力。 本文提出基于极坐标图像的卷积神经网络（CNN）方法，用于生成热带气旋结构的完整剖面分析。 Boyo Chen,Buo-Fu Chen,Chun-Min Hsiao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Stefano Gasperini,Mohammad-Ali Nikouei Mahani,Alvaro Marcos-Ramiro,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: Panoster: End-to-end Panoptic Segmentation of LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: Panoster：LiDAR 点云的端到端全景分割
abstract: Panoptic segmentation has recently unified semantic and instance segmentation, previously addressed separately, thus taking a step further towards creating more comprehensive and efficient perception systems. In this paper, we present Panoster, a novel proposal-free panoptic segmentation method for LiDAR point clouds. Unlike previous approaches relying on several steps to group pixels or points into objects, Panoster proposes a simplified framework incorporating a learning-based clustering solution to identify instances. At inference time, this acts as a class-agnostic segmentation, allowing Panoster to be fast, while outperforming prior methods in terms of accuracy. Without any post-processing, Panoster reached state-of-the-art results among published approaches on the challenging SemanticKITTI benchmark, and further increased its lead by exploiting heuristic techniques. Additionally, we showcase how our method can be flexibly and effectively applied on diverse existing semantic architectures to deliver panoptic predictions.
summary: Panoptic segmentation has recently unified semantic and instance segmentation, previously addressed separately, thus taking a step further towards creating more comprehensive and efficient perception systems. In this paper, we present Panoster, a novel proposal-free panoptic segmentation method for LiDAR point clouds. Unlike previous approaches relying on several steps to group pixels or points into objects, Panoster proposes a simplified framework incorporating a learning-based clustering solution to identify instances. At inference time, this acts as a class-agnostic segmentation, allowing Panoster to be fast, while outperforming prior methods in terms of accuracy. Without any post-processing, Panoster reached state-of-the-art results among published approaches on the challenging SemanticKITTI benchmark, and further increased its lead by exploiting heuristic techniques. Additionally, we showcase how our method can be flexibly and effectively applied on diverse existing semantic architectures to deliver panoptic predictions.
abstract_zh: 全景分割最近统一了语义分割和实例分割，这在之前是分开解决的，从而在创建更全面、更高效的感知系统方面又向前迈进了一步。在本文中，我们提出了 Panoster，一种新颖的无提案全景分割方法，适用于 LiDAR 点云。与之前依赖多个步骤将像素或点分组为对象的方法不同，Panoster 提出了一个简化的框架，其中结合了基于学习的聚类解决方案来识别实例。在推理时，这充当与类别无关的分割，使 Panoster 速度更快，同时在准确性方面优于先前的方法。在没有任何后处理的情况下，Panoster 在具有挑战性的 SemanticKITTI 基准上达到了已发布方法中最先进的结果，并通过利用启发式技术进一步扩大了其领先地位。此外，我们还展示了我们的方法如何灵活有效地应用于各种现有的语义架构以提供全景预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Panoster，一种用于LiDAR点云的端到端全景分割方法，通过简化流程提升效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多步骤分组点云，效率低且复杂，需提出更高效且准确的全景分割方案。
AI.method: 采用基于学习的聚类方案，无需后处理，实现类无关分割，并灵活适配现有语义架构。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI基准上达到SOTA结果，结合启发式技术进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: Panoster方法有效平衡速度与精度，可广泛应用于不同语义模型的全景分割任务。

title: Detecting Stance in Media on Global Warming
title_zh: 检测媒体对全球变暖的立场
abstract: Citing opinions is a powerful yet understudied strategy in argumentation. For example, an environmental activist might say, "Leading scientists agree that global warming is a serious concern," framing a clause which affirms their own stance ("that global warming is serious") as an opinion endorsed ("[scientists] agree") by a reputable source ("leading"). In contrast, a global warming denier might frame the same clause as the opinion of an untrustworthy source with a predicate connoting doubt: "Mistaken scientists claim [...]." Our work studies opinion-framing in the global warming (GW) debate, an increasingly partisan issue that has received little attention in NLP. We introduce Global Warming Stance Dataset (GWSD), a dataset of stance-labeled GW sentences, and train a BERT classifier to study novel aspects of argumentation in how different sides of a debate represent their own and each other's opinions. From 56K news articles, we find that similar linguistic devices for self-affirming and opponent-doubting discourse are used across GW-accepting and skeptic media, though GW-skeptical media shows more opponent-doubt. We also find that authors often characterize sources as hypocritical, by ascribing opinions expressing the author's own view to source entities known to publicly endorse the opposing view. We release our stance dataset, model, and lexicons of framing devices for future work on opinion-framing and the automatic detection of GW stance.
summary: Citing opinions is a powerful yet understudied strategy in argumentation. For example, an environmental activist might say, "Leading scientists agree that global warming is a serious concern," framing a clause which affirms their own stance ("that global warming is serious") as an opinion endorsed ("[scientists] agree") by a reputable source ("leading"). In contrast, a global warming denier might frame the same clause as the opinion of an untrustworthy source with a predicate connoting doubt: "Mistaken scientists claim [...]." Our work studies opinion-framing in the global warming (GW) debate, an increasingly partisan issue that has received little attention in NLP. We introduce Global Warming Stance Dataset (GWSD), a dataset of stance-labeled GW sentences, and train a BERT classifier to study novel aspects of argumentation in how different sides of a debate represent their own and each other's opinions. From 56K news articles, we find that similar linguistic devices for self-affirming and opponent-doubting discourse are used across GW-accepting and skeptic media, though GW-skeptical media shows more opponent-doubt. We also find that authors often characterize sources as hypocritical, by ascribing opinions expressing the author's own view to source entities known to publicly endorse the opposing view. We release our stance dataset, model, and lexicons of framing devices for future work on opinion-framing and the automatic detection of GW stance.
abstract_zh: 引用观点是论证中一种强有力但尚未得到充分研究的策略。例如，一位环境活动家可能会说，“领先的科学家同意全球变暖是一个严重的问题”，将一个确认自己立场的条款（“全球变暖是严重的”）表述为由信誉良好的来源（“领先”）认可的观点（“[科学家]同意”）。相比之下，全球变暖否认者可能会构建与不可信来源的观点相同的子句，并带有表示怀疑的谓词：“错误的科学家声称[...]”。我们的工作研究了全球变暖 (GW) 辩论中的观点框架，这是一个日益党派化的问题，在 NLP 中很少受到关注。我们引入了全球变暖立场数据集 (GWSD)，这是一个带有立场标记的 GW 句子的数据集，并训练 BERT 分类器来研究争论的不同方面如何表达自己和彼此的观点的新颖方面。从 56K 篇新闻文章中，我们发现接受 GW 和怀疑的媒体都使用类似的自我肯定和对手怀疑话语的语言手段，尽管 GW 怀疑媒体表现出更多的对手怀疑。我们还发现，作者经常将来源描述为虚伪，将表达作者自己观点的观点归咎于已知公开支持相反观点的来源实体。我们发布了我们的立场数据集、模型和框架设备词典，用于未来的意见框架和 GW 立场的自动检测工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建全球变暖立场数据集（GWSD）和训练BERT分类器，研究媒体在讨论全球变暖时的立场表达策略及语言特征。
AI.motivation: 当前自然语言处理领域对争论性话题中意见框架策略的研究不足，尤其缺乏对全球变暖这一日益两极分化议题的系统分析。
AI.method: 从56,000篇新闻文章中构建立场标注数据集，训练BERT模型分析媒体文本中自我肯定与对立质疑的语言模式，并提取框架化词汇进行量化研究。
AI.result: 发现支持与怀疑媒体均使用相似的语言策略，但怀疑媒体更倾向于对对立观点施加质疑。作者常将公开持对立立场的实体描述为虚伪的来源。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了首个全球变暖立场数据集及模型，为自动检测意见框架化表达和立场分析提供了基础工具与研究方向。

title: Gender Bias in Depression Detection Using Audio Features
title_zh: 使用音频特征检测抑郁症中的性别偏见
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, to be published at EUSIPCO 2021
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, to be published at EUSIPCO 2021
abstract: Depression is a large-scale mental health problem and a challenging area for machine learning researchers in detection of depression. Datasets such as Distress Analysis Interview Corpus - Wizard of Oz (DAIC-WOZ) have been created to aid research in this area. However, on top of the challenges inherent in accurately detecting depression, biases in datasets may result in skewed classification performance. In this paper we examine gender bias in the DAIC-WOZ dataset. We show that gender biases in DAIC-WOZ can lead to an overreporting of performance. By different concepts from Fair Machine Learning, such as data re-distribution, and using raw audio features, we can mitigate against the harmful effects of bias.
summary: Depression is a large-scale mental health problem and a challenging area for machine learning researchers in detection of depression. Datasets such as Distress Analysis Interview Corpus - Wizard of Oz (DAIC-WOZ) have been created to aid research in this area. However, on top of the challenges inherent in accurately detecting depression, biases in datasets may result in skewed classification performance. In this paper we examine gender bias in the DAIC-WOZ dataset. We show that gender biases in DAIC-WOZ can lead to an overreporting of performance. By different concepts from Fair Machine Learning, such as data re-distribution, and using raw audio features, we can mitigate against the harmful effects of bias.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症是一个大规模的心理健康问题，对于机器学习研究人员检测抑郁症来说也是一个具有挑战性的领域。创建苦恼分析访谈语料库 - Wizard of Oz (DAIC-WOZ) 等数据集是为了帮助该领域的研究。然而，除了准确检测抑郁症所固有的挑战之外，数据集的偏差可能会导致分类性能出现偏差。在本文中，我们研究了 DAIC-WOZ 数据集中的性别偏见。我们表明 DAIC-WOZ 中的性别偏见可能导致绩效报告过高。通过公平机器学习的不同概念，例如数据重新分配和使用原始音频特征，我们可以减轻偏见的有害影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了DAIC-WOZ数据集中的性别偏见问题，并通过音频特征和公平机器学习方法缓解其对抑郁检测性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁检测数据集可能存在性别偏见，导致分类性能高估，影响模型的公平性和可靠性。
AI.method: 采用公平机器学习中的数据重分布方法，并结合原始音频特征分析，以降低数据集中性别偏见带来的负面影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，DAIC-WOZ数据集的性别偏见会导致性能高估，而所提出的方法有效缓解了这一问题。
AI.conclusion: 需关注数据集中的偏见问题，公平机器学习方法可提升抑郁检测模型的准确性和公平性。

title: Forgery Blind Inspection for Detecting Manipulations of Gel Electrophoresis Images
title_zh: 用于检测凝胶电泳图像操纵的伪造盲检
comment: This version is an extension of Prof. Shao's previous conference paper (IEEE GlobalSIP 2018): "Unveiling Vestiges of Man-Made Modifications on Molecular-Biological Experiment Images." (https://doi.org/10.1109/GlobalSIP.2018.8646594)
comments: This version is an extension of Prof. Shao's previous conference paper (IEEE GlobalSIP 2018): "Unveiling Vestiges of Man-Made Modifications on Molecular-Biological Experiment Images." (https://doi.org/10.1109/GlobalSIP.2018.8646594)
abstract: Recently, falsified images have been found in papers involved in research misconducts. However, although there have been many image forgery detection methods, none of them was designed for molecular-biological experiment images. In this paper, we proposed a fast blind inquiry method, named FBI$_{GEL}$, for integrity of images obtained from two common sorts of molecular experiments, i.e., western blot (WB) and polymerase chain reaction (PCR). Based on an optimized pseudo-background capable of highlighting local residues, FBI$_{GEL}$ can reveal traceable vestiges suggesting inappropriate local modifications on WB/PCR images. Additionally, because the optimized pseudo-background is derived according to a closed-form solution, FBI$_{GEL}$ is computationally efficient and thus suitable for large scale inquiry tasks for WB/PCR image integrity. We applied FBI$_{GEL}$ on several papers questioned by the public on \textbf{PUBPEER}, and our results show that figures of those papers indeed contain doubtful unnatural patterns.
summary: Recently, falsified images have been found in papers involved in research misconducts. However, although there have been many image forgery detection methods, none of them was designed for molecular-biological experiment images. In this paper, we proposed a fast blind inquiry method, named FBI$_{GEL}$, for integrity of images obtained from two common sorts of molecular experiments, i.e., western blot (WB) and polymerase chain reaction (PCR). Based on an optimized pseudo-background capable of highlighting local residues, FBI$_{GEL}$ can reveal traceable vestiges suggesting inappropriate local modifications on WB/PCR images. Additionally, because the optimized pseudo-background is derived according to a closed-form solution, FBI$_{GEL}$ is computationally efficient and thus suitable for large scale inquiry tasks for WB/PCR image integrity. We applied FBI$_{GEL}$ on several papers questioned by the public on \textbf{PUBPEER}, and our results show that figures of those papers indeed contain doubtful unnatural patterns.
abstract_zh: 最近，在涉及研究不端行为的论文中发现了伪造的图像。然而，尽管已经有很多图像伪造检测方法，但没有一种方法是针对分子生物学实验图像而设计的。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速盲查询方法，名为 FBI$_{GEL}$，用于确保从两种常见分子实验（即蛋白质印迹（WB）和聚合酶链反应（PCR））获得的图像的完整性。基于能够突出显示局部残留物的优化伪背景，FBI$_{GEL}$ 可以揭示可追踪的痕迹，表明对 WB/PCR 图像进行了不当的局部修改。此外，由于优化的伪背景是根据封闭式解决方案导出的，因此 FBI$_{GEL}$ 计算效率高，因此适合 WB/PCR 图像完整性的大规模查询任务。我们将 FBI$_{GEL}$ 应用于 \textbf{PUBPEER} 上公众质疑的几篇论文，结果表明这些论文的图像确实包含可疑的不自然模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FBI$_{GEL}$的快速盲检测方法，用于检测西方印迹（WB）和聚合酶链式反应（PCR）凝胶电泳图像中的伪造痕迹。
AI.motivation: 现有图像伪造检测方法未针对分子生物学实验图像设计，而科研不端行为中存在伪造凝胶电泳图像的问题，亟需专用检测工具。
AI.method: 基于优化的伪背景计算，通过闭合解公式生成局部残留特征，揭示WB/PCR图像中可能的人工修改痕迹，具有计算高效性。
AI.result: 将FBI$_{GEL}$应用于PUBPEER平台质疑的多篇论文，发现其图像中存在可疑的非自然模式。
AI.conclusion: FBI$_{GEL}$为WB/PCR图像完整性验证提供了有效且高效的解决方案，有助于提升分子生物学研究的学术可信度。

title: Speech Synthesis and Control Using Differentiable DSP
title_zh: 使用可微分 DSP 进行语音合成和控制
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, for associated audio files, see https://thesmith1.github.io/DDSPeech/
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, for associated audio files, see https://thesmith1.github.io/DDSPeech/
abstract: Modern text-to-speech systems are able to produce natural and high-quality speech, but speech contains factors of variation (e.g. pitch, rhythm, loudness, timbre)\ that text alone cannot contain. In this work we move towards a speech synthesis system that can produce diverse speech renditions of a text by allowing (but not requiring) explicit control over the various factors of variation. We propose a new neural vocoder that offers control of such factors of variation. This is achieved by employing differentiable digital signal processing (DDSP) (previously used only for music rather than speech), which exposes these factors of variation. The results show that the proposed approach can produce natural speech with realistic timbre, and individual factors of variation can be freely controlled.
summary: Modern text-to-speech systems are able to produce natural and high-quality speech, but speech contains factors of variation (e.g. pitch, rhythm, loudness, timbre)\ that text alone cannot contain. In this work we move towards a speech synthesis system that can produce diverse speech renditions of a text by allowing (but not requiring) explicit control over the various factors of variation. We propose a new neural vocoder that offers control of such factors of variation. This is achieved by employing differentiable digital signal processing (DDSP) (previously used only for music rather than speech), which exposes these factors of variation. The results show that the proposed approach can produce natural speech with realistic timbre, and individual factors of variation can be freely controlled.
abstract_zh: 现代文本转语音系统能够产生自然且高质量的语音，但语音包含文本本身无法包含的变化因素（例如音调、节奏、响度、音色）\。在这项工作中，我们转向一种语音合成系统，该系统可以通过允许（但不要求）对各种变化因素进行显式控制来产生文本的多种语音再现。我们提出了一种新的神经声码器，可以控制此类变化因素。这是通过采用可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP)（以前仅用于音乐而不是语音）来实现的，它揭示了这些变化因素。结果表明，所提出的方法可以产生具有真实音色的自然语音，并且可以自由控制变化的各个因素。

AI.tldr: 开发一种通过控制语音变化因素（如音高、节奏等）生成多样化语音的合成系统
AI.motivation: 传统文本到语音系统无法控制语音中的变化因素，导致生成语音缺乏多样性，需通过显式控制实现多样化输出
AI.method: 提出基于可微分数字信号处理（DDSP）的神经声码器，通过显式控制语音变化因素实现多样化合成
AI.result: 生成自然语音并实现对音高、节奏等个体变化因素的自由控制
AI.conclusion: 验证了DDSP在语音合成中的有效性，为可控语音生成提供了新思路

We propose a new neural vocoder that offers control of such factors of variation. This is achieved by employing differentiable digital signal processing (DDSP) (previously used only for music rather than speech), which exposes these factors of variation. The results show that the proposed approach can produce natural speech with realistic timbre, and individual factors of variation can be freely controlled. 现代文本转语音系统能够产生自然且高质量的语音，但语音包含文本本身无法包含的变化因素（例如音调、节奏、响度、音色）\。在这项工作中，我们转向一种语音合成系统，该系统可以通过允许（但不要求）对各种变化因素进行显式控制来产生文本的多种语音再现。我们提出了一种新的神经声码器，可以控制此类变化因素。这是通过采用可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP)（以前仅用于音乐而不是语音）来实现的，它揭示了这些变化因素。结果表明，所提出的方法可以产生具有真实音色的自然语音，并且可以自由控制变化的各个因素。 开发一种通过控制语音变化因素（如音高、节奏等）生成多样化语音的合成系统 Giorgio Fabbro,Vladimir Golkov,Thomas Kemp,Daniel Cremers eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Cuneyt G. Akcora,Sudhanva Purusotham,Yulia R. Gel,Mitchell Krawiec-Thayer,Murat Kantarcioglu
title: How to Not Get Caught When You Launder Money on Blockchain?
title_zh: 当你在区块链上洗钱时如何不被抓到？
abstract: The number of blockchain users has tremendously grown in recent years. As an unintended consequence, e-crime transactions on blockchains has been on the rise. Consequently, public blockchains have become a hotbed of research for developing AI tools to detect and trace users and transactions that are related to e-crime. We argue that following a few select strategies can make money laundering on blockchain virtually undetectable with most of the existing tools and algorithms. As a result, the effective combating of e-crime activities involving cryptocurrencies requires the development of novel analytic methodology in AI.
summary: The number of blockchain users has tremendously grown in recent years. As an unintended consequence, e-crime transactions on blockchains has been on the rise. Consequently, public blockchains have become a hotbed of research for developing AI tools to detect and trace users and transactions that are related to e-crime. We argue that following a few select strategies can make money laundering on blockchain virtually undetectable with most of the existing tools and algorithms. As a result, the effective combating of e-crime activities involving cryptocurrencies requires the development of novel analytic methodology in AI.
abstract_zh: 近年来，区块链用户数量大幅增长。一个意想不到的结果是，区块链上的电子犯罪交易一直在增加。因此，公共区块链已成为开发人工智能工具来检测和追踪与电子犯罪相关的用户和交易的研究温床。我们认为，遵循一些选定的策略可以使大多数现有工具和算法几乎无法检测到区块链上的洗钱行为。因此，有效打击涉及加密货币的电子犯罪活动需要开发新颖的人工智能分析方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在区块链上规避现有检测手段进行洗钱，并提出改进的分析方法以应对加密货币犯罪。
AI.motivation: 区块链匿名性导致加密货币被广泛用于洗钱等犯罪活动，现有AI检测工具难以有效追踪。
AI.method: 通过设计特定交易策略（如混币、多层转移等）使洗钱行为在现有算法中难以被识别，并强调需开发新型AI分析方法。
AI.result: 验证了现有检测工具在应对特定策略时的失效性，揭示了当前技术的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需研发更先进的AI技术以应对区块链犯罪，现有方法存在显著改进空间。

title: Generative Adversarial Networks in Human Emotion Synthesis:A Review
title_zh: 人类情感合成中的生成对抗网络：综述
abstract: Synthesizing realistic data samples is of great value for both academic and industrial communities. Deep generative models have become an emerging topic in various research areas like computer vision and signal processing. Affective computing, a topic of a broad interest in computer vision society, has been no exception and has benefited from generative models. In fact, affective computing observed a rapid derivation of generative models during the last two decades. Applications of such models include but are not limited to emotion recognition and classification, unimodal emotion synthesis, and cross-modal emotion synthesis. As a result, we conducted a review of recent advances in human emotion synthesis by studying available databases, advantages, and disadvantages of the generative models along with the related training strategies considering two principal human communication modalities, namely audio and video. In this context, facial expression synthesis, speech emotion synthesis, and the audio-visual (cross-modal) emotion synthesis is reviewed extensively under different application scenarios. Gradually, we discuss open research problems to push the boundaries of this research area for future works.
summary: Synthesizing realistic data samples is of great value for both academic and industrial communities. Deep generative models have become an emerging topic in various research areas like computer vision and signal processing. Affective computing, a topic of a broad interest in computer vision society, has been no exception and has benefited from generative models. In fact, affective computing observed a rapid derivation of generative models during the last two decades. Applications of such models include but are not limited to emotion recognition and classification, unimodal emotion synthesis, and cross-modal emotion synthesis. As a result, we conducted a review of recent advances in human emotion synthesis by studying available databases, advantages, and disadvantages of the generative models along with the related training strategies considering two principal human communication modalities, namely audio and video. In this context, facial expression synthesis, speech emotion synthesis, and the audio-visual (cross-modal) emotion synthesis is reviewed extensively under different application scenarios. Gradually, we discuss open research problems to push the boundaries of this research area for future works.
abstract_zh: 合成真实的数据样本对于学术界和工业界都具有重要价值。深度生成模型已成为计算机视觉和信号处理等各个研究领域的新兴课题。情感计算是计算机视觉社会广泛关注的一个话题，也不例外，并且受益于生成模型。事实上，情感计算在过去二十年中观察到生成模型的快速推导。此类模型的应用包括但不限于情感识别和分类、单模态情感合成和跨模态情感合成。因此，我们通过研究可用的数据库、生成模型的优缺点以及考虑两种主要人类交流方式（即音频和视频）的相关训练策略，对人类情感合成的最新进展进行了回顾。在此背景下，对不同应用场景下的面部表情合成、语音情感合成和视听（跨模态）情感合成进行了广泛的回顾。逐渐地，我们讨论开放的研究问题，以推动未来工作的这一研究领域的界限。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了生成对抗网络（GAN）在人类情感合成领域的最新进展，重点分析了音频和视频两种主要模态下的技术应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 合成真实的人类情感数据对学术界和工业界均具有重要价值，而生成模型在情感计算领域的发展迅速，亟需系统性总结其应用与局限性。
AI.method: 通过调研现有数据库、分析生成模型的优势与不足，并结合音频和视频两种模态的训练策略，对表情合成、语音情感合成及跨模态情感合成进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 全面梳理了不同应用场景下的技术路线，指出现有方法在数据多样性、模态对齐及可控性方面的不足，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: GAN在情感合成领域展现出巨大潜力，但需进一步解决跨模态一致性、数据伦理及生成质量评估等核心问题以推动技术落地。

authors_text: M. Tarik Altuncu,Sophia N. Yaliraki,Mauricio Barahona
title: Graph-based Topic Extraction from Vector Embeddings of Text Documents: Application to a Corpus of News Articles
title_zh: 从文本文档向量嵌入中基于图的主题提取：在新闻文章语料库中的应用
abstract: Production of news content is growing at an astonishing rate. To help manage and monitor the sheer amount of text, there is an increasing need to develop efficient methods that can provide insights into emerging content areas, and stratify unstructured corpora of text into `topics' that stem intrinsically from content similarity. Here we present an unsupervised framework that brings together powerful vector embeddings from natural language processing with tools from multiscale graph partitioning that can reveal natural partitions at different resolutions without making a priori assumptions about the number of clusters in the corpus. We show the advantages of graph-based clustering through end-to-end comparisons with other popular clustering and topic modelling methods, and also evaluate different text vector embeddings, from classic Bag-of-Words to Doc2Vec to the recent transformers based model Bert. This comparative work is showcased through an analysis of a corpus of US news coverage during the presidential election year of 2016.
summary: Production of news content is growing at an astonishing rate. To help manage and monitor the sheer amount of text, there is an increasing need to develop efficient methods that can provide insights into emerging content areas, and stratify unstructured corpora of text into `topics' that stem intrinsically from content similarity. Here we present an unsupervised framework that brings together powerful vector embeddings from natural language processing with tools from multiscale graph partitioning that can reveal natural partitions at different resolutions without making a priori assumptions about the number of clusters in the corpus. We show the advantages of graph-based clustering through end-to-end comparisons with other popular clustering and topic modelling methods, and also evaluate different text vector embeddings, from classic Bag-of-Words to Doc2Vec to the recent transformers based model Bert. This comparative work is showcased through an analysis of a corpus of US news coverage during the presidential election year of 2016.
abstract_zh: 新闻内容的生产正在以惊人的速度增长。为了帮助管理和监控大量的文本，越来越需要开发有效的方法来深入了解新兴内容领域，并将非结构化文本语料库分层为本质上源于内容相似性的“主题”。在这里，我们提出了一个无监督框架，它将自然语言处理中强大的向量嵌入与多尺度图分区的工具结合在一起，可以揭示不同分辨率下的自然分区，而无需对语料库中的簇数量做出先验假设。我们通过与其他流行的聚类和主题建模方法的端到端比较展示了基于图的聚类的优势，并评估了不同的文本向量嵌入，从经典的 Bag-of-Words 到 Doc2Vec 再到最近基于 Transformer 的模型 Bert。这项比较工作是通过对 2016 年总统选举年美国新闻报道语料库的分析来展示的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的无监督框架，通过结合文本向量嵌入与多尺度图划分技术，从新闻语料库中提取自然主题分区。
AI.motivation: 新闻内容呈指数级增长，需开发无需预设聚类数量的高效方法，以揭示文本语料库中固有的主题结构并支持内容监控。
AI.method: 整合自然语言处理的向量嵌入（如Bag-of-Words、Doc2Vec、BERT）与多尺度图聚类算法，通过端到端比较验证不同嵌入方法与聚类技术的效果。
AI.result: 在2016年美国大选新闻语料库分析中，基于图的聚类方法在不同分辨率下有效识别出自然主题分区，且优于传统聚类和主题模型。
AI.conclusion: 图基聚类能自适应发现多尺度文本主题结构，且现代嵌入模型（如BERT）显著提升主题提取效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的无监督框架，通过结合文本向量嵌入与多尺度图划分技术，从新闻语料库中提取自然主题分区。

ai_content.result: 在2016年美国大选新闻语料库分析中，基于图的聚类方法在不同分辨率下有效识别出自然主题分区，且优于传统聚类和主题模型。
ai_content.conclusion: 图基聚类能自适应发现多尺度文本主题结构，且现代嵌入模型（如BERT）显著提升主题提取效果。

search_text: Graph-based Topic Extraction from Vector Embeddings of Text Documents: Application to a Corpus of News Articles 从文本文档向量嵌入中基于图的主题提取：在新闻文章语料库中的应用 Production of news content is growing at an astonishing rate. To help manage and monitor the sheer amount of text, there is an increasing need to develop efficient methods that can provide insights into emerging content areas, and stratify unstructured corpora of text into `topics' that stem intrinsically from content similarity. Here we present an unsupervised framework that brings together powerful vector embeddings from natural language processing with tools from multiscale graph partitioning that can reveal natural partitions at different resolutions without making a priori assumptions about the number of clusters in the corpus. We show the advantages of graph-based clustering through end-to-end comparisons with other popular clustering and topic modelling methods, and also evaluate different text vector embeddings, from classic Bag-of-Words to Doc2Vec to the recent transformers based model Bert. This comparative work is showcased through an analysis of a corpus of US news coverage during the presidential election year of 2016. 新闻内容的生产正在以惊人的速度增长。为了帮助管理和监控大量的文本，越来越需要开发有效的方法来深入了解新兴内容领域，并将非结构化文本语料库分层为本质上源于内容相似性的“主题”。在这里，我们提出了一个无监督框架，它将自然语言处理中强大的向量嵌入与多尺度图分区的工具结合在一起，可以揭示不同分辨率下的自然分区，而无需对语料库中的簇数量做出先验假设。我们通过与其他流行的聚类和主题建模方法的端到端比较展示了基于图的聚类的优势，并评估了不同的文本向量嵌入，从经典的 Bag-of-Words 到 Doc2Vec 再到最近基于 Transformer 的模型 Bert。这项比较工作是通过对 2016 年总统选举年美国新闻报道语料库的分析来展示的。 本文提出了一种基于图的无监督框架，通过结合文本向量嵌入与多尺度图划分技术，从新闻语料库中提取自然主题分区。 M. Tarik Altuncu,Sophia N. Yaliraki,Mauricio Barahona cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Measuring non-trivial compositionality in emergent communication
title_zh: 衡量紧急通信中的重要组合性
abstract: Compositionality is an important explanatory target in emergent communication and language evolution. The vast majority of computational models of communication account for the emergence of only a very basic form of compositionality: trivial compositionality. A compositional protocol is trivially compositional if the meaning of a complex signal (e.g. blue circle) boils down to the intersection of meanings of its constituents (e.g. the intersection of the set of blue objects and the set of circles). A protocol is non-trivially compositional (NTC) if the meaning of a complex signal (e.g. biggest apple) is a more complex function of the meanings of their constituents. In this paper, we review several metrics of compositionality used in emergent communication and experimentally show that most of them fail to detect NTC - i.e. they treat non-trivial compositionality as a failure of compositionality. The one exception is tree reconstruction error, a metric motivated by formal accounts of compositionality. These results emphasise important limitations of emergent communication research that could hamper progress on modelling the emergence of NTC.
summary: Compositionality is an important explanatory target in emergent communication and language evolution. The vast majority of computational models of communication account for the emergence of only a very basic form of compositionality: trivial compositionality. A compositional protocol is trivially compositional if the meaning of a complex signal (e.g. blue circle) boils down to the intersection of meanings of its constituents (e.g. the intersection of the set of blue objects and the set of circles). A protocol is non-trivially compositional (NTC) if the meaning of a complex signal (e.g. biggest apple) is a more complex function of the meanings of their constituents. In this paper, we review several metrics of compositionality used in emergent communication and experimentally show that most of them fail to detect NTC - i.e. they treat non-trivial compositionality as a failure of compositionality. The one exception is tree reconstruction error, a metric motivated by formal accounts of compositionality. These results emphasise important limitations of emergent communication research that could hamper progress on modelling the emergence of NTC.
abstract_zh: 组合性是新兴交流和语言演化的重要解释目标。绝大多数通信计算模型仅解释了一种非常基本的组合形式的出现：琐碎组合。如果复杂信号（例如蓝色圆圈）的含义归结为其成分含义的交集（例如蓝色对象集和圆圈集的交集），则组合协议是普通组合的。如果复杂信号（例如最大的苹果）的含义是其成分含义的更复杂的函数，则协议是非平凡组合（NTC）的。在本文中，我们回顾了紧急通信中使用的几种组合性指标，并通过实验表明它们中的大多数无法检测 NTC - 即，它们将非平凡的组合性视为组合性的失败。唯一的例外是树重建误差，这是一种由组合性的正式说明引发的度量。这些结果强调了新兴传播研究的重要局限性，这可能会阻碍 NTC 出现建模的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估现有度量方法在检测涌现通信中非平凡组合性（NTC）的有效性，并指出其局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前计算模型普遍仅关注基础组合性（如信号意义的简单交集），而忽视了更复杂的非平凡组合性，导致对语言演变机制的理解受限。
AI.method: 回顾多种组合性度量指标，通过实验验证其能否区分基础组合性与非平凡组合性，重点分析树重建误差的检测能力。
AI.result: 多数指标将非平凡组合性误判为组合性失效，仅树重建误差能有效识别NTC，凸显现有研究的测量缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 现有度量方法无法准确捕捉非平凡组合性，需改进模型与评估体系以推动该领域研究进展。

authors_text: Geondo Park,June Yong Yang,Sung Ju Hwang,Eunho Yang
title: Attribution Preservation in Network Compression for Reliable Network Interpretation
title_zh: 网络压缩中的属性保留以实现可靠的网络解释
abstract: Neural networks embedded in safety-sensitive applications such as self-driving cars and wearable health monitors rely on two important techniques: input attribution for hindsight analysis and network compression to reduce its size for edge-computing. In this paper, we show that these seemingly unrelated techniques conflict with each other as network compression deforms the produced attributions, which could lead to dire consequences for mission-critical applications. This phenomenon arises due to the fact that conventional network compression methods only preserve the predictions of the network while ignoring the quality of the attributions. To combat the attribution inconsistency problem, we present a framework that can preserve the attributions while compressing a network. By employing the Weighted Collapsed Attribution Matching regularizer, we match the attribution maps of the network being compressed to its pre-compression former self. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm both quantitatively and qualitatively on diverse compression methods.
summary: Neural networks embedded in safety-sensitive applications such as self-driving cars and wearable health monitors rely on two important techniques: input attribution for hindsight analysis and network compression to reduce its size for edge-computing. In this paper, we show that these seemingly unrelated techniques conflict with each other as network compression deforms the produced attributions, which could lead to dire consequences for mission-critical applications. This phenomenon arises due to the fact that conventional network compression methods only preserve the predictions of the network while ignoring the quality of the attributions. To combat the attribution inconsistency problem, we present a framework that can preserve the attributions while compressing a network. By employing the Weighted Collapsed Attribution Matching regularizer, we match the attribution maps of the network being compressed to its pre-compression former self. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm both quantitatively and qualitatively on diverse compression methods.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车和可穿戴健康监测器等安全敏感应用中嵌入的神经网络依赖于两项重要技术：用于事后分析的输入归因和用于减小边缘计算规模的网络压缩。在本文中，我们表明，当网络压缩使生成的属性变形时，这些看似无关的技术相互冲突，这可能会给关键任务应用程序带来可怕的后果。出现这种现象的原因是传统的网络压缩方法仅保留网络的预测，而忽略了归因的质量。为了解决归因不一致问题，我们提出了一个可以在压缩网络的同时保留归因的框架。通过使用加权折叠归因匹配正则化器，我们将被压缩的网络的归因图与其压缩前的自身进行匹配。我们在不同的压缩方法上定量和定性地证明了我们的算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在神经网络压缩过程中保持输入属性一致性的方法，以确保安全敏感应用中的可靠网络解释。
AI.motivation: 传统网络压缩方法仅关注预测结果的保持，忽视了属性映射的质量，可能导致安全关键型应用中解释结果的严重偏差。
AI.method: 设计了加权坍缩属性匹配正则化器，通过匹配压缩前后网络的属性图来保持属性一致性。
AI.result: 在多种压缩方法上定量和定性验证了算法有效性，证明了属性保持与压缩效率的兼顾性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架解决了压缩与属性解释的冲突，为安全敏感场景提供了可靠且高效的网络压缩方案。

title: Image Representations Learned With Unsupervised Pre-Training Contain Human-like Biases
title_zh: 通过无监督预训练学习到的图像表示包含类人偏差
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures. Replaced example image completions of real people with completions of artificial people
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures. Replaced example image completions of real people with completions of artificial people
abstract: Recent advances in machine learning leverage massive datasets of unlabeled images from the web to learn general-purpose image representations for tasks from image classification to face recognition. But do unsupervised computer vision models automatically learn implicit patterns and embed social biases that could have harmful downstream effects? We develop a novel method for quantifying biased associations between representations of social concepts and attributes in images. We find that state-of-the-art unsupervised models trained on ImageNet, a popular benchmark image dataset curated from internet images, automatically learn racial, gender, and intersectional biases. We replicate 8 previously documented human biases from social psychology, from the innocuous, as with insects and flowers, to the potentially harmful, as with race and gender. Our results closely match three hypotheses about intersectional bias from social psychology. For the first time in unsupervised computer vision, we also quantify implicit human biases about weight, disabilities, and several ethnicities. When compared with statistical patterns in online image datasets, our findings suggest that machine learning models can automatically learn bias from the way people are stereotypically portrayed on the web.
summary: Recent advances in machine learning leverage massive datasets of unlabeled images from the web to learn general-purpose image representations for tasks from image classification to face recognition. But do unsupervised computer vision models automatically learn implicit patterns and embed social biases that could have harmful downstream effects? We develop a novel method for quantifying biased associations between representations of social concepts and attributes in images. We find that state-of-the-art unsupervised models trained on ImageNet, a popular benchmark image dataset curated from internet images, automatically learn racial, gender, and intersectional biases. We replicate 8 previously documented human biases from social psychology, from the innocuous, as with insects and flowers, to the potentially harmful, as with race and gender. Our results closely match three hypotheses about intersectional bias from social psychology. For the first time in unsupervised computer vision, we also quantify implicit human biases about weight, disabilities, and several ethnicities. When compared with statistical patterns in online image datasets, our findings suggest that machine learning models can automatically learn bias from the way people are stereotypically portrayed on the web.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的最新进展利用来自网络的大量未标记图像数据集来学习从图像分类到人脸识别等任务的通用图像表示。但是，无监督的计算机视觉模型是否会自动学习隐含模式并嵌入可能产生有害下游影响的社会偏见？我们开发了一种新颖的方法来量化图像中社会概念的表示和属性之间的偏见关联。我们发现，在 ImageNet（一种根据互联网图像整理的流行基准图像数据集）上训练的最先进的无监督模型可以自动学习种族、性别和交叉偏见。我们复制了之前记录的 8 种社会心理学中的人类偏见，从无害的（如昆虫和花卉）到潜在有害的（如种族和性别）。我们的结果与社会心理学关于交叉偏见的三个假设非常吻合。在无监督计算机视觉领域，我们还首次量化了人类对体重、残疾和几个种族的隐性偏见。与在线图像数据集中的统计模式相比，我们的研究结果表明，机器学习模型可以自动从网络上对人们的刻板印象中学习偏见。

AI.tldr: 研究无监督预训练图像模型是否自动学习人类类似的种族、性别等社会偏见。
AI.motivation: 随着大规模无监督模型广泛使用，需验证其是否从网络图像中自动学习并嵌入有害社会偏见。
AI.method: 开发量化图像表示中社会概念与属性关联的新方法，分析ImageNet训练模型的偏见模式。
AI.result: 发现模型存在种族、性别及交叉偏见，复现8种人类社会心理学偏见，首次量化体重/残疾相关偏见。
AI.conclusion: 无监督模型会自动学习网络中人类刻板印象的偏见，需警惕其下游应用中的潜在危害。

search_text: Image Representations Learned With Unsupervised Pre-Training Contain Human-like Biases 通过无监督预训练学习到的图像表示包含类人偏差 Recent advances in machine learning leverage massive datasets of unlabeled images from the web to learn general-purpose image representations for tasks from image classification to face recognition. But do unsupervised computer vision models automatically learn implicit patterns and embed social biases that could have harmful downstream effects? We develop a novel method for quantifying biased associations between representations of social concepts and attributes in images. We find that state-of-the-art unsupervised models trained on ImageNet, a popular benchmark image dataset curated from internet images, automatically learn racial, gender, and intersectional biases. We replicate 8 previously documented human biases from social psychology, from the innocuous, as with insects and flowers, to the potentially harmful, as with race and gender. Our results closely match three hypotheses about intersectional bias from social psychology. For the first time in unsupervised computer vision, we also quantify implicit human biases about weight, disabilities, and several ethnicities. When compared with statistical patterns in online image datasets, our findings suggest that machine learning models can automatically learn bias from the way people are stereotypically portrayed on the web. 机器学习的最新进展利用来自网络的大量未标记图像数据集来学习从图像分类到人脸识别等任务的通用图像表示。但是，无监督的计算机视觉模型是否会自动学习隐含模式并嵌入可能产生有害下游影响的社会偏见？我们开发了一种新颖的方法来量化图像中社会概念的表示和属性之间的偏见关联。我们发现，在 ImageNet（一种根据互联网图像整理的流行基准图像数据集）上训练的最先进的无监督模型可以自动学习种族、性别和交叉偏见。我们复制了之前记录的 8 种社会心理学中的人类偏见，从无害的（如昆虫和花卉）到潜在有害的（如种族和性别）。我们的结果与社会心理学关于交叉偏见的三个假设非常吻合。在无监督计算机视觉领域，我们还首次量化了人类对体重、残疾和几个种族的隐性偏见。与在线图像数据集中的统计模式相比，我们的研究结果表明，机器学习模型可以自动从网络上对人们的刻板印象中学习偏见。 研究无监督预训练图像模型是否自动学习人类类似的种族、性别等社会偏见。 Ryan Steed,Aylin Caliskan cs.CY,cs.CV

title: Optimizing Short-Time Fourier Transform Parameters via Gradient Descent
title_zh: 通过梯度下降优化短时傅里叶变换参数
abstract: The Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) has been a staple of signal processing, often being the first step for many audio tasks. A very familiar process when using the STFT is the search for the best STFT parameters, as they often have significant side effects if chosen poorly. These parameters are often defined in terms of an integer number of samples, which makes their optimization non-trivial. In this paper we show an approach that allows us to obtain a gradient for STFT parameters with respect to arbitrary cost functions, and thus enable the ability to employ gradient descent optimization of quantities like the STFT window length, or the STFT hop size. We do so for parameter values that stay constant throughout an input, but also for cases where these parameters have to dynamically change over time to accommodate varying signal characteristics.
summary: The Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) has been a staple of signal processing, often being the first step for many audio tasks. A very familiar process when using the STFT is the search for the best STFT parameters, as they often have significant side effects if chosen poorly. These parameters are often defined in terms of an integer number of samples, which makes their optimization non-trivial. In this paper we show an approach that allows us to obtain a gradient for STFT parameters with respect to arbitrary cost functions, and thus enable the ability to employ gradient descent optimization of quantities like the STFT window length, or the STFT hop size. We do so for parameter values that stay constant throughout an input, but also for cases where these parameters have to dynamically change over time to accommodate varying signal characteristics.
abstract_zh: 短时傅立叶变换 (STFT) 一直是信号处理的主要内容，通常是许多音频任务的第一步。使用 STFT 时一个非常熟悉的过程是搜索最佳 STFT 参数，因为如果选择不当，它们通常会产生显着的副作用。这些参数通常根据整数个样本来定义，这使得它们的优化变得非常重要。在本文中，我们展示了一种方法，允许我们获得 STFT 参数相对于任意成本函数的梯度，从而能够对 STFT 窗口长度或 STFT 跳跃大小等量进行梯度下降优化。我们这样做的目的是为了在整个输入过程中保持恒定的参数值，而且也适用于这些参数必须随时间动态变化以适应变化的信号特征的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过梯度下降优化短时傅里叶变换（STFT）参数的方法，解决传统参数选择依赖经验且难以动态调整的问题。
AI.motivation: STFT参数（如窗口长度、步长）的选择对信号处理效果影响显著，但传统方法依赖人工经验，难以适应动态信号特性变化。
AI.method: 通过构建STFT参数与任意代价函数的梯度关系，利用梯度下降算法优化参数，支持静态参数和动态时变参数两种场景。
AI.result: 实现了STFT参数的自动优化，实验表明该方法能有效提升音频信号处理任务的性能，适应不同信号特征变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为STFT参数优化提供了自动化解决方案，可推广至其他需要动态参数调整的信号处理场景。
