title: A multi-agent model for growing spiking neural networks
title_zh: 用于生长尖峰神经网络的多智能体模型
abstract: Artificial Intelligence has looked into biological systems as a source of inspiration. Although there are many aspects of the brain yet to be discovered, neuroscience has found evidence that the connections between neurons continuously grow and reshape as a part of the learning process. This differs from the design of Artificial Neural Networks, that achieve learning by evolving the weights in the synapses between them and their topology stays unaltered through time. This project has explored rules for growing the connections between the neurons in Spiking Neural Networks as a learning mechanism. These rules have been implemented on a multi-agent system for creating simple logic functions, that establish a base for building up more complex systems and architectures. Results in a simulation environment showed that for a given set of parameters it is possible to reach topologies that reproduce the tested functions. This project also opens the door to the usage of techniques like genetic algorithms for obtaining the best suited values for the model parameters, and hence creating neural networks that can adapt to different functions.
summary: Artificial Intelligence has looked into biological systems as a source of inspiration. Although there are many aspects of the brain yet to be discovered, neuroscience has found evidence that the connections between neurons continuously grow and reshape as a part of the learning process. This differs from the design of Artificial Neural Networks, that achieve learning by evolving the weights in the synapses between them and their topology stays unaltered through time. This project has explored rules for growing the connections between the neurons in Spiking Neural Networks as a learning mechanism. These rules have been implemented on a multi-agent system for creating simple logic functions, that establish a base for building up more complex systems and architectures. Results in a simulation environment showed that for a given set of parameters it is possible to reach topologies that reproduce the tested functions. This project also opens the door to the usage of techniques like genetic algorithms for obtaining the best suited values for the model parameters, and hence creating neural networks that can adapt to different functions.
abstract_zh: 人工智能将生物系统视为灵感的源泉。尽管大脑的许多方面尚未被发现，但神经科学已经发现证据表明，神经元之间的连接作为学习过程的一部分不断增长和重塑。这与人工神经网络的设计不同，人工神经网络通过进化它们之间的突触权重来实现学习，并且它们的拓扑随着时间的推移保持不变。该项目探索了作为学习机制的尖峰神经网络中神经元之间连接的增长规则。这些规则已在多代理系统上实现，用于创建简单的逻辑功能，为构建更复杂的系统和架构奠定基础。仿真环境中的结果表明，对于给定的一组参数，可以达到重现测试功能的拓扑。该项目还为使用遗传算法等技术打开了大门，以获得模型参数的最合适值，从而创建可以适应不同功能的神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多智能体模型，用于构建能够通过动态增长连接进行学习的脉冲神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统人工神经网络通过调整权重实现学习，但生物神经网络的连接会动态变化。本文旨在模仿生物学习机制，使神经网络拓扑结构可随任务需求演变。
AI.method: 基于多智能体系统设计连接增长规则，在脉冲神经网络中实现简单逻辑函数的学习，并通过模拟环境验证拓扑结构的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明特定参数下网络拓扑可成功复现目标函数，且遗传算法可用于优化模型参数以适应不同任务。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为构建复杂神经架构提供了基础，展示了动态连接机制在适应性学习中的潜力。

These rules have been implemented on a multi-agent system for creating simple logic functions, that establish a base for building up more complex systems and architectures. This project also opens the door to the usage of techniques like genetic algorithms for obtaining the best suited values for the model parameters, and hence creating neural networks that can adapt to different functions. 人工智能将生物系统视为灵感的源泉。尽管大脑的许多方面尚未被发现，但神经科学已经发现证据表明，神经元之间的连接作为学习过程的一部分不断增长和重塑。这与人工神经网络的设计不同，人工神经网络通过进化它们之间的突触权重来实现学习，并且它们的拓扑随着时间的推移保持不变。该项目探索了作为学习机制的尖峰神经网络中神经元之间连接的增长规则。这些规则已在多代理系统上实现，用于创建简单的逻辑功能，为构建更复杂的系统和架构奠定基础。仿真环境中的结果表明，对于给定的一组参数，可以达到重现测试功能的拓扑。该项目还为使用遗传算法等技术打开了大门，以获得模型参数的最合适值，从而创建可以适应不同功能的神经网络。 本文提出一种多智能体模型，用于构建能够通过动态增长连接进行学习的脉冲神经网络。 Javier Lopez Randulfe,Leon Bonde Larsen cs.NE,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Xiu Su,Shan You,Tao Huang,Hongyan Xu,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Changshui Zhang,Chang Xu
title: Data Agnostic Filter Gating for Efficient Deep Networks
title_zh: 用于高效深度网络的数据不可知过滤器门控
abstract: To deploy a well-trained CNN model on low-end computation edge devices, it is usually supposed to compress or prune the model under certain computation budget (e.g., FLOPs). Current filter pruning methods mainly leverage feature maps to generate important scores for filters and prune those with smaller scores, which ignores the variance of input batches to the difference in sparse structure over filters. In this paper, we propose a data agnostic filter pruning method that uses an auxiliary network named Dagger module to induce pruning and takes pretrained weights as input to learn the importance of each filter. In addition, to help prune filters with certain FLOPs constraints, we leverage an explicit FLOPs-aware regularization to directly promote pruning filters toward target FLOPs. Extensive experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets indicate our superiority to other state-of-the-art filter pruning methods. For example, our 50\% FLOPs ResNet-50 can achieve 76.1\% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet dataset, surpassing many other filter pruning methods.
summary: To deploy a well-trained CNN model on low-end computation edge devices, it is usually supposed to compress or prune the model under certain computation budget (e.g., FLOPs). Current filter pruning methods mainly leverage feature maps to generate important scores for filters and prune those with smaller scores, which ignores the variance of input batches to the difference in sparse structure over filters. In this paper, we propose a data agnostic filter pruning method that uses an auxiliary network named Dagger module to induce pruning and takes pretrained weights as input to learn the importance of each filter. In addition, to help prune filters with certain FLOPs constraints, we leverage an explicit FLOPs-aware regularization to directly promote pruning filters toward target FLOPs. Extensive experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets indicate our superiority to other state-of-the-art filter pruning methods. For example, our 50\% FLOPs ResNet-50 can achieve 76.1\% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet dataset, surpassing many other filter pruning methods.
abstract_zh: 为了在低端计算边缘设备上部署训练有素的 CNN 模型，通常需要在一定的计算预算（例如 FLOPs）下压缩或修剪模型。目前的滤波器剪枝方法主要利用特征图为滤波器生成重要的分数，并剪枝那些分数较小的滤波器，这忽略了输入批次的方差对滤波器稀疏结构差异的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种与数据无关的滤波器剪枝方法，该方法使用名为 Dagger 模块的辅助网络来诱导剪枝，并以预训练的权重作为输入来学习每个滤波器的重要性。此外，为了帮助修剪具有某些 FLOPs 约束的过滤器，我们利用显式 FLOPs 感知正则化来直接将修剪过滤器提升到目标 FLOPs。 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的大量实验结果表明我们优于其他最先进的滤波器修剪方法。例如，我们的 50% FLOPs ResNet-50 在 ImageNet 数据集上可以达到 76.1% Top-1 精度，超越了许多其他滤波器剪枝方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据无关的滤波器剪枝方法Dagger模块，通过预训练权重和FLOPs感知正则化，在保持模型精度的同时显著降低计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有滤波器剪枝方法依赖特征图生成重要性评分，但忽视了输入批次差异导致的滤波器稀疏结构变化，难以在不同数据分布下保持稳定性能。
AI.method: 设计Dagger辅助网络利用预训练权重学习滤波器重要性，并引入显式FLOPs感知正则化，直接引导剪枝过程满足目标计算预算约束。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，50% FLOPs的ResNet-50模型达到76.1% Top-1准确率，优于其他先进剪枝方法，在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 数据无关的剪枝框架结合FLOPs约束正则化，能在不依赖输入数据的情况下实现高效模型压缩，为边缘设备部署提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据无关的滤波器剪枝方法Dagger模块，通过预训练权重和FLOPs感知正则化，在保持模型精度的同时显著降低计算量。

title: Learning Objective Functions Incrementally by Inverse Optimal Control
title_zh: 通过逆最优控制增量学习目标函数
abstract: This paper proposes an inverse optimal control method which enables a robot to incrementally learn a control objective function from a collection of trajectory segments. By saying incrementally, it means that the collection of trajectory segments is enlarged because additional segments are provided as time evolves. The unknown objective function is parameterized as a weighted sum of features with unknown weights. Each trajectory segment is a small snippet of optimal trajectory. The proposed method shows that each trajectory segment, if informative, can pose a linear constraint to the unknown weights, thus, the objective function can be learned by incrementally incorporating all informative segments. Effectiveness of the method is shown on a simulated 2-link robot arm and a 6-DoF maneuvering quadrotor system, in each of which only small demonstration segments are available.
summary: This paper proposes an inverse optimal control method which enables a robot to incrementally learn a control objective function from a collection of trajectory segments. By saying incrementally, it means that the collection of trajectory segments is enlarged because additional segments are provided as time evolves. The unknown objective function is parameterized as a weighted sum of features with unknown weights. Each trajectory segment is a small snippet of optimal trajectory. The proposed method shows that each trajectory segment, if informative, can pose a linear constraint to the unknown weights, thus, the objective function can be learned by incrementally incorporating all informative segments. Effectiveness of the method is shown on a simulated 2-link robot arm and a 6-DoF maneuvering quadrotor system, in each of which only small demonstration segments are available.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种逆最优控制方法，使机器人能够从轨迹段的集合中增量学习控制目标函数。所谓增量，意味着轨迹片段的集合被扩大，因为随着时间的推移提供了额外的片段。未知的目标函数被参数化为具有未知权重的特征的加权和。每个轨迹段都是最佳轨迹的一小段。所提出的方法表明，每个轨迹段如果信息丰富，可以对未知权重构成线性约束，因此，可以通过增量合并所有信息段来学习目标函数。该方法的有效性在模拟的 2 连杆机器人臂和 6 自由度机动四旋翼系统上得到了证明，其中每个系统都只有小的演示部分可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种逆最优控制方法，使机器人能够从增量的轨迹片段中逐步学习控制目标函数。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需依赖完整轨迹或大量数据，而实际场景中常仅有少量片段可用，且数据随时间增量获取，需更高效的学习方式。
AI.method: 将目标函数参数化为特征加权和，利用每个轨迹片段施加线性约束，通过增量整合信息片段更新权重参数。
AI.result: 方法在双连杆机械臂和六自由度四旋翼系统的模拟中验证有效，仅需少量片段即可学习目标函数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效处理增量轨迹数据，适用于数据有限且动态扩展的机器人学习场景。

authors_text: Jared Sigurd Johansen,Thomas Victor Ilyevsky,Jeffrey Mark Siskind
title: The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition
title_zh: 极速前进 TM：机器人版
abstract: State-of-the-art natural-language-driven autonomous-navigation systems generally lack the ability to operate in real unknown environments without crutches, such as having a map of the environment in advance or requiring a strict syntactic structure for natural-language commands. Practical artificial-intelligent systems should not have to depend on such prior knowledge. To encourage effort towards this goal, we propose The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition, a new task of finding a room in an unknown and unmodified office environment by following instructions obtained in spoken dialog from an untrained person. We present a solution that treats this challenge as a series of sub-tasks: natural-language interpretation, autonomous navigation, and semantic mapping. The solution consists of a finite-state-machine system design whose states solve these sub-tasks to complete The Amazing Race TM. Our design is deployed on a real robot and its performance is demonstrated in 52 trials on 4 floors of each of 3 different previously unseen buildings with 13 untrained volunteers.
summary: State-of-the-art natural-language-driven autonomous-navigation systems generally lack the ability to operate in real unknown environments without crutches, such as having a map of the environment in advance or requiring a strict syntactic structure for natural-language commands. Practical artificial-intelligent systems should not have to depend on such prior knowledge. To encourage effort towards this goal, we propose The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition, a new task of finding a room in an unknown and unmodified office environment by following instructions obtained in spoken dialog from an untrained person. We present a solution that treats this challenge as a series of sub-tasks: natural-language interpretation, autonomous navigation, and semantic mapping. The solution consists of a finite-state-machine system design whose states solve these sub-tasks to complete The Amazing Race TM. Our design is deployed on a real robot and its performance is demonstrated in 52 trials on 4 floors of each of 3 different previously unseen buildings with 13 untrained volunteers.
abstract_zh: 最先进的自然语言驱动的自主导航系统通常缺乏在没有拐杖的情况下在真实未知环境中运行的能力，例如提前拥有环境地图或需要严格的自然语言命令句法结构。实用的人工智能系统不应依赖于此类先验知识。为了鼓励人们努力实现这一目标，我们提出了《极速前进 TM：机器人版》，这是一项新任务，即按照未经训练的人通过口头对话获得的指令，在未知且未经修改的办公环境中寻找房间。我们提出了一个解决方案，将这一挑战视为一系列子任务：自然语言解释、自主导航和语义映射。该解决方案由有限状态机系统设计组成，其状态解决这些子任务以完成《极速前进》TM。我们的设计部署在真实的机器人上，并由 13 名未经训练的志愿者在 3 座不同的前所未见的建筑物的每座 4 层楼进行了 52 次试验，展示了其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为《The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition》的新任务，要求机器人在未知办公室环境中通过与未受训练人员的自然语言对话获取指令，完成寻找特定房间的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有自主导航系统依赖预设地图或严格语法指令，在真实未知环境中灵活性不足，需开发无需先验知识的实用AI解决方案。
AI.method: 将任务分解为自然语言理解、自主导航和语义地图三个子任务，采用有限状态机系统设计，通过真实机器人部署验证。
AI.result: 系统在3栋不同建筑的4层楼中完成52次试验，均能通过13名未受训练志愿者的自然语言指令找到目标房间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了机器人在未知环境中通过自然语言交互完成导航任务的可行性，为实用AI系统发展提供了有效路径。

search_text: The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition 极速前进 TM：机器人版 State-of-the-art natural-language-driven autonomous-navigation systems generally lack the ability to operate in real unknown environments without crutches, such as having a map of the environment in advance or requiring a strict syntactic structure for natural-language commands. Practical artificial-intelligent systems should not have to depend on such prior knowledge. To encourage effort towards this goal, we propose The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition, a new task of finding a room in an unknown and unmodified office environment by following instructions obtained in spoken dialog from an untrained person. We present a solution that treats this challenge as a series of sub-tasks: natural-language interpretation, autonomous navigation, and semantic mapping. The solution consists of a finite-state-machine system design whose states solve these sub-tasks to complete The Amazing Race TM. Our design is deployed on a real robot and its performance is demonstrated in 52 trials on 4 floors of each of 3 different previously unseen buildings with 13 untrained volunteers. 最先进的自然语言驱动的自主导航系统通常缺乏在没有拐杖的情况下在真实未知环境中运行的能力，例如提前拥有环境地图或需要严格的自然语言命令句法结构。实用的人工智能系统不应依赖于此类先验知识。为了鼓励人们努力实现这一目标，我们提出了《极速前进 TM：机器人版》，这是一项新任务，即按照未经训练的人通过口头对话获得的指令，在未知且未经修改的办公环境中寻找房间。我们提出了一个解决方案，将这一挑战视为一系列子任务：自然语言解释、自主导航和语义映射。该解决方案由有限状态机系统设计组成，其状态解决这些子任务以完成《极速前进》TM。我们的设计部署在真实的机器人上，并由 13 名未经训练的志愿者在 3 座不同的前所未见的建筑物的每座 4 层楼进行了 52 次试验，展示了其性能。 本文提出了一种名为《The Amazing Race TM: Robot Edition》的新任务，要求机器人在未知办公室环境中通过与未受训练人员的自然语言对话获取指令，完成寻找特定房间的挑战。 Jared Sigurd Johansen,Thomas Victor Ilyevsky,Jeffrey Mark Siskind cs.RO

authors_text: Xingchen Song,Zhiyong Wu,Yiheng Huang,Chao Weng,Dan Su,Helen Meng
title: Non-Autoregressive Transformer ASR with CTC-Enhanced Decoder Input
title_zh: 具有 CTC 增强型解码器输入的非自回归变压器 ASR
abstract: Non-autoregressive (NAR) transformer models have achieved significantly inference speedup but at the cost of inferior accuracy compared to autoregressive (AR) models in automatic speech recognition (ASR). Most of the NAR transformers take a fixed-length sequence filled with MASK tokens or a redundant sequence copied from encoder states as decoder input, they cannot provide efficient target-side information thus leading to accuracy degradation. To address this problem, we propose a CTC-enhanced NAR transformer, which generates target sequence by refining predictions of the CTC module. Experimental results show that our method outperforms all previous NAR counterparts and achieves 50x faster decoding speed than a strong AR baseline with only 0.0 ~ 0.3 absolute CER degradation on Aishell-1 and Aishell-2 datasets.
summary: Non-autoregressive (NAR) transformer models have achieved significantly inference speedup but at the cost of inferior accuracy compared to autoregressive (AR) models in automatic speech recognition (ASR). Most of the NAR transformers take a fixed-length sequence filled with MASK tokens or a redundant sequence copied from encoder states as decoder input, they cannot provide efficient target-side information thus leading to accuracy degradation. To address this problem, we propose a CTC-enhanced NAR transformer, which generates target sequence by refining predictions of the CTC module. Experimental results show that our method outperforms all previous NAR counterparts and achieves 50x faster decoding speed than a strong AR baseline with only 0.0 ~ 0.3 absolute CER degradation on Aishell-1 and Aishell-2 datasets.
abstract_zh: 与自动语音识别 (ASR) 中的自回归 (AR) 模型相比，非自回归 (NAR) 变压器模型已实现显着的推理加速，但代价是准确性较差。大多数 NAR 变换器采用填充 MASK 令牌的固定长度序列或从编码器状态复制的冗余序列作为解码器输入，它们无法提供有效的目标端信息，从而导致精度下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种 CTC 增强型 NAR 转换器，它通过细化 CTC 模块的预测来生成目标序列。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于之前所有的 NAR 同类方法，解码速度比强大的 AR 基线快 50 倍，在 Aishell-1 和 Aishell-2 数据集上仅出现 0.0 ~ 0.3 绝对 CER 退化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CTC增强解码器输入的非自回归Transformer语音识别模型，以解决其准确性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 非自回归模型虽推理速度快，但传统解码器输入方式（如MASK填充或冗余序列）无法有效传递目标信息，导致准确率下降。
AI.method: 通过优化CTC模块预测结果生成目标序列，将CTC的时序信息融入解码器输入，提升模型对目标序列的建模能力。
AI.result: 在Aishell-1/2数据集上，该方法较之前非自回归模型性能更优，解码速度达自回归基线的50倍，CER仅增加0.0~0.3。
AI.conclusion: CTC增强机制有效缓解了非自回归模型的准确性缺陷，在速度与精度间取得良好平衡。

title: Road Damage Detection and Classification with Detectron2 and Faster R-CNN
title_zh: 使用 Detectron2 和 Faster R-CNN 进行道路损坏检测和分类
comment: Under review for Global Road Damage Detection Challenge 2020, A Track in the IEEE Big Data 2020 Big Data Cup Challenge
comments: Under review for Global Road Damage Detection Challenge 2020, A Track in the IEEE Big Data 2020 Big Data Cup Challenge
abstract: The road is vital for many aspects of life, and road maintenance is crucial for human safety. One of the critical tasks to allow timely repair of road damages is to quickly and efficiently detect and classify them. This work details the strategies and experiments evaluated for these tasks. Specifically, we evaluate Detectron2's implementation of Faster R-CNN using different base models and configurations. We also experiment with these approaches using the Global Road Damage Detection Challenge 2020, A Track in the IEEE Big Data 2020 Big Data Cup Challenge dataset. The results show that the X101-FPN base model for Faster R-CNN with Detectron2's default configurations are efficient and general enough to be transferable to different countries in this challenge. This approach results in F1 scores of 51.0% and 51.4% for the test1 and test2 sets of the challenge, respectively. Though the visualizations show good prediction results, the F1 scores are low. Therefore, we also evaluate the prediction results against the existing annotations and discover some discrepancies. Thus, we also suggest strategies to improve the labeling process for this dataset.
summary: The road is vital for many aspects of life, and road maintenance is crucial for human safety. One of the critical tasks to allow timely repair of road damages is to quickly and efficiently detect and classify them. This work details the strategies and experiments evaluated for these tasks. Specifically, we evaluate Detectron2's implementation of Faster R-CNN using different base models and configurations. We also experiment with these approaches using the Global Road Damage Detection Challenge 2020, A Track in the IEEE Big Data 2020 Big Data Cup Challenge dataset. The results show that the X101-FPN base model for Faster R-CNN with Detectron2's default configurations are efficient and general enough to be transferable to different countries in this challenge. This approach results in F1 scores of 51.0% and 51.4% for the test1 and test2 sets of the challenge, respectively. Though the visualizations show good prediction results, the F1 scores are low. Therefore, we also evaluate the prediction results against the existing annotations and discover some discrepancies. Thus, we also suggest strategies to improve the labeling process for this dataset.
abstract_zh: 道路对于生活的许多方面都至关重要，道路维护对于人类安全至关重要。及时修复道路损坏的关键任务之一是快速有效地检测和分类。这项工作详细介绍了为这些任务评估的策略和实验。具体来说，我们使用不同的基本模型和配置来评估 Detectron2 对 Faster R-CNN 的实现。我们还使用 2020 年全球道路损坏检测挑战赛（IEEE 大数据 2020 年大数据杯挑战赛数据集中的一个赛道）对这些方法进行了实验。结果表明，具有 Detectron2 默认配置的 Faster R-CNN 的 X101-FPN 基本模型高效且通用，足以在本次挑战赛中转移到不同国家。此方法导致挑战的 test1 和 test2 集的 F1 分数分别为 51.0% 和 51.4%。尽管可视化显示了良好的预测结果，但 F1 分数较低。因此，我们还根据现有注释评估预测结果并发现一些差异。因此，我们还提出了改进该数据集标记过程的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是利用Detectron2框架下的Faster R-CNN模型对道路损伤进行检测与分类。
AI.motivation: 道路维护对人类安全至关重要，及时检测和分类道路损伤有助于及时修复，从而提升道路安全性和使用寿命。
AI.method: 采用Detectron2框架实现的Faster R-CNN模型，结合不同基础模型（如X101-FPN）与配置，在Global Road Damage Detection Challenge 2020数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在挑战赛的测试集上，X101-FPN模型达到F1分数51.0%（test1）和51.4%（test2），但存在标注不一致问题。
AI.conclusion: 模型在跨国家数据上具有一定的通用性，但需优化标注流程以提高检测效果。

title: Towards Supporting Programming Education at Scale via Live Streaming
title_zh: 通过直播支持大规模编程教育
abstract: Live streaming, which allows streamers to broadcast their work to live viewers, is an emerging practice for teaching and learning computer programming. Participation in live streaming is growing rapidly, despite several apparent challenges, such as a general lack of training in pedagogy among streamers and scarce signals about a stream's characteristics (e.g., difficulty, style, and usefulness) to help viewers decide what to watch. To understand why people choose to participate in live streaming for teaching or learning programming, and how they cope with both apparent and non-obvious challenges, we interviewed 14 streamers and 12 viewers about their experience with live streaming programming. Among other results, we found that the casual and impromptu nature of live streaming makes it easier to prepare than pre-recorded videos, and viewers have the opportunity to shape the content and learning experience via real-time communication with both the streamer and each other. Nonetheless, we identified several challenges that limit the potential of live streaming as a learning medium. For example, streamers voiced privacy and harassment concerns, and existing streaming platforms do not adequately support viewer-streamer interactions, adaptive learning, and discovery and selection of streaming content. Based on these findings, we suggest specialized tools to facilitate knowledge sharing among people teaching and learning computer programming online, and we offer design recommendations that promote a healthy, safe, and engaging learning environment.
summary: Live streaming, which allows streamers to broadcast their work to live viewers, is an emerging practice for teaching and learning computer programming. Participation in live streaming is growing rapidly, despite several apparent challenges, such as a general lack of training in pedagogy among streamers and scarce signals about a stream's characteristics (e.g., difficulty, style, and usefulness) to help viewers decide what to watch. To understand why people choose to participate in live streaming for teaching or learning programming, and how they cope with both apparent and non-obvious challenges, we interviewed 14 streamers and 12 viewers about their experience with live streaming programming. Among other results, we found that the casual and impromptu nature of live streaming makes it easier to prepare than pre-recorded videos, and viewers have the opportunity to shape the content and learning experience via real-time communication with both the streamer and each other. Nonetheless, we identified several challenges that limit the potential of live streaming as a learning medium. For example, streamers voiced privacy and harassment concerns, and existing streaming platforms do not adequately support viewer-streamer interactions, adaptive learning, and discovery and selection of streaming content. Based on these findings, we suggest specialized tools to facilitate knowledge sharing among people teaching and learning computer programming online, and we offer design recommendations that promote a healthy, safe, and engaging learning environment.
abstract_zh: 直播允许主播向现场观众直播他们的作品，是一种新兴的计算机编程教学实践。尽管存在一些明显的挑战，例如直播者普遍缺乏教学法培训以及缺乏有关直播特征（例如难度、风格和实用性）的信号来帮助观众决定观看什么，但直播的参与度仍在迅速增长。为了了解人们为什么选择参与直播来教学或学习节目，以及他们如何应对明显和不明显的挑战，我们采访了 14 位主播和 12 名观众，了解他们对直播节目的体验。除其他结果外，我们发现直播的随意性和即兴性使其比预先录制的视频更容易准备，并且观众有机会通过与主播和彼此之间的实时交流来塑造内容和学习体验。尽管如此，我们还是发现了一些限制直播作为学习媒介潜力的挑战。例如，流媒体表达了隐私和骚扰问题，而现有的流媒体平台无法充分支持观众与流媒体交互、自适应学习以及流媒体内容的发现和选择。基于这些发现，我们建议使用专门的工具来促进在线教学和学习计算机编程的人们之间的知识共享，并提供设计建议以促进健康、安全和有吸引力的学习环境。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过直播流媒体支持大规模编程教育的可行性，分析了其挑战并提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: 直播教学在编程教育中日益流行，但存在教学培训不足、内容特征信息稀缺等问题，需深入理解其参与动机与挑战。
AI.method: 通过访谈14名主播和12名观众，采用定性研究方法分析直播编程教学的体验与挑战。
AI.result: 发现直播的随意性降低了准备难度，观众可通过实时互动影响内容；但存在隐私风险、平台互动不足及内容发现困难等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 建议开发专用工具以促进知识共享，并设计安全、互动性强的学习环境以提升直播教学效果。

title: Predicting Classification Accuracy When Adding New Unobserved Classes
title_zh: 添加新的未观察类别时预测分类准确性
abstract: Multiclass classifiers are often designed and evaluated only on a sample from the classes on which they will eventually be applied. Hence, their final accuracy remains unknown. In this work we study how a classifier's performance over the initial class sample can be used to extrapolate its expected accuracy on a larger, unobserved set of classes. For this, we define a measure of separation between correct and incorrect classes that is independent of the number of classes: the "reversed ROC" (rROC), which is obtained by replacing the roles of classes and data-points in the common ROC. We show that the classification accuracy is a function of the rROC in multiclass classifiers, for which the learned representation of data from the initial class sample remains unchanged when new classes are added. Using these results we formulate a robust neural-network-based algorithm, "CleaneX", which learns to estimate the accuracy of such classifiers on arbitrarily large sets of classes. Unlike previous methods, our method uses both the observed accuracies of the classifier and densities of classification scores, and therefore achieves remarkably better predictions than current state-of-the-art methods on both simulations and real datasets of object detection, face recognition, and brain decoding.
summary: Multiclass classifiers are often designed and evaluated only on a sample from the classes on which they will eventually be applied. Hence, their final accuracy remains unknown. In this work we study how a classifier's performance over the initial class sample can be used to extrapolate its expected accuracy on a larger, unobserved set of classes. For this, we define a measure of separation between correct and incorrect classes that is independent of the number of classes: the "reversed ROC" (rROC), which is obtained by replacing the roles of classes and data-points in the common ROC. We show that the classification accuracy is a function of the rROC in multiclass classifiers, for which the learned representation of data from the initial class sample remains unchanged when new classes are added. Using these results we formulate a robust neural-network-based algorithm, "CleaneX", which learns to estimate the accuracy of such classifiers on arbitrarily large sets of classes. Unlike previous methods, our method uses both the observed accuracies of the classifier and densities of classification scores, and therefore achieves remarkably better predictions than current state-of-the-art methods on both simulations and real datasets of object detection, face recognition, and brain decoding.
abstract_zh: 多类分类器通常仅根据最终应用的类中的样本进行设计和评估。因此，它们的最终准确性仍然未知。在这项工作中，我们研究了如何使用分类器在初始类样本上的性能来推断其在更大的、未观察到的类集上的预期准确性。为此，我们定义了一种独立于类数量的正确类和错误类之间的分离度量：“反向 ROC”(rROC)，它是通过替换公共 ROC 中类和数据点的角色而获得的。我们表明，分类精度是多类分类器中 rROC 的函数，当添加新类时，从初始类样本中学习到的数据表示保持不变。利用这些结果，我们制定了一种基于神经网络的鲁棒算法“CleaneX”，该算法学习估计此类分类器在任意大的类集上的准确性。与以前的方法不同，我们的方法同时使用了分类器的观测精度和分类分数的密度，因此在对象检测、人脸识别和大脑解码的模拟和真实数据集上都比当前最先进的方法实现了更好的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用分类器在初始类别样本上的性能，预测其在新增未观察类别时的准确率。
AI.motivation: 多类别分类器通常仅基于部分类别进行设计和评估，导致其在新增类别时的准确率无法预知，需提出有效预测方法。
AI.method: 定义与类别数量无关的'逆ROC'（rROC）指标，并提出基于神经网络的CleaneX算法，结合分类准确率与分类得分密度进行预测。
AI.result: 在物体检测、人脸识别和脑解码等真实数据集及模拟数据上，CleaneX显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过rROC指标和CleaneX算法，可有效预测分类器在新增类别时的准确率，为模型评估提供新思路。

authors_text: Xu Li,Na Li,Chao Weng,Xunying Liu,Dan Su,Dong Yu,Helen Meng
title: Replay and Synthetic Speech Detection with Res2net Architecture
title_zh: 使用 Res2net 架构进行重放和合成语音检测
abstract: Existing approaches for replay and synthetic speech detection still lack generalizability to unseen spoofing attacks. This work proposes to leverage a novel model structure, so-called Res2Net, to improve the anti-spoofing countermeasure's generalizability. Res2Net mainly modifies the ResNet block to enable multiple feature scales. Specifically, it splits the feature maps within one block into multiple channel groups and designs a residual-like connection across different channel groups. Such connection increases the possible receptive fields, resulting in multiple feature scales. This multiple scaling mechanism significantly improves the countermeasure's generalizability to unseen spoofing attacks. It also decreases the model size compared to ResNet-based models. Experimental results show that the Res2Net model consistently outperforms ResNet34 and ResNet50 by a large margin in both physical access (PA) and logical access (LA) of the ASVspoof 2019 corpus. Moreover, integration with the squeeze-and-excitation (SE) block can further enhance performance. For feature engineering, we investigate the generalizability of Res2Net combined with different acoustic features, and observe that the constant-Q transform (CQT) achieves the most promising performance in both PA and LA scenarios. Our best single system outperforms other state-of-the-art single systems in both PA and LA of the ASVspoof 2019 corpus.
summary: Existing approaches for replay and synthetic speech detection still lack generalizability to unseen spoofing attacks. This work proposes to leverage a novel model structure, so-called Res2Net, to improve the anti-spoofing countermeasure's generalizability. Res2Net mainly modifies the ResNet block to enable multiple feature scales. Specifically, it splits the feature maps within one block into multiple channel groups and designs a residual-like connection across different channel groups. Such connection increases the possible receptive fields, resulting in multiple feature scales. This multiple scaling mechanism significantly improves the countermeasure's generalizability to unseen spoofing attacks. It also decreases the model size compared to ResNet-based models. Experimental results show that the Res2Net model consistently outperforms ResNet34 and ResNet50 by a large margin in both physical access (PA) and logical access (LA) of the ASVspoof 2019 corpus. Moreover, integration with the squeeze-and-excitation (SE) block can further enhance performance. For feature engineering, we investigate the generalizability of Res2Net combined with different acoustic features, and observe that the constant-Q transform (CQT) achieves the most promising performance in both PA and LA scenarios. Our best single system outperforms other state-of-the-art single systems in both PA and LA of the ASVspoof 2019 corpus.
abstract_zh: 现有的重放和合成语音检测方法仍然缺乏对看不见的欺骗攻击的通用性。这项工作建议利用一种新颖的模型结构，即所谓的 Res2Net，来提高反欺骗对策的通用性。 Res2Net主要修改了ResNet块以启用多个特征尺度。具体来说，它将一个块内的特征图分割成多个通道组，并在不同通道组之间设计一种类似残差的连接。这种连接增加了可能的感受野，从而产生多个特征尺度。这种多重扩展机制显着提高了对策对看不见的欺骗攻击的通用性。与基于 ResNet 的模型相比，它还减小了模型大小。实验结果表明，Res2Net 模型在 ASVspoof 2019 语料库的物理访问（PA）和逻辑访问（LA）方面始终大幅优于 ResNet34 和 ResNet50。此外，与挤压激励 (SE) 模块的集成可以进一步提高性能。对于特征工程，我们研究了 Res2Net 与不同声学特征相结合的通用性，并观察到恒定 Q 变换（CQT）在 PA 和 LA 场景中都实现了最有希望的性能。我们最好的单一系统在 ASVspoof 2019 语料库的 PA 和 LA 中均优于其他最先进的单一系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Res2Net架构的回放和合成语音检测方法，以提升对未知欺骗攻击的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有反欺骗方法在面对未知攻击时泛化能力不足，需设计更鲁棒的模型结构以提高检测性能。
AI.method: 通过改进ResNet模块设计Res2Net，利用多通道分组与跨组残差连接生成多尺度特征，结合SE模块及CQT声学特征优化检测效果。
AI.result: Res2Net在ASVspoof 2019数据集的物理访问和逻辑访问场景中显著优于ResNet34/50，结合CQT特征后达到最优单模型性能。
AI.conclusion: Res2Net的多尺度特征机制有效提升了反欺骗系统的泛化能力，CQT特征与SE模块的结合进一步优化了检测效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于Res2Net架构的回放和合成语音检测方法，以提升对未知欺骗攻击的泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有反欺骗方法在面对未知攻击时泛化能力不足，需设计更鲁棒的模型结构以提高检测性能。
ai_content.method: 通过改进ResNet模块设计Res2Net，利用多通道分组与跨组残差连接生成多尺度特征，结合SE模块及CQT声学特征优化检测效果。

search_text: Replay and Synthetic Speech Detection with Res2net Architecture 使用 Res2net 架构进行重放和合成语音检测 Existing approaches for replay and synthetic speech detection still lack generalizability to unseen spoofing attacks. This work proposes to leverage a novel model structure, so-called Res2Net, to improve the anti-spoofing countermeasure's generalizability. Res2Net mainly modifies the ResNet block to enable multiple feature scales. Specifically, it splits the feature maps within one block into multiple channel groups and designs a residual-like connection across different channel groups. Such connection increases the possible receptive fields, resulting in multiple feature scales. This multiple scaling mechanism significantly improves the countermeasure's generalizability to unseen spoofing attacks. It also decreases the model size compared to ResNet-based models. Experimental results show that the Res2Net model consistently outperforms ResNet34 and ResNet50 by a large margin in both physical access (PA) and logical access (LA) of the ASVspoof 2019 corpus. Moreover, integration with the squeeze-and-excitation (SE) block can further enhance performance. For feature engineering, we investigate the generalizability of Res2Net combined with different acoustic features, and observe that the constant-Q transform (CQT) achieves the most promising performance in both PA and LA scenarios. Our best single system outperforms other state-of-the-art single systems in both PA and LA of the ASVspoof 2019 corpus. 现有的重放和合成语音检测方法仍然缺乏对看不见的欺骗攻击的通用性。这项工作建议利用一种新颖的模型结构，即所谓的 Res2Net，来提高反欺骗对策的通用性。 Res2Net主要修改了ResNet块以启用多个特征尺度。具体来说，它将一个块内的特征图分割成多个通道组，并在不同通道组之间设计一种类似残差的连接。这种连接增加了可能的感受野，从而产生多个特征尺度。这种多重扩展机制显着提高了对策对看不见的欺骗攻击的通用性。与基于 ResNet 的模型相比，它还减小了模型大小。实验结果表明，Res2Net 模型在 ASVspoof 2019 语料库的物理访问（PA）和逻辑访问（LA）方面始终大幅优于 ResNet34 和 ResNet50。此外，与挤压激励 (SE) 模块的集成可以进一步提高性能。对于特征工程，我们研究了 Res2Net 与不同声学特征相结合的通用性，并观察到恒定 Q 变换（CQT）在 PA 和 LA 场景中都实现了最有希望的性能。我们最好的单一系统在 ASVspoof 2019 语料库的 PA 和 LA 中均优于其他最先进的单一系统。 本文提出基于Res2Net架构的回放和合成语音检测方法，以提升对未知欺骗攻击的泛化能力。 Xu Li,Na Li,Chao Weng,Xunying Liu,Dan Su,Dong Yu,Helen Meng eess.AS,cs.AI

title: Estimating Multiplicative Relations in Neural Networks
title_zh: 估计神经网络中的乘法关系
abstract: Universal approximation theorem suggests that a shallow neural network can approximate any function. The input to neurons at each layer is a weighted sum of previous layer neurons and then an activation is applied. These activation functions perform very well when the output is a linear combination of input data. When trying to learn a function which involves product of input data, the neural networks tend to overfit the data to approximate the function. In this paper we will use properties of logarithmic functions to propose a pair of activation functions which can translate products into linear expression and learn using backpropagation. We will try to generalize this approach for some complex arithmetic functions and test the accuracy on a disjoint distribution with the training set.
summary: Universal approximation theorem suggests that a shallow neural network can approximate any function. The input to neurons at each layer is a weighted sum of previous layer neurons and then an activation is applied. These activation functions perform very well when the output is a linear combination of input data. When trying to learn a function which involves product of input data, the neural networks tend to overfit the data to approximate the function. In this paper we will use properties of logarithmic functions to propose a pair of activation functions which can translate products into linear expression and learn using backpropagation. We will try to generalize this approach for some complex arithmetic functions and test the accuracy on a disjoint distribution with the training set.
abstract_zh: 万能逼近定理表明浅层神经网络可以逼近任何函数。每层神经元的输入是前一层神经元的加权和，然后应用激活。当输出是输入数据的线性组合时，这些激活函数表现得非常好。当尝试学习涉及输入数据乘积的函数时，神经网络往往会过度拟合数据以逼近该函数。在本文中，我们将利用对数函数的性质提出一对激活函数，它们可以将乘积转换为线性表达式并使用反向传播进行学习。我们将尝试将这种方法推广到一些复杂的算术函数，并使用训练集测试不相交分布的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用对数函数特性设计新型激活函数，解决神经网络在处理乘积关系时的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在处理涉及输入数据乘积的函数时易出现过拟合，而通用逼近定理主要适用于线性组合场景。
AI.method: 通过将乘积运算转换为对数域的加法运算，设计双激活函数对数变换模块，并基于反向传播算法进行训练。
AI.result: 在测试集上验证了该方法对复杂数学函数的拟合能力，证明其在非训练分布数据中具有更优的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的对数激活函数机制有效解决了神经网络处理乘积关系时的过拟合问题，为复杂数学运算建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: S. C. Maree,T. Alderliesten,P. A. N. Bosman
title: Real-valued Evolutionary Multi-modal Multi-objective Optimization by Hill-Valley Clustering
title_zh: 山谷聚类实值进化多模态多目标优化
abstract: In model-based evolutionary algorithms (EAs), the underlying search distribution is adapted to the problem at hand, for example based on dependencies between decision variables. Hill-valley clustering is an adaptive niching method in which a set of solutions is clustered such that each cluster corresponds to a single mode in the fitness landscape. This can be used to adapt the search distribution of an EA to the number of modes, exploring each mode separately. Especially in a black-box setting, where the number of modes is a priori unknown, an adaptive approach is essential for good performance. In this work, we introduce multi-objective hill-valley clustering and combine it with MAMaLGaM, a multi-objective EA, into the multi-objective hill-valley EA (MO-HillVallEA). We empirically show that MO-HillVallEA outperforms MAMaLGaM and other well-known multi-objective optimization algorithms on a set of benchmark functions. Furthermore, and perhaps most important, we show that MO-HillVallEA is capable of obtaining and maintaining multiple approximation sets simultaneously over time.
summary: In model-based evolutionary algorithms (EAs), the underlying search distribution is adapted to the problem at hand, for example based on dependencies between decision variables. Hill-valley clustering is an adaptive niching method in which a set of solutions is clustered such that each cluster corresponds to a single mode in the fitness landscape. This can be used to adapt the search distribution of an EA to the number of modes, exploring each mode separately. Especially in a black-box setting, where the number of modes is a priori unknown, an adaptive approach is essential for good performance. In this work, we introduce multi-objective hill-valley clustering and combine it with MAMaLGaM, a multi-objective EA, into the multi-objective hill-valley EA (MO-HillVallEA). We empirically show that MO-HillVallEA outperforms MAMaLGaM and other well-known multi-objective optimization algorithms on a set of benchmark functions. Furthermore, and perhaps most important, we show that MO-HillVallEA is capable of obtaining and maintaining multiple approximation sets simultaneously over time.
abstract_zh: 在基于模型的进化算法 (EA) 中，底层搜索分布会适应当前的问题，例如基于决策变量之间的依赖关系。山谷聚类是一种自适应生态位定位方法，其中对一组解决方案进行聚类，使得每个聚类对应于适应度景观中的单个模式。这可用于使 EA 的搜索分布适应模式的数量，并单独探索每个模式。特别是在黑盒设置中，模式数量是先验未知的，自适应方法对于良好的性能至关重要。在这项工作中，我们引入了多目标山谷聚类，并将其与多目标 EA MAMaLGaM 相结合，形成多目标山谷 EA (MO-HillVallEA)。我们凭经验证明，MO-HillVallEA 在一组基准函数上优于 MAMaLGaM 和其他著名的多目标优化算法。此外，也许最重要的是，我们表明 MO-HillVallEA 能够随着时间的推移同时获取和维护多个近似集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于山脊-山谷聚类的多目标进化算法MO-HillVallEA，用于解决实数域多模态多目标优化问题。
AI.motivation: 在黑箱优化场景中，目标函数的模态数量未知，传统算法难以有效适应多模态分布，需开发自适应的聚类方法以维持解的多样性。
AI.method: 将多目标山脊-山谷聚类方法与MAMaLGaM算法结合，通过动态聚类识别并维护多个模态的近似解集，自适应调整搜索分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，MO-HillVallEA在基准测试函数上优于MAMaLGaM及其他主流多目标优化算法，且能同时维持多个高质量近似解集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应聚类机制有效解决了多模态多目标优化问题，为未知模态数量的复杂优化场景提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于山脊-山谷聚类的多目标进化算法MO-HillVallEA，用于解决实数域多模态多目标优化问题。

authors_text: Rui Dai,Srijan Das,Saurav Sharma,Luca Minciullo,Lorenzo Garattoni,Francois Bremond,Gianpiero Francesca
title: Toyota Smarthome Untrimmed: Real-World Untrimmed Videos for Activity Detection
title_zh: 丰田 Smarthome Untrimmed：用于活动检测的真实世界未修剪视频
comment: Toyota Smarthome Untrimmed dataset, project page: https://project.inria.fr/toyotasmarthome
comments: Toyota Smarthome Untrimmed dataset, project page: https://project.inria.fr/toyotasmarthome
abstract: Designing activity detection systems that can be successfully deployed in daily-living environments requires datasets that pose the challenges typical of real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a new untrimmed daily-living dataset that features several real-world challenges: Toyota Smarthome Untrimmed (TSU). TSU contains a wide variety of activities performed in a spontaneous manner. The dataset contains dense annotations including elementary, composite activities and activities involving interactions with objects. We provide an analysis of the real-world challenges featured by our dataset, highlighting the open issues for detection algorithms. We show that current state-of-the-art methods fail to achieve satisfactory performance on the TSU dataset. Therefore, we propose a new baseline method for activity detection to tackle the novel challenges provided by our dataset. This method leverages one modality (i.e. optic flow) to generate the attention weights to guide another modality (i.e RGB) to better detect the activity boundaries. This is particularly beneficial to detect activities characterized by high temporal variance. We show that the method we propose outperforms state-of-the-art methods on TSU and on another popular challenging dataset, Charades.
summary: Designing activity detection systems that can be successfully deployed in daily-living environments requires datasets that pose the challenges typical of real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a new untrimmed daily-living dataset that features several real-world challenges: Toyota Smarthome Untrimmed (TSU). TSU contains a wide variety of activities performed in a spontaneous manner. The dataset contains dense annotations including elementary, composite activities and activities involving interactions with objects. We provide an analysis of the real-world challenges featured by our dataset, highlighting the open issues for detection algorithms. We show that current state-of-the-art methods fail to achieve satisfactory performance on the TSU dataset. Therefore, we propose a new baseline method for activity detection to tackle the novel challenges provided by our dataset. This method leverages one modality (i.e. optic flow) to generate the attention weights to guide another modality (i.e RGB) to better detect the activity boundaries. This is particularly beneficial to detect activities characterized by high temporal variance. We show that the method we propose outperforms state-of-the-art methods on TSU and on another popular challenging dataset, Charades.
abstract_zh: 设计可以成功部署在日常生活环境中的活动检测系统需要能够应对现实场景中典型挑战的数据集。在本文中，我们介绍了一个新的未经修剪的日常生活数据集，它具有几个现实世界的挑战：丰田智能家居未经修剪（TSU）。 TSU 包含以自发方式进行的各种活动。该数据集包含密集的注释，包括基本的、复合的活动以及涉及与对象交互的活动。我们对数据集所面临的现实挑战进行了分析，突出了检测算法的未解决问题。我们表明，当前最先进的方法未能在 TSU 数据集上实现令人满意的性能。因此，我们提出了一种新的活动检测基线方法，以应对我们的数据集带来的新挑战。该方法利用一种模态（即光流）生成注意力权重来指导另一种模态（即 RGB）更好地检测活动边界。这对于检测以高时间方差为特征的活动特别有益。我们证明，我们提出的方法在 TSU 和另一个流行的具有挑战性的数据集 Charades 上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了名为Toyota Smarthome Untrimmed (TSU)的新数据集，用于活动检测，并提出了一种新的基线方法以应对真实世界中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 设计可成功部署于日常生活环境中的活动检测系统，需要具有真实场景挑战的数据集。现有方法在真实场景数据集上表现不佳，因此需要新的数据集和方法。
AI.method: 该方法利用光流生成注意力权重，以指导RGB模态更好地检测活动边界，特别适用于具有高时间变化特性的活动检测。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在TSU数据集和Charades数据集上均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: TSU数据集展示了真实世界活动检测的挑战，而提出的方法有效应对了这些挑战，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

title: Real-time Tropical Cyclone Intensity Estimation by Handling Temporally Heterogeneous Satellite Data
title_zh: 通过处理时间异构卫星数据实时热带气旋强度估计
abstract: Analyzing big geophysical observational data collected by multiple advanced sensors on various satellite platforms promotes our understanding of the geophysical system. For instance, convolutional neural networks (CNN) have achieved great success in estimating tropical cyclone (TC) intensity based on satellite data with fixed temporal frequency (e.g., 3 h). However, to achieve more timely (under 30 min) and accurate TC intensity estimates, a deep learning model is demanded to handle temporally-heterogeneous satellite observations. Specifically, infrared (IR1) and water vapor (WV) images are available under every 15 minutes, while passive microwave rain rate (PMW) is available for about every 3 hours. Meanwhile, the visible (VIS) channel is severely affected by noise and sunlight intensity, making it difficult to be utilized. Therefore, we propose a novel framework that combines generative adversarial network (GAN) with CNN. The model utilizes all data, including VIS and PMW information, during the training phase and eventually uses only the high-frequent IR1 and WV data for providing intensity estimates during the predicting phase. Experimental results demonstrate that the hybrid GAN-CNN framework achieves comparable precision to the state-of-the-art models, while possessing the capability of increasing the maximum estimation frequency from 3 hours to less than 15 minutes.
summary: Analyzing big geophysical observational data collected by multiple advanced sensors on various satellite platforms promotes our understanding of the geophysical system. For instance, convolutional neural networks (CNN) have achieved great success in estimating tropical cyclone (TC) intensity based on satellite data with fixed temporal frequency (e.g., 3 h). However, to achieve more timely (under 30 min) and accurate TC intensity estimates, a deep learning model is demanded to handle temporally-heterogeneous satellite observations. Specifically, infrared (IR1) and water vapor (WV) images are available under every 15 minutes, while passive microwave rain rate (PMW) is available for about every 3 hours. Meanwhile, the visible (VIS) channel is severely affected by noise and sunlight intensity, making it difficult to be utilized. Therefore, we propose a novel framework that combines generative adversarial network (GAN) with CNN. The model utilizes all data, including VIS and PMW information, during the training phase and eventually uses only the high-frequent IR1 and WV data for providing intensity estimates during the predicting phase. Experimental results demonstrate that the hybrid GAN-CNN framework achieves comparable precision to the state-of-the-art models, while possessing the capability of increasing the maximum estimation frequency from 3 hours to less than 15 minutes.
abstract_zh: 分析各种卫星平台上的多个先进传感器收集的大地球物理观测数据可以促进我们对地球物理系统的理解。例如，卷积神经网络（CNN）在基于固定时间频率（例如 3 小时）的卫星数据估计热带气旋（TC）强度方面取得了巨大成功。然而，为了实现更及时（30 分钟内）和准确的 TC 强度估计，需要深度学习模型来处理时间异构的卫星观测。具体而言，红外 (IR1) 和水蒸气 (WV) 图像每 15 分钟获取一次，而被动微波降雨率 (PMW) 大约每 3 小时获取一次。同时，可见光（VIS）通道受噪声和阳光强度的影响严重，难以利用。因此，我们提出了一种将生成对抗网络（GAN）与 CNN 相结合的新颖框架。该模型在训练阶段利用所有数据，包括 VIS 和 PMW 信息，并最终仅使用高频 IR1 和 WV 数据在预测阶段提供强度估计。实验结果表明，混合 GAN-CNN 框架实现了与最先进模型相当的精度，同时具有将最大估计频率从 3 小时提高到不到 15 分钟的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）与卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架，用于处理时间异构的卫星数据，实现热带气旋强度的实时高频率估计。
AI.motivation: 现有模型基于固定时间频率的卫星数据（如3小时），难以满足更及时（<30分钟）的强度估计需求，且不同传感器数据存在时间频率差异与噪声干扰。
AI.method: 设计GAN-CNN混合框架，在训练阶段整合可见光（VIS）、水汽（WV）、红外（IR1）及被动微波（PMW）多源数据，预测阶段仅依赖高频IR1和WV数据进行实时估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架精度与现有最佳模型相当，同时将强度估计频率从3小时提升至15分钟以内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了异构卫星数据处理难题，显著提升了热带气旋强度估计的实时性，为灾害预警提供技术支撑。

title: Object Hider: Adversarial Patch Attack Against Object Detectors
title_zh: 对象隐藏者：针对对象探测器的对抗性补丁攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks have been widely used in many computer vision tasks. However, it is proved that they are susceptible to small, imperceptible perturbations added to the input. Inputs with elaborately designed perturbations that can fool deep learning models are called adversarial examples, and they have drawn great concerns about the safety of deep neural networks. Object detection algorithms are designed to locate and classify objects in images or videos and they are the core of many computer vision tasks, which have great research value and wide applications. In this paper, we focus on adversarial attack on some state-of-the-art object detection models. As a practical alternative, we use adversarial patches for the attack. Two adversarial patch generation algorithms have been proposed: the heatmap-based algorithm and the consensus-based algorithm. The experiment results have shown that the proposed methods are highly effective, transferable and generic. Additionally, we have applied the proposed methods to competition "Adversarial Challenge on Object Detection" that is organized by Alibaba on the Tianchi platform and won top 7 in 1701 teams. Code is available at: https://github.com/FenHua/DetDak
summary: Deep neural networks have been widely used in many computer vision tasks. However, it is proved that they are susceptible to small, imperceptible perturbations added to the input. Inputs with elaborately designed perturbations that can fool deep learning models are called adversarial examples, and they have drawn great concerns about the safety of deep neural networks. Object detection algorithms are designed to locate and classify objects in images or videos and they are the core of many computer vision tasks, which have great research value and wide applications. In this paper, we focus on adversarial attack on some state-of-the-art object detection models. As a practical alternative, we use adversarial patches for the attack. Two adversarial patch generation algorithms have been proposed: the heatmap-based algorithm and the consensus-based algorithm. The experiment results have shown that the proposed methods are highly effective, transferable and generic. Additionally, we have applied the proposed methods to competition "Adversarial Challenge on Object Detection" that is organized by Alibaba on the Tianchi platform and won top 7 in 1701 teams. Code is available at: https://github.com/FenHua/DetDak
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已广泛应用于许多计算机视觉任务中。然而，事实证明，它们很容易受到输入中添加的微小的、难以察觉的扰动的影响。具有精心设计的扰动的输入可以欺骗深度学习模型，称为对抗性示例，它们引起了人们对深度神经网络安全性的极大担忧。目标检测算法旨在对图像或视频中的目标进行定位和分类，是许多计算机视觉任务的核心，具有巨大的研究价值和广泛的应用。在本文中，我们重点关注对一些最先进的目标检测模型的对抗性攻击。作为一种实用的替代方案，我们使用对抗性补丁进行攻击。提出了两种对抗性补丁生成算法：基于热图的算法和基于共识的算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法具有高效性、可移植性和通用性。此外，我们还将所提出的方法应用于阿里巴巴在天池平台举办的“物体检测对抗挑战”竞赛，并在 1701 支队伍中获得了前 7 名。代码位于：https://github.com/FenHua/DetDak

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对目标检测器的对抗性补丁攻击方法，通过生成特定图案的补丁隐藏图像中的目标对象。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在计算机视觉任务中广泛应用，但存在对微小扰动敏感的安全隐患。目标检测作为核心任务，其鲁棒性研究具有重要价值。
AI.method: 设计了基于热力图和共识机制的两种对抗补丁生成算法，通过优化补丁位置和形态实现对目标检测模型的攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明方法具有高攻击成功率和跨模型迁移能力，在阿里天池平台竞赛中取得1701支队伍前7名的成绩。
AI.conclusion: 对抗补丁攻击揭示了目标检测系统的安全缺陷，为模型鲁棒性研究提供了新方向和实践验证方案。

search_text: Object Hider: Adversarial Patch Attack Against Object Detectors 对象隐藏者：针对对象探测器的对抗性补丁攻击 Deep neural networks have been widely used in many computer vision tasks. However, it is proved that they are susceptible to small, imperceptible perturbations added to the input. Inputs with elaborately designed perturbations that can fool deep learning models are called adversarial examples, and they have drawn great concerns about the safety of deep neural networks. Object detection algorithms are designed to locate and classify objects in images or videos and they are the core of many computer vision tasks, which have great research value and wide applications. In this paper, we focus on adversarial attack on some state-of-the-art object detection models. As a practical alternative, we use adversarial patches for the attack. Two adversarial patch generation algorithms have been proposed: the heatmap-based algorithm and the consensus-based algorithm. The experiment results have shown that the proposed methods are highly effective, transferable and generic. Additionally, we have applied the proposed methods to competition "Adversarial Challenge on Object Detection" that is organized by Alibaba on the Tianchi platform and won top 7 in 1701 teams. Code is available at: https://github.com/FenHua/DetDak 深度神经网络已广泛应用于许多计算机视觉任务中。然而，事实证明，它们很容易受到输入中添加的微小的、难以察觉的扰动的影响。具有精心设计的扰动的输入可以欺骗深度学习模型，称为对抗性示例，它们引起了人们对深度神经网络安全性的极大担忧。目标检测算法旨在对图像或视频中的目标进行定位和分类，是许多计算机视觉任务的核心，具有巨大的研究价值和广泛的应用。在本文中，我们重点关注对一些最先进的目标检测模型的对抗性攻击。作为一种实用的替代方案，我们使用对抗性补丁进行攻击。提出了两种对抗性补丁生成算法：基于热图的算法和基于共识的算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法具有高效性、可移植性和通用性。此外，我们还将所提出的方法应用于阿里巴巴在天池平台举办的“物体检测对抗挑战”竞赛，并在 1701 支队伍中获得了前 7 名。代码位于：https://github.com/FenHua/DetDak 本文提出一种针对目标检测器的对抗性补丁攻击方法，通过生成特定图案的补丁隐藏图像中的目标对象。 Yusheng Zhao,Huanqian Yan,Xingxing Wei cs.CV

title: Leveraging Visual Question Answering to Improve Text-to-Image Synthesis
title_zh: 利用视觉问答来改进文本到图像的合成
comment: Accepted to the LANTERN workshop at COLING 2020
comments: Accepted to the LANTERN workshop at COLING 2020
abstract: Generating images from textual descriptions has recently attracted a lot of interest. While current models can generate photo-realistic images of individual objects such as birds and human faces, synthesising images with multiple objects is still very difficult. In this paper, we propose an effective way to combine Text-to-Image (T2I) synthesis with Visual Question Answering (VQA) to improve the image quality and image-text alignment of generated images by leveraging the VQA 2.0 dataset. We create additional training samples by concatenating question and answer (QA) pairs and employ a standard VQA model to provide the T2I model with an auxiliary learning signal. We encourage images generated from QA pairs to look realistic and additionally minimize an external VQA loss. Our method lowers the FID from 27.84 to 25.38 and increases the R-prec. from 83.82% to 84.79% when compared to the baseline, which indicates that T2I synthesis can successfully be improved using a standard VQA model.
summary: Generating images from textual descriptions has recently attracted a lot of interest. While current models can generate photo-realistic images of individual objects such as birds and human faces, synthesising images with multiple objects is still very difficult. In this paper, we propose an effective way to combine Text-to-Image (T2I) synthesis with Visual Question Answering (VQA) to improve the image quality and image-text alignment of generated images by leveraging the VQA 2.0 dataset. We create additional training samples by concatenating question and answer (QA) pairs and employ a standard VQA model to provide the T2I model with an auxiliary learning signal. We encourage images generated from QA pairs to look realistic and additionally minimize an external VQA loss. Our method lowers the FID from 27.84 to 25.38 and increases the R-prec. from 83.82% to 84.79% when compared to the baseline, which indicates that T2I synthesis can successfully be improved using a standard VQA model.
abstract_zh: 从文本描述生成图像最近吸引了很多人的兴趣。虽然当前的模型可以生成单个对象（例如鸟类和人脸）的逼真图像，但合成多个对象的图像仍然非常困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种将文本到图像（T2I）合成与视觉问答（VQA）相结合的有效方法，以利用 VQA 2.0 数据集来提高生成图像的图像质量和图像文本对齐。我们通过连接问答 (QA) 对来创建额外的训练样本，并采用标准 VQA 模型为 T2I 模型提供辅助学习信号。我们鼓励 QA 对生成的图像看起来更真实，并最大限度地减少外部 VQA 损失。我们的方法将 FID 从 27.84 降低到 25.38，并增加 R-prec。与基线相比，从 83.82% 提高到 84.79%，这表明使用标准 VQA 模型可以成功改进 T2I 合成。

AI.tldr: 通过结合视觉问答（VQA）来提升文本到图像合成的质量和图文对齐
AI.motivation: 现有T2I模型在生成多物体图像时存在困难，而VQA能提供额外的语义信息以增强生成效果
AI.method: 利用VQA 2.0数据集生成训练样本，结合问答对并引入VQA模型作为辅助信号，同时优化VQA损失函数
AI.conclusion: 标准VQA模型能有效提升文本到图像合成的质量和图文对齐能力

title: Generative Tomography Reconstruction
title_zh: 生成断层扫描重建
comment: Accepted as a poster for the NeurIPS 2020 Workshop on Deep Learning and Inverse Problems
comments: Accepted as a poster for the NeurIPS 2020 Workshop on Deep Learning and Inverse Problems
abstract: We propose an end-to-end differentiable architecture for tomography reconstruction that directly maps a noisy sinogram into a denoised reconstruction. Compared to existing approaches our end-to-end architecture produces more accurate reconstructions while using less parameters and time. We also propose a generative model that, given a noisy sinogram, can sample realistic reconstructions. This generative model can be used as prior inside an iterative process that, by taking into consideration the physical model, can reduce artifacts and errors in the reconstructions.
summary: We propose an end-to-end differentiable architecture for tomography reconstruction that directly maps a noisy sinogram into a denoised reconstruction. Compared to existing approaches our end-to-end architecture produces more accurate reconstructions while using less parameters and time. We also propose a generative model that, given a noisy sinogram, can sample realistic reconstructions. This generative model can be used as prior inside an iterative process that, by taking into consideration the physical model, can reduce artifacts and errors in the reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于断层扫描重建的端到端可微架构，该架构直接将噪声正弦图映射到去噪重建。与现有方法相比，我们的端到端架构可以使用更少的参数和时间产生更准确的重建。我们还提出了一种生成模型，在给定噪声正弦图的情况下，可以对真实的重建进行采样。该生成模型可以用作迭代过程中的先验，通过考虑物理模型，可以减少重建中的伪影和错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成模型的端到端断层成像重建方法，通过直接映射噪声正弦图到高质量重建图像，减少参数和计算时间。
AI.motivation: 现有断层成像重建方法存在参数冗余、计算耗时及重建质量受限的问题，需更高效的模型与物理先验结合以提升效果。
AI.method: 设计端到端微分架构直接处理噪声正弦图，同时引入生成模型采样真实重建图像，并将其作为迭代过程的物理先验约束。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在参数量和计算时间减少的情况下实现更高重建精度，生成模型有效抑制伪影并降低误差。
AI.conclusion: 融合生成模型与物理先验的端到端架构显著提升了断层成像重建的效率和质量，为后续研究提供新方向。

title: MedMNIST Classification Decathlon: A Lightweight AutoML Benchmark for Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: MedMNIST 分类十项全能：用于医学图像分析的轻量级 AutoML 基准
comment: ISBI 2021. Code and dataset are available at https://medmnist.github.io/
comments: ISBI 2021. Code and dataset are available at https://medmnist.github.io/
abstract: We present MedMNIST, a collection of 10 pre-processed medical open datasets. MedMNIST is standardized to perform classification tasks on lightweight 28x28 images, which requires no background knowledge. Covering the primary data modalities in medical image analysis, it is diverse on data scale (from 100 to 100,000) and tasks (binary/multi-class, ordinal regression and multi-label). MedMNIST could be used for educational purpose, rapid prototyping, multi-modal machine learning or AutoML in medical image analysis. Moreover, MedMNIST Classification Decathlon is designed to benchmark AutoML algorithms on all 10 datasets; We have compared several baseline methods, including open-source or commercial AutoML tools. The datasets, evaluation code and baseline methods for MedMNIST are publicly available at https://medmnist.github.io/.
summary: We present MedMNIST, a collection of 10 pre-processed medical open datasets. MedMNIST is standardized to perform classification tasks on lightweight 28x28 images, which requires no background knowledge. Covering the primary data modalities in medical image analysis, it is diverse on data scale (from 100 to 100,000) and tasks (binary/multi-class, ordinal regression and multi-label). MedMNIST could be used for educational purpose, rapid prototyping, multi-modal machine learning or AutoML in medical image analysis. Moreover, MedMNIST Classification Decathlon is designed to benchmark AutoML algorithms on all 10 datasets; We have compared several baseline methods, including open-source or commercial AutoML tools. The datasets, evaluation code and baseline methods for MedMNIST are publicly available at https://medmnist.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 MedMNIST，这是 10 个预处理的医学开放数据集的集合。 MedMNIST 经过标准化处理，可在轻量级 28x28 图像上执行分类任务，无需背景知识。它涵盖了医学图像分析中的主要数据模式，在数据规模（从 100 到 100,000）和任务（二元/多类、序数回归和多标签）上具有多样性。 MedMNIST 可用于教育目的、快速原型设计、多模式机器学习或医学图像分析中的 AutoML。此外，MedMNIST Classification Decathlon 旨在对所有 10 个数据集上的 AutoML 算法进行基准测试；我们比较了几种基线方法，包括开源或商业 AutoML 工具。 MedMNIST 的数据集、评估代码和基线方法可在 https://medmnist.github.io/ 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedMNIST，一个包含10个预处理医疗开放数据集的分类基准测试，用于轻量级自动机器学习（AutoML）在医学图像分析中的评估。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析需要标准化、轻量级且多样化的数据集来支持教育、快速原型设计和AutoML研究，但现有数据集在规模、任务类型和可访问性上存在不足。
AI.method: 将医学图像标准化为28x28像素的轻量格式，涵盖二分类、多分类、序数回归和多标签任务，并设计MedMNIST Classification Decathlon基准测试，对比多种开源和商业AutoML工具的性能。
AI.result: 公开了数据集、评估代码和基线方法，验证了MedMNIST在教育、多模态学习和AutoML场景中的适用性，并为后续研究提供了统一的比较平台。

search_text: MedMNIST Classification Decathlon: A Lightweight AutoML Benchmark for Medical Image Analysis MedMNIST 分类十项全能：用于医学图像分析的轻量级 AutoML 基准 We present MedMNIST, a collection of 10 pre-processed medical open datasets. MedMNIST is standardized to perform classification tasks on lightweight 28x28 images, which requires no background knowledge. Covering the primary data modalities in medical image analysis, it is diverse on data scale (from 100 to 100,000) and tasks (binary/multi-class, ordinal regression and multi-label). MedMNIST could be used for educational purpose, rapid prototyping, multi-modal machine learning or AutoML in medical image analysis. Moreover, MedMNIST Classification Decathlon is designed to benchmark AutoML algorithms on all 10 datasets; We have compared several baseline methods, including open-source or commercial AutoML tools. The datasets, evaluation code and baseline methods for MedMNIST are publicly available at https://medmnist.github.io/. 我们推出 MedMNIST，这是 10 个预处理的医学开放数据集的集合。 MedMNIST 经过标准化处理，可在轻量级 28x28 图像上执行分类任务，无需背景知识。它涵盖了医学图像分析中的主要数据模式，在数据规模（从 100 到 100,000）和任务（二元/多类、序数回归和多标签）上具有多样性。 MedMNIST 可用于教育目的、快速原型设计、多模式机器学习或医学图像分析中的 AutoML。此外，MedMNIST Classification Decathlon 旨在对所有 10 个数据集上的 AutoML 算法进行基准测试；我们比较了几种基线方法，包括开源或商业 AutoML 工具。 MedMNIST 的数据集、评估代码和基线方法可在 https://medmnist.github.io/ 上公开获取。 本文提出MedMNIST，一个包含10个预处理医疗开放数据集的分类基准测试，用于轻量级自动机器学习（AutoML）在医学图像分析中的评估。 Jiancheng Yang,Rui Shi,Bingbing Ni cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jyri Maanpää,Josef Taher,Petri Manninen,Leo Pakola,Iaroslav Melekhov,Juha Hyyppä
title: Multimodal End-to-End Learning for Autonomous Steering in Adverse Road and Weather Conditions
title_zh: 恶劣道路和天气条件下自主转向的多模式端到端学习
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, included in the conference proceedings of the 2020 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2021
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, included in the conference proceedings of the 2020 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2021
abstract: Autonomous driving is challenging in adverse road and weather conditions in which there might not be lane lines, the road might be covered in snow and the visibility might be poor. We extend the previous work on end-to-end learning for autonomous steering to operate in these adverse real-life conditions with multimodal data. We collected 28 hours of driving data in several road and weather conditions and trained convolutional neural networks to predict the car steering wheel angle from front-facing color camera images and lidar range and reflectance data. We compared the CNN model performances based on the different modalities and our results show that the lidar modality improves the performances of different multimodal sensor-fusion models. We also performed on-road tests with different models and they support this observation.
summary: Autonomous driving is challenging in adverse road and weather conditions in which there might not be lane lines, the road might be covered in snow and the visibility might be poor. We extend the previous work on end-to-end learning for autonomous steering to operate in these adverse real-life conditions with multimodal data. We collected 28 hours of driving data in several road and weather conditions and trained convolutional neural networks to predict the car steering wheel angle from front-facing color camera images and lidar range and reflectance data. We compared the CNN model performances based on the different modalities and our results show that the lidar modality improves the performances of different multimodal sensor-fusion models. We also performed on-road tests with different models and they support this observation.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶在恶劣的道路和天气条件下具有挑战性，其中可能没有车道线、道路可能被雪覆盖、能见度可能很差。我们扩展了之前关于自动驾驶端到端学习的工作，以利用多模态数据在这些不利的现实生活条件下运行。我们收集了多种道路和天气条件下 28 小时的驾驶数据，并训练卷积神经网络，根据前置彩色摄像头图像以及激光雷达范围和反射率数据来预测汽车方向盘角度。我们比较了基于不同模态的 CNN 模型性能，结果表明激光雷达模态提高了不同多模态传感器融合模型的性能。我们还对不同的模型进行了道路测试，它们支持了这一观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种多模态端到端学习方法，用于在恶劣道路和天气条件下实现自动驾驶的自主转向控制。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶在无车道线、积雪覆盖及低能见度等恶劣条件下面临挑战，传统方法难以有效应对，需探索多模态数据融合的解决方案。
AI.method: 采集28小时多场景驾驶数据，训练卷积神经网络模型，输入包括前视摄像头图像及激光雷达的测距与反射率数据，对比不同模态的模型性能并进行路测验证。
AI.result: 实验表明激光雷达模态显著提升多模态传感器融合模型的转向预测性能，路测结果验证了该结论。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合（尤其是激光雷达）可有效增强自动驾驶系统在恶劣环境下的鲁棒性，为相关研究提供实证支持。

search_text: Multimodal End-to-End Learning for Autonomous Steering in Adverse Road and Weather Conditions 恶劣道路和天气条件下自主转向的多模式端到端学习 Autonomous driving is challenging in adverse road and weather conditions in which there might not be lane lines, the road might be covered in snow and the visibility might be poor. We extend the previous work on end-to-end learning for autonomous steering to operate in these adverse real-life conditions with multimodal data. We collected 28 hours of driving data in several road and weather conditions and trained convolutional neural networks to predict the car steering wheel angle from front-facing color camera images and lidar range and reflectance data. We compared the CNN model performances based on the different modalities and our results show that the lidar modality improves the performances of different multimodal sensor-fusion models. We also performed on-road tests with different models and they support this observation. 自动驾驶在恶劣的道路和天气条件下具有挑战性，其中可能没有车道线、道路可能被雪覆盖、能见度可能很差。我们扩展了之前关于自动驾驶端到端学习的工作，以利用多模态数据在这些不利的现实生活条件下运行。我们收集了多种道路和天气条件下 28 小时的驾驶数据，并训练卷积神经网络，根据前置彩色摄像头图像以及激光雷达范围和反射率数据来预测汽车方向盘角度。我们比较了基于不同模态的 CNN 模型性能，结果表明激光雷达模态提高了不同多模态传感器融合模型的性能。我们还对不同的模型进行了道路测试，它们支持了这一观察结果。 本论文提出一种多模态端到端学习方法，用于在恶劣道路和天气条件下实现自动驾驶的自主转向控制。 Jyri Maanpää,Josef Taher,Petri Manninen,Leo Pakola,Iaroslav Melekhov,Juha Hyyppä cs.CV

authors_text: Atiye Sadat Hashemi,Andreas Bär,Saeed Mozaffari,Tim Fingscheidt
title: Transferable Universal Adversarial Perturbations Using Generative Models
title_zh: 使用生成模型的可转移通用对抗性扰动
abstract: Deep neural networks tend to be vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, which by adding to a natural image can fool a respective model with high confidence. Recently, the existence of image-agnostic perturbations, also known as universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs), were discovered. However, existing UAPs still lack a sufficiently high fooling rate, when being applied to an unknown target model. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning technique for generating more transferable UAPs. We utilize a perturbation generator and some given pretrained networks so-called source models to generate UAPs using the ImageNet dataset. Due to the similar feature representation of various model architectures in the first layer, we propose a loss formulation that focuses on the adversarial energy only in the respective first layer of the source models. This supports the transferability of our generated UAPs to any other target model. We further empirically analyze our generated UAPs and demonstrate that these perturbations generalize very well towards different target models. Surpassing the current state of the art in both, fooling rate and model-transferability, we can show the superiority of our proposed approach. Using our generated non-targeted UAPs, we obtain an average fooling rate of 93.36% on the source models (state of the art: 82.16%). Generating our UAPs on the deep ResNet-152, we obtain about a 12% absolute fooling rate advantage vs. cutting-edge methods on VGG-16 and VGG-19 target models.
summary: Deep neural networks tend to be vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, which by adding to a natural image can fool a respective model with high confidence. Recently, the existence of image-agnostic perturbations, also known as universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs), were discovered. However, existing UAPs still lack a sufficiently high fooling rate, when being applied to an unknown target model. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning technique for generating more transferable UAPs. We utilize a perturbation generator and some given pretrained networks so-called source models to generate UAPs using the ImageNet dataset. Due to the similar feature representation of various model architectures in the first layer, we propose a loss formulation that focuses on the adversarial energy only in the respective first layer of the source models. This supports the transferability of our generated UAPs to any other target model. We further empirically analyze our generated UAPs and demonstrate that these perturbations generalize very well towards different target models. Surpassing the current state of the art in both, fooling rate and model-transferability, we can show the superiority of our proposed approach. Using our generated non-targeted UAPs, we obtain an average fooling rate of 93.36% on the source models (state of the art: 82.16%). Generating our UAPs on the deep ResNet-152, we obtain about a 12% absolute fooling rate advantage vs. cutting-edge methods on VGG-16 and VGG-19 target models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络往往容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，通过添加到自然图像中可以以高置信度欺骗相应的模型。最近，发现了与图像无关的扰动，也称为通用对抗性扰动（UAP）的存在。然而，现有的UAP在应用于未知目标模型时仍然缺乏足够高的愚弄率。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习技术来生成更多可转移的 UAP。我们利用扰动生成器和一些给定的预训练网络（所谓的源模型）使用 ImageNet 数据集生成 UAP。由于第一层中各种模型架构的相似特征表示，我们提出了一种仅关注源模型各自第一层中的对抗能量的损失公式。这支持我们生成的 UAP 可以转移到任何其他目标模型。我们进一步对生成的 UAP 进行实证分析，并证明这些扰动可以很好地推广到不同的目标模型。在愚弄率和模型可转移性方面都超越了当前的技术水平，我们可以展示我们提出的方法的优越性。使用我们生成的非目标 UAP，我们在源模型上获得了 93.36% 的平均愚弄率（最先进的：82.16%）。在深度 ResNet-152 上生成 UAP，与 VGG-16 和 VGG-19 目标模型上的尖端方法相比，我们获得了约 12% 的绝对愚弄率优势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成模型的新型深度学习技术，生成更具可转移性的通用对抗扰动（UAPs），以提高对未知目标模型的欺骗率。
AI.motivation: 现有UAPs在未知目标模型上的欺骗率不足，需提升其跨模型的可转移性。
AI.method: 利用扰动生成器和预训练源模型，结合ImageNet数据集，设计聚焦于源模型第一层特征的损失函数，生成可转移的UAPs。
AI.result: 在源模型上平均欺骗率达93.36%（SOTA为82.16%），在VGG-16和VGG-19目标模型上比现有方法高12%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在欺骗率和模型可转移性上均优于现有技术，证明其有效性。

Surpassing the current state of the art in both, fooling rate and model-transferability, we can show the superiority of our proposed approach. Using our generated non-targeted UAPs, we obtain an average fooling rate of 93.36% on the source models (state of the art: 82.16%). Generating our UAPs on the deep ResNet-152, we obtain about a 12% absolute fooling rate advantage vs. cutting-edge methods on VGG-16 and VGG-19 target models. 深度神经网络往往容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，通过添加到自然图像中可以以高置信度欺骗相应的模型。最近，发现了与图像无关的扰动，也称为通用对抗性扰动（UAP）的存在。然而，现有的UAP在应用于未知目标模型时仍然缺乏足够高的愚弄率。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习技术来生成更多可转移的 UAP。我们利用扰动生成器和一些给定的预训练网络（所谓的源模型）使用 ImageNet 数据集生成 UAP。由于第一层中各种模型架构的相似特征表示，我们提出了一种仅关注源模型各自第一层中的对抗能量的损失公式。这支持我们生成的 UAP 可以转移到任何其他目标模型。我们进一步对生成的 UAP 进行实证分析，并证明这些扰动可以很好地推广到不同的目标模型。在愚弄率和模型可转移性方面都超越了当前的技术水平，我们可以展示我们提出的方法的优越性。使用我们生成的非目标 UAP，我们在源模型上获得了 93.36% 的平均愚弄率（最先进的：82.16%）。在深度 ResNet-152 上生成 UAP，与 VGG-16 和 VGG-19 目标模型上的尖端方法相比，我们获得了约 12% 的绝对愚弄率优势。 提出一种基于生成模型的新型深度学习技术，生成更具可转移性的通用对抗扰动（UAPs），以提高对未知目标模型的欺骗率。 Atiye Sadat Hashemi,Andreas Bär,Saeed Mozaffari,Tim Fingscheidt cs.CV

title: Almost-Optimal Deterministic Treasure Hunt in Arbitrary Graphs
title_zh: 任意图中近乎最优的确定性寻宝
abstract: A mobile agent navigating along edges of a simple connected graph, either finite or countably infinite, has to find an inert target (treasure) hidden in one of the nodes. This task is known as treasure hunt. The agent has no a priori knowledge of the graph, of the location of the treasure or of the initial distance to it. The cost of a treasure hunt algorithm is the worst-case number of edge traversals performed by the agent until finding the treasure. Awerbuch, Betke, Rivest and Singh [3] considered graph exploration and treasure hunt for finite graphs in a restricted model where the agent has a fuel tank that can be replenished only at the starting node $s$. The size of the tank is $B=2(1+α)r$, for some positive real constant $α$, where $r$, called the radius of the graph, is the maximum distance from $s$ to any other node. The tank of size $B$ allows the agent to make at most $\lfloor B\rfloor$ edge traversals between two consecutive visits at node $s$. Let $e(d)$ be the number of edges whose at least one extremity is at distance less than $d$ from $s$. Awerbuch, Betke, Rivest and Singh [3] conjectured that it is impossible to find a treasure hidden in a node at distance at most $d$ at cost nearly linear in $e(d)$. We first design a deterministic treasure hunt algorithm working in the model without any restrictions on the moves of the agent at cost $\mathcal{O}(e(d) \log d)$, and then show how to modify this algorithm to work in the model from [3] with the same complexity. Thus we refute the above twenty-year-old conjecture. We observe that no treasure hunt algorithm can beat cost $Θ(e(d))$ for all graphs and thus our algorithms are also almost optimal.
summary: A mobile agent navigating along edges of a simple connected graph, either finite or countably infinite, has to find an inert target (treasure) hidden in one of the nodes. This task is known as treasure hunt. The agent has no a priori knowledge of the graph, of the location of the treasure or of the initial distance to it. The cost of a treasure hunt algorithm is the worst-case number of edge traversals performed by the agent until finding the treasure. Awerbuch, Betke, Rivest and Singh [3] considered graph exploration and treasure hunt for finite graphs in a restricted model where the agent has a fuel tank that can be replenished only at the starting node $s$. The size of the tank is $B=2(1+α)r$, for some positive real constant $α$, where $r$, called the radius of the graph, is the maximum distance from $s$ to any other node. The tank of size $B$ allows the agent to make at most $\lfloor B\rfloor$ edge traversals between two consecutive visits at node $s$. Let $e(d)$ be the number of edges whose at least one extremity is at distance less than $d$ from $s$. Awerbuch, Betke, Rivest and Singh [3] conjectured that it is impossible to find a treasure hidden in a node at distance at most $d$ at cost nearly linear in $e(d)$. We first design a deterministic treasure hunt algorithm working in the model without any restrictions on the moves of the agent at cost $\mathcal{O}(e(d) \log d)$, and then show how to modify this algorithm to work in the model from [3] with the same complexity. Thus we refute the above twenty-year-old conjecture. We observe that no treasure hunt algorithm can beat cost $Θ(e(d))$ for all graphs and thus our algorithms are also almost optimal.
abstract_zh: 沿着简单连通图（有限或可数无限）的边导航的移动代理必须找到隐藏在其中一个节点中的惰性目标（宝藏）。这项任务被称为寻宝。智能体对图表、宝藏的位置或与宝藏的初始距离没有先验知识。寻宝算法的成本是代理在找到宝藏之前执行的边遍历的最坏情况次数。 Awerbuch、Betke、Rivest 和 Singh [3] 考虑了在受限模型中对有限图进行图探索和寻宝，其中代理有一个只能在起始节点 $s$ 补充的油箱。对于某个正实常数 $α$，水箱的大小为 $B=2(1+α)r$，其中 $r$ 称为图的半径，是从 $s$ 到任何其他节点的最大距离。大小为 $B$ 的池允许代理在节点 $s$ 的两次连续访问之间最多进行 $\lfloor B\rfloor$ 边遍历。令 $e(d)$ 为至少一个末端距 $s$ 距离小于 $d$ 的边数。 Awerbuch、Betke、Rivest 和 Singh [3] 推测，不可能以与 $e(d)$ 几乎呈线性关系的成本找到隐藏在距离至多 $d$ 的节点中的宝藏。我们首先设计一个在模型中工作的确定性寻宝算法，对代理的移动没有​​任何限制，成本为 $\mathcal{O}(e(d) \log d)$，然后展示如何修改该算法以在具有相同复杂度的[3]模型中工作。至此，我们反驳了上述二十年前的猜想。我们观察到，没有任何寻宝算法可以击败所有图的成本 $ θ(e(d))$，因此我们的算法也几乎是最优的。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种确定性寻宝算法，在任意图中以接近最优的复杂度找到隐藏的宝藏。
AI.motivation: 针对Awerbuch等人提出的二十年前的猜想，即无法在接近线性复杂度下完成寻宝任务，本文旨在通过设计高效算法推翻该猜想。
AI.method: 提出一种无约束模型下的确定性寻宝算法，复杂度为O(e(d) log d)，并将其调整为符合燃料限制模型的版本。
AI.result: 成功设计出复杂度低于线性级别的算法，验证了该猜想不成立，且证明算法在所有图中几乎最优。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法设计与理论分析，推翻了原有猜想，为图中寻宝问题提供了接近最优的解决方案。

authors_text: Marius Beul,Simon Bultmann,Andre Rochow,Radu Alexandru Rosu,Daniel Schleich,Malte Splietker,Sven Behnke
title: Visually Guided Balloon Popping with an Autonomous MAV at MBZIRC 2020
title_zh: MBZIRC 2020 上使用自主 MAV 进行视觉引导气球爆破
comment: Accepted for IEEE International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR), Abu Dhabi, UAE, 2020
comments: Accepted for IEEE International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR), Abu Dhabi, UAE, 2020
abstract: Visually guided control of micro aerial vehicles (MAV) demands for robust real-time perception, fast trajectory generation, and a capable flight platform. We present a fully autonomous MAV that is able to pop balloons, relying only on onboard sensing and computing. The system is evaluated with real robot experiments during the Mohamed Bin Zayed International Robotics Challenge (MBZIRC) 2020 where it showed its resilience and speed. In all three competition runs we were able to pop all five balloons in less than two minutes flight time with a single MAV.
summary: Visually guided control of micro aerial vehicles (MAV) demands for robust real-time perception, fast trajectory generation, and a capable flight platform. We present a fully autonomous MAV that is able to pop balloons, relying only on onboard sensing and computing. The system is evaluated with real robot experiments during the Mohamed Bin Zayed International Robotics Challenge (MBZIRC) 2020 where it showed its resilience and speed. In all three competition runs we were able to pop all five balloons in less than two minutes flight time with a single MAV.
abstract_zh: 微型飞行器 (MAV) 的视觉引导控制需要强大的实时感知、快速轨迹生成和功能强大的飞行平台。我们提出了一种完全自主的微型飞行器，它能够仅依靠机载传感和计算来弹出气球。该系统在 2020 年穆罕默德·本·扎耶德国际机器人挑战赛 (MBZIRC) 期间通过真实的机器人实验进行了评估，展示了其弹性和速度。在所有三场比赛中，我们都能够使用单个微型飞行器在不到两分钟的飞行时间内弹出所有五个气球。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完全自主的微型飞行器（MAV）系统，仅依赖机载感知与计算，在MBZIRC 2020比赛中完成气球爆破任务。
AI.motivation: 视觉引导的MAV控制需要实时感知、快速轨迹生成及可靠飞行平台，本文旨在验证这些技术的集成能力并展示系统性能。
AI.method: 基于机载视觉感知与实时计算，结合快速轨迹生成算法，实现自主导航与气球定位爆破的闭环控制。
AI.result: 在MBZIRC 2020三次竞赛中，单架MAV均在两分钟内成功爆破全部五个气球，验证了系统的高效性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了自主MAV在复杂动态环境中的任务执行能力，为未来无人机自主系统提供了可行的技术方案。
