title: Morphological Development at the Evolutionary Timescale: Robotic Developmental Evolution
title_zh: 进化时间尺度上的形态发育：机器人发育进化
comment: to be published in the Artificial Life journal
comments: to be published in the Artificial Life journal
abstract: Evolution and development operate at different timescales; generations for the one, a lifetime for the other. These two processes, the basis of much of life on earth, interact in many non-trivial ways, but their temporal hierarchy -- evolution overarching development -- is observed for most multicellular lifeforms. When designing robots however, this tenet lifts: it becomes -- however natural -- a design choice. We propose to inverse this temporal hierarchy and design a developmental process happening at the phylogenetic timescale. Over a classic evolutionary search aimed at finding good gaits for tentacle 2D robots, we add a developmental process over the robots' morphologies. Within a generation, the morphology of the robots does not change. But from one generation to the next, the morphology develops. Much like we become bigger, stronger, and heavier as we age, our robots are bigger, stronger and heavier with each passing generation. Our robots start with baby morphologies, and a few thousand generations later, end-up with adult ones. We show that this produces better and qualitatively different gaits than an evolutionary search with only adult robots, and that it prevents premature convergence by fostering exploration. In addition, we validate our method on voxel lattice 3D robots from the literature and compare it to a recent evolutionary developmental approach. Our method is conceptually simple, and can be effective on small or large populations of robots, and intrinsic to the robot and its morphology, not the task or environment. Furthermore, by recasting the evolutionary search as a learning process, these results can be viewed in the context of developmental learning robotics.
summary: Evolution and development operate at different timescales; generations for the one, a lifetime for the other. These two processes, the basis of much of life on earth, interact in many non-trivial ways, but their temporal hierarchy -- evolution overarching development -- is observed for most multicellular lifeforms. When designing robots however, this tenet lifts: it becomes -- however natural -- a design choice. We propose to inverse this temporal hierarchy and design a developmental process happening at the phylogenetic timescale. Over a classic evolutionary search aimed at finding good gaits for tentacle 2D robots, we add a developmental process over the robots' morphologies. Within a generation, the morphology of the robots does not change. But from one generation to the next, the morphology develops. Much like we become bigger, stronger, and heavier as we age, our robots are bigger, stronger and heavier with each passing generation. Our robots start with baby morphologies, and a few thousand generations later, end-up with adult ones. We show that this produces better and qualitatively different gaits than an evolutionary search with only adult robots, and that it prevents premature convergence by fostering exploration. In addition, we validate our method on voxel lattice 3D robots from the literature and compare it to a recent evolutionary developmental approach. Our method is conceptually simple, and can be effective on small or large populations of robots, and intrinsic to the robot and its morphology, not the task or environment. Furthermore, by recasting the evolutionary search as a learning process, these results can be viewed in the context of developmental learning robotics.
abstract_zh: 进化和发展在不同的时间尺度上进行；一个人为一代人，另一个人为一生。这两个过程是地球上许多生命的基础，以许多重要的方式相互作用，但它们的时间层次结构——进化总体上发展——在大多数多细胞生命形式中都可以观察到。然而，在设计机器人时，这一原则得到了提升：无论多么自然，它都成为一种设计选择。我们建议反转这种时间层次结构，并设计一个发生在系统发育时间尺度上的发育过程。在旨在为触手二维机器人寻找良好步态的经典进化搜索中，我们在机器人的形态上添加了一个发育过程。在一代人的时间内，机器人的形态不会改变。但从一代到下一代，形态不断发展。就像我们随着年龄的增长而变得更大、更强、更重一样，我们的机器人也随着一代又一代变得更大、更强、更重。我们的机器人从婴儿形态开始，经过几千代之后，最终形成成年形态。我们证明，与仅使用成年机器人进行进化搜索相比，这会产生更好且质量不同的步态，并且它通过促进探索来防止过早收敛。此外，我们在文献中的体素晶格 3D 机器人上验证了我们的方法，并将其与最近的进化开发方法进行比较。我们的方法在概念上很简单，并且可以对小型或大型机器人群体有效，并且是机器人及其形态所固有的，而不是任务或环境。此外，通过将进化搜索重新定义为学习过程，可以在发育学习机器人的背景下查看这些结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种逆向生物进化时间尺度的机器人形态发育方法，通过跨代形态演化提升运动性能。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人进化算法存在早熟收敛问题，而生物发育过程能促进形态与功能的协同演化，需探索跨代形态发育的可行性。
AI.method: 在经典进化算法框架中嵌入跨代形态发育机制，单代形态固定，跨代逐步演化出更复杂结构，验证于2D软体机器人与3Dvoxel机器人。
AI.result: 相较仅使用成年形态的进化算法，该方法产生更优且差异化的运动模式，有效抑制早熟收敛，并在3D机器人实验中验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨代形态发育机制具有形态内在性与规模扩展性，为发展机器人发育学习提供了新视角，可类比生物进化过程进行形态-功能协同优化。

search_text: Morphological Development at the Evolutionary Timescale: Robotic Developmental Evolution 进化时间尺度上的形态发育：机器人发育进化 Evolution and development operate at different timescales; generations for the one, a lifetime for the other. These two processes, the basis of much of life on earth, interact in many non-trivial ways, but their temporal hierarchy -- evolution overarching development -- is observed for most multicellular lifeforms. When designing robots however, this tenet lifts: it becomes -- however natural -- a design choice. We propose to inverse this temporal hierarchy and design a developmental process happening at the phylogenetic timescale. Over a classic evolutionary search aimed at finding good gaits for tentacle 2D robots, we add a developmental process over the robots' morphologies. Within a generation, the morphology of the robots does not change. But from one generation to the next, the morphology develops. Much like we become bigger, stronger, and heavier as we age, our robots are bigger, stronger and heavier with each passing generation. Our robots start with baby morphologies, and a few thousand generations later, end-up with adult ones. We show that this produces better and qualitatively different gaits than an evolutionary search with only adult robots, and that it prevents premature convergence by fostering exploration. In addition, we validate our method on voxel lattice 3D robots from the literature and compare it to a recent evolutionary developmental approach. Our method is conceptually simple, and can be effective on small or large populations of robots, and intrinsic to the robot and its morphology, not the task or environment. Furthermore, by recasting the evolutionary search as a learning process, these results can be viewed in the context of developmental learning robotics. 进化和发展在不同的时间尺度上进行；一个人为一代人，另一个人为一生。这两个过程是地球上许多生命的基础，以许多重要的方式相互作用，但它们的时间层次结构——进化总体上发展——在大多数多细胞生命形式中都可以观察到。然而，在设计机器人时，这一原则得到了提升：无论多么自然，它都成为一种设计选择。我们建议反转这种时间层次结构，并设计一个发生在系统发育时间尺度上的发育过程。在旨在为触手二维机器人寻找良好步态的经典进化搜索中，我们在机器人的形态上添加了一个发育过程。在一代人的时间内，机器人的形态不会改变。但从一代到下一代，形态不断发展。就像我们随着年龄的增长而变得更大、更强、更重一样，我们的机器人也随着一代又一代变得更大、更强、更重。我们的机器人从婴儿形态开始，经过几千代之后，最终形成成年形态。我们证明，与仅使用成年机器人进行进化搜索相比，这会产生更好且质量不同的步态，并且它通过促进探索来防止过早收敛。此外，我们在文献中的体素晶格 3D 机器人上验证了我们的方法，并将其与最近的进化开发方法进行比较。我们的方法在概念上很简单，并且可以对小型或大型机器人群体有效，并且是机器人及其形态所固有的，而不是任务或环境。此外，通过将进化搜索重新定义为学习过程，可以在发育学习机器人的背景下查看这些结果。 本文提出了一种逆向生物进化时间尺度的机器人形态发育方法，通过跨代形态演化提升运动性能。 Fabien C. authors_text: Jan Egger,Christina Gsaxner,Antonio Pepe,Kelsey L. Pomykala,Frederic Jonske,Manuel Kurz,Jianning Li,Jens Kleesiek
title: Medical Deep Learning -- A systematic Meta-Review
title_zh: 医学深度学习——系统的元评论
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures, 7 tables, 159 references. Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine (CMPB), Elsevier, May 2022
comments: 22 pages, 7 figures, 7 tables, 159 references. Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine (CMPB), Elsevier, May 2022
abstract: Deep learning (DL) has remarkably impacted several different scientific disciplines over the last few years. E.g., in image processing and analysis, DL algorithms were able to outperform other cutting-edge methods. Additionally, DL has delivered state-of-the-art results in tasks like autonomous driving, outclassing previous attempts. There are even instances where DL outperformed humans, for example with object recognition and gaming. DL is also showing vast potential in the medical domain. With the collection of large quantities of patient records and data, and a trend towards personalized treatments, there is a great need for automated and reliable processing and analysis of health information. Patient data is not only collected in clinical centers, like hospitals and private practices, but also by mobile healthcare apps or online websites. The abundance of collected patient data and the recent growth in the DL field has resulted in a large increase in research efforts. In Q2/2020, the search engine PubMed returned already over 11,000 results for the search term 'deep learning', and around 90% of these publications are from the last three years. However, even though PubMed represents the largest search engine in the medical field, it does not cover all medical-related publications. Hence, a complete overview of the field of 'medical deep learning' is almost impossible to obtain and acquiring a full overview of medical sub-fields is becoming increasingly more difficult. Nevertheless, several review and survey articles about medical DL have been published within the last few years. They focus, in general, on specific medical scenarios, like the analysis of medical images containing specific pathologies. With these surveys as a foundation, the aim of this article is to provide the first high-level, systematic meta-review of medical DL surveys.
summary: Deep learning (DL) has remarkably impacted several different scientific disciplines over the last few years. E.g., in image processing and analysis, DL algorithms were able to outperform other cutting-edge methods. Additionally, DL has delivered state-of-the-art results in tasks like autonomous driving, outclassing previous attempts. There are even instances where DL outperformed humans, for example with object recognition and gaming. DL is also showing vast potential in the medical domain. With the collection of large quantities of patient records and data, and a trend towards personalized treatments, there is a great need for automated and reliable processing and analysis of health information. Patient data is not only collected in clinical centers, like hospitals and private practices, but also by mobile healthcare apps or online websites. The abundance of collected patient data and the recent growth in the DL field has resulted in a large increase in research efforts. In Q2/2020, the search engine PubMed returned already over 11,000 results for the search term 'deep learning', and around 90% of these publications are from the last three years. However, even though PubMed represents the largest search engine in the medical field, it does not cover all medical-related publications. Hence, a complete overview of the field of 'medical deep learning' is almost impossible to obtain and acquiring a full overview of medical sub-fields is becoming increasingly more difficult. Nevertheless, several review and survey articles about medical DL have been published within the last few years. They focus, in general, on specific medical scenarios, like the analysis of medical images containing specific pathologies. With these surveys as a foundation, the aim of this article is to provide the first high-level, systematic meta-review of medical DL surveys.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，深度学习 (DL) 对多个不同的科学学科产生了显着影响。例如，在图像处理和分析方面，深度学习算法能够胜过其他尖端方法。此外，深度学习在自动驾驶等任务中取得了最先进的成果，超越了之前的尝试。甚至在某些情况下，深度学习的表现优于人类，例如在物体识别和游戏方面。深度学习在医学领域也显示出巨大的潜力。随着大量患者记录和数据的收集以及个性化治疗的趋势，非常需要对健康信息进行自动化、可靠的处理和分析。患者数据不仅在医院和私人诊所等临床中心收集，还通过移动医疗应用程序或在线网站收集。收集到的大量患者数据以及深度学习领域最近的发展导致了研究工作的大幅增加。 2020 年第二季度，搜索引擎 PubMed 已经返回了超过 11,000 个搜索词“深度学习”的结果，其中约 90% 的出版物来自过去三年。然而，尽管 PubMed 代表了医学领域最大的搜索引擎，但它并没有涵盖所有与医学相关的出版物。因此，获得“医学深度学习”领域的完整概述几乎是不可能的，并且获得医学子领域的完整概述也变得越来越困难。尽管如此，过去几年已经发表了几篇关于医学深度学习的评论和调查文章。一般来说，他们专注于特定的医疗场景，例如分析包含特定病理的医学图像。以这些调查为基础，本文的目的是对医学 DL 调查进行首次高水平、系统的元审查。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在对医疗深度学习领域的综述进行首次系统性元回顾，总结现有研究并提供全面概述。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医疗领域应用迅速增长，但现有综述多聚焦特定场景，缺乏整体性概述，且PubMed等平台无法覆盖全部文献。
AI.method: 通过系统性回顾近年来医疗深度学习领域的综述文献，分析其研究主题、方法及趋势，整合形成元回顾框架。
AI.result: 梳理了医疗深度学习的主要研究方向、技术应用及挑战，指出现有综述的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为医疗深度学习领域提供了首个系统性元回顾，帮助研究者把握研究现状与趋势，促进跨学科协作与创新。

authors_text: Chuan Wen,Jierui Lin,Trevor Darrell,Dinesh Jayaraman,Yang Gao
title: Fighting Copycat Agents in Behavioral Cloning from Observation Histories
title_zh: 从观察历史中打击行为克隆中的模仿者
comment: Published at NeurIPS 2020 9 pages(exclude reference and appendices)
comments: Published at NeurIPS 2020 9 pages(exclude reference and appendices)
abstract: Imitation learning trains policies to map from input observations to the actions that an expert would choose. In this setting, distribution shift frequently exacerbates the effect of misattributing expert actions to nuisance correlates among the observed variables. We observe that a common instance of this causal confusion occurs in partially observed settings when expert actions are strongly correlated over time: the imitator learns to cheat by predicting the expert's previous action, rather than the next action. To combat this "copycat problem", we propose an adversarial approach to learn a feature representation that removes excess information about the previous expert action nuisance correlate, while retaining the information necessary to predict the next action. In our experiments, our approach improves performance significantly across a variety of partially observed imitation learning tasks.
summary: Imitation learning trains policies to map from input observations to the actions that an expert would choose. In this setting, distribution shift frequently exacerbates the effect of misattributing expert actions to nuisance correlates among the observed variables. We observe that a common instance of this causal confusion occurs in partially observed settings when expert actions are strongly correlated over time: the imitator learns to cheat by predicting the expert's previous action, rather than the next action. To combat this "copycat problem", we propose an adversarial approach to learn a feature representation that removes excess information about the previous expert action nuisance correlate, while retaining the information necessary to predict the next action. In our experiments, our approach improves performance significantly across a variety of partially observed imitation learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习训练策略将输入观察映射到专家选择的行动。在这种情况下，分布变化经常会加剧将专家行为错误归因于观察到的变量之间的滋扰相关性的影响。我们观察到，当专家的行为随着时间的推移密切相关时，这种因果混乱的常见情况发生在部分观察的环境中：模仿者通过预测专家之前的动作而不是下一个动作来学会作弊。为了解决这种“模仿问题”，我们提出了一种对抗性方法来学习特征表示，该方法可以删除有关先前专家操作滋扰关联的多余信息，同时保留预测下一个操作所需的信息。在我们的实验中，我们的方法显着提高了各种部分观察的模仿学习任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性方法，通过学习去除观测历史中关于专家先前动作的冗余信息，解决行为克隆中的‘模仿者问题’。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，模仿者可能通过记忆专家历史动作而非预测未来动作来作弊，导致策略性能下降。
AI.method: 设计对抗性特征表示，过滤掉专家先前动作的干扰信息，同时保留预测下一动作所需的关键信息。
AI.result: 在多种部分可观测的模仿学习任务中，该方法显著提升了策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过消除历史动作的冗余信息，该方法有效解决了行为克隆中的‘模仿者问题’，为部分可观测场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Sample-Optimal and Efficient Learning of Tree Ising models
title_zh: 树模型的样本优化和高效学习
abstract: We show that $n$-variable tree-structured Ising models can be learned computationally-efficiently to within total variation distance $ε$ from an optimal $O(n \ln n/ε^2)$ samples, where $O(\cdot)$ hides an absolute constant which, importantly, does not depend on the model being learned - neither its tree nor the magnitude of its edge strengths, on which we place no assumptions. Our guarantees hold, in fact, for the celebrated Chow-Liu [1968] algorithm, using the plug-in estimator for estimating mutual information. While this (or any other) algorithm may fail to identify the structure of the underlying model correctly from a finite sample, we show that it will still learn a tree-structured model that is $ε$-close to the true one in total variation distance, a guarantee called "proper learning." Our guarantees do not follow from known results for the Chow-Liu algorithm and the ensuing literature on learning graphical models, including a recent renaissance of algorithms on this learning challenge, which only yield asymptotic consistency results, or sample-inefficient and/or time-inefficient algorithms, unless further assumptions are placed on the graphical model, such as bounds on the "strengths" of the model's edges/hyperedges. While we establish guarantees for a widely known and simple algorithm, the analysis that this algorithm succeeds and is sample-optimal is quite complex, requiring a hierarchical classification of the edges into layers with different reconstruction guarantees, depending on their strength, combined with delicate uses of the subadditivity of the squared Hellinger distance over graphical models to control the error accumulation.
summary: We show that $n$-variable tree-structured Ising models can be learned computationally-efficiently to within total variation distance $ε$ from an optimal $O(n \ln n/ε^2)$ samples, where $O(\cdot)$ hides an absolute constant which, importantly, does not depend on the model being learned - neither its tree nor the magnitude of its edge strengths, on which we place no assumptions. Our guarantees hold, in fact, for the celebrated Chow-Liu [1968] algorithm, using the plug-in estimator for estimating mutual information. While this (or any other) algorithm may fail to identify the structure of the underlying model correctly from a finite sample, we show that it will still learn a tree-structured model that is $ε$-close to the true one in total variation distance, a guarantee called "proper learning." Our guarantees do not follow from known results for the Chow-Liu algorithm and the ensuing literature on learning graphical models, including a recent renaissance of algorithms on this learning challenge, which only yield asymptotic consistency results, or sample-inefficient and/or time-inefficient algorithms, unless further assumptions are placed on the graphical model, such as bounds on the "strengths" of the model's edges/hyperedges. While we establish guarantees for a widely known and simple algorithm, the analysis that this algorithm succeeds and is sample-optimal is quite complex, requiring a hierarchical classification of the edges into layers with different reconstruction guarantees, depending on their strength, combined with delicate uses of the subadditivity of the squared Hellinger distance over graphical models to control the error accumulation.
abstract_zh: 我们表明，$n$ 变量的树结构 Ising 模型可以在距最佳 $O(n \ln n/ε^2)$ 样本的总变异距离 $ε$ 内高效地学习，其中 $O(\cdot)$ 隐藏一个绝对常数，重要的是，该常数不依赖于正在学习的模型 - 既不依赖于其树也不依赖于其边缘强度的大小，我们对此不做任何假设。事实上，我们的保证适用于著名的 Chow-Liu [1968] 算法，使用插件估计器来估计互信息。虽然这个（或任何其他）算法可能无法从有限样本中正确识别基础模型的结构，但我们表明它仍然会学习一个树结构模型，该模型在总变异距离上接近真实模型，这种保证称为“正确学习”。我们的保证并不来自于 Chow-Liu 算法的已知结果以及随后有关学习图模型的文献，包括最近关于此学习挑战的算法的复兴，这些算法仅产生渐近一致性结果，或样本效率低下和/或时间效率低下的算法，除非对图模型进行进一步的假设，例如模型边缘/超边缘的“强度”的界限。虽然我们为广为人知且简单的算法建立了保证，但对该算法成功且样本最优的分析相当复杂，需要根据其强度将边缘分层分类为具有不同重建保证的层，并结合图形模型上平方海林格距离的次可加性的巧妙使用来控制误差累积。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何高效学习树状Ising模型，证明了在总变分距离ε内学习n变量模型仅需O(n ln n/ε²)样本，并且无需对模型结构或边强度做假设。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么需要强假设（如边强度限制），要么样本效率低下，而Chow-Liu算法虽简单但缺乏严格理论保证，因此需建立更优的学习理论框架。
AI.method: 基于Chow-Liu算法与互信息估计，通过分层边分类和平方Hellinger距离的次可加性控制误差累积，实现无需假设的样本复杂度分析。
AI.result: 证明Chow-Liu算法可实现样本最优学习，保证输出模型与真实模型总变分距离≤ε，且样本复杂度为O(n ln n/ε²)，突破传统方法的限制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次在无假设条件下严格证明Chow-Liu算法的样本最优性与效率，为图模型学习提供了新的理论基础，推动了无需先验知识的模型学习发展。

While this (or any other) algorithm may fail to identify the structure of the underlying model correctly from a finite sample, we show that it will still learn a tree-structured model that is $ε$-close to the true one in total variation distance, a guarantee called "proper learning." authors_text: Yu-Ping Wang,Zi-Xin Zou,Cong Wang,Yue-Jiang Dong,Lei Qiao,Dinesh Manocha
title: ORBBuf: A Robust Buffering Method for Remote Visual SLAM
title_zh: ORBBuf：一种用于远程视觉 SLAM 的鲁棒缓冲方法
abstract: The data loss caused by unreliable network seriously impacts the results of remote visual SLAM systems. From our experiment, a loss of less than 1 second of data can cause a visual SLAM algorithm to lose tracking. We present a novel buffering method, ORBBuf, to reduce the impact of data loss on remote visual SLAM systems. We model the buffering problem as an optimization problem by introducing a similarity metric between frames. To solve the buffering problem, we present an efficient greedy-like algorithm to discard the frames that have the least impact on the quality of SLAM results. We implement our ORBBuf method on ROS, a widely used middleware framework. Through an extensive evaluation on real-world scenarios and tens of gigabytes of datasets, we demonstrate that our ORBBuf method can be applied to different state-estimation algorithms (DSO and VINS-Fusion), different sensor data (both monocular images and stereo images), different scenes (both indoor and outdoor), and different network environments (both WiFi networks and 4G networks). Our experimental results indicate that the network losses indeed affect the SLAM results, and our ORBBuf method can reduce the RMSE up to 50 times comparing with the Drop-Oldest and Random buffering methods.
summary: The data loss caused by unreliable network seriously impacts the results of remote visual SLAM systems. From our experiment, a loss of less than 1 second of data can cause a visual SLAM algorithm to lose tracking. We present a novel buffering method, ORBBuf, to reduce the impact of data loss on remote visual SLAM systems. We model the buffering problem as an optimization problem by introducing a similarity metric between frames. To solve the buffering problem, we present an efficient greedy-like algorithm to discard the frames that have the least impact on the quality of SLAM results. We implement our ORBBuf method on ROS, a widely used middleware framework. Through an extensive evaluation on real-world scenarios and tens of gigabytes of datasets, we demonstrate that our ORBBuf method can be applied to different state-estimation algorithms (DSO and VINS-Fusion), different sensor data (both monocular images and stereo images), different scenes (both indoor and outdoor), and different network environments (both WiFi networks and 4G networks). Our experimental results indicate that the network losses indeed affect the SLAM results, and our ORBBuf method can reduce the RMSE up to 50 times comparing with the Drop-Oldest and Random buffering methods.
abstract_zh: 网络不可靠导致的数据丢失严重影响远程视觉SLAM系统的效果。根据我们的实验，不到 1 秒的数据丢失就会导致视觉 SLAM 算法失去跟踪。我们提出了一种新颖的缓冲方法 ORBBuf，以减少数据丢失对远程视觉 SLAM 系统的影响。我们通过引入帧之间的相似性度量将缓冲问题建模为优化问题。为了解决缓冲问题，我们提出了一种高效的类贪婪算法来丢弃对 SLAM 结果质量影响最小的帧。我们在 ROS（一种广泛使用的中间件框架）上实现了 ORBBuf 方法。通过对现实场景和数十GB数据集的广泛评估，我们证明了我们的ORBBuf方法可以应用于不同的状态估计算法（DSO和VINS-Fusion）、不同的传感器数据（单目图像和立体图像）、不同的场景（室内和室外）和不同的网络环境（WiFi网络和4G网络）。我们的实验结果表明，网络损耗确实会影响 SLAM 结果，并且与 Drop-Oldest 和 Random 缓冲方法相比，我们的 ORBBuf 方法可以将 RMSE 降低多达 50 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ORBBuf的鲁棒缓冲方法，用于减少远程视觉SLAM系统中数据丢失的影响。
AI.motivation: 不可靠网络导致的数据丢失会严重影响远程视觉SLAM系统的跟踪性能，即使短暂的数据丢失也可能导致跟踪失败。
AI.method: 将缓冲问题建模为优化问题，引入帧间相似性度量，并设计高效贪心算法丢弃对SLAM结果影响最小的帧，基于ROS实现该方法。
AI.result: 在真实场景和数十GB数据集上的实验表明，ORBBuf适用于不同算法（DSO/VINS-Fusion）、传感器（单目/双目）、场景（室内外）和网络环境（WiFi/4G），可使RMSE降低达50倍。
AI.conclusion: 网络数据丢失确实显著影响SLAM结果，而ORBBuf方法能有效缓解这一问题，显著优于传统丢弃策略。

search_text: ORBBuf: A Robust Buffering Method for Remote Visual SLAM ORBBuf：一种用于远程视觉 SLAM 的鲁棒缓冲方法 The data loss caused by unreliable network seriously impacts the results of remote visual SLAM systems. From our experiment, a loss of less than 1 second of data can cause a visual SLAM algorithm to lose tracking. We present a novel buffering method, ORBBuf, to reduce the impact of data loss on remote visual SLAM systems. We model the buffering problem as an optimization problem by introducing a similarity metric between frames. To solve the buffering problem, we present an efficient greedy-like algorithm to discard the frames that have the least impact on the quality of SLAM results. We implement our ORBBuf method on ROS, a widely used middleware framework. Through an extensive evaluation on real-world scenarios and tens of gigabytes of datasets, we demonstrate that our ORBBuf method can be applied to different state-estimation algorithms (DSO and VINS-Fusion), different sensor data (both monocular images and stereo images), different scenes (both indoor and outdoor), and different network environments (both WiFi networks and 4G networks). Our experimental results indicate that the network losses indeed affect the SLAM results, and our ORBBuf method can reduce the RMSE up to 50 times comparing with the Drop-Oldest and Random buffering methods. 网络不可靠导致的数据丢失严重影响远程视觉SLAM系统的效果。根据我们的实验，不到 1 秒的数据丢失就会导致视觉 SLAM 算法失去跟踪。我们提出了一种新颖的缓冲方法 ORBBuf，以减少数据丢失对远程视觉 SLAM 系统的影响。我们通过引入帧之间的相似性度量将缓冲问题建模为优化问题。为了解决缓冲问题，我们提出了一种高效的类贪婪算法来丢弃对 SLAM 结果质量影响最小的帧。我们在 ROS（一种广泛使用的中间件框架）上实现了 ORBBuf 方法。通过对现实场景和数十GB数据集的广泛评估，我们证明了我们的ORBBuf方法可以应用于不同的状态估计算法（DSO和VINS-Fusion）、不同的传感器数据（单目图像和立体图像）、不同的场景（室内和室外）和不同的网络环境（WiFi网络和4G网络）。我们的实验结果表明，网络损耗确实会影响 SLAM 结果，并且与 Drop-Oldest 和 Random 缓冲方法相比，我们的 ORBBuf 方法可以将 RMSE 降低多达 50 倍。 本文提出一种名为ORBBuf的鲁棒缓冲方法，用于减少远程视觉SLAM系统中数据丢失的影响。 Yu-Ping Wang,Zi-Xin Zou,Cong Wang,Yue-Jiang Dong,Lei Qiao,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

authors_text: Jianyuan Wang,Yiran Zhong,Yuchao Dai,Kaihao Zhang,Pan Ji,Hongdong Li
title: Displacement-Invariant Matching Cost Learning for Accurate Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: 用于精确光流估计的位移不变匹配成本学习
abstract: Learning matching costs has been shown to be critical to the success of the state-of-the-art deep stereo matching methods, in which 3D convolutions are applied on a 4D feature volume to learn a 3D cost volume. However, this mechanism has never been employed for the optical flow task. This is mainly due to the significantly increased search dimension in the case of optical flow computation, ie, a straightforward extension would require dense 4D convolutions in order to process a 5D feature volume, which is computationally prohibitive. This paper proposes a novel solution that is able to bypass the requirement of building a 5D feature volume while still allowing the network to learn suitable matching costs from data. Our key innovation is to decouple the connection between 2D displacements and learn the matching costs at each 2D displacement hypothesis independently, ie, displacement-invariant cost learning. Specifically, we apply the same 2D convolution-based matching net independently on each 2D displacement hypothesis to learn a 4D cost volume. Moreover, we propose a displacement-aware projection layer to scale the learned cost volume, which reconsiders the correlation between different displacement candidates and mitigates the multi-modal problem in the learned cost volume. The cost volume is then projected to optical flow estimation through a 2D soft-argmin layer. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on various datasets, and outperforms all published optical flow methods on the Sintel benchmark.
summary: Learning matching costs has been shown to be critical to the success of the state-of-the-art deep stereo matching methods, in which 3D convolutions are applied on a 4D feature volume to learn a 3D cost volume. However, this mechanism has never been employed for the optical flow task. This is mainly due to the significantly increased search dimension in the case of optical flow computation, ie, a straightforward extension would require dense 4D convolutions in order to process a 5D feature volume, which is computationally prohibitive. This paper proposes a novel solution that is able to bypass the requirement of building a 5D feature volume while still allowing the network to learn suitable matching costs from data. Our key innovation is to decouple the connection between 2D displacements and learn the matching costs at each 2D displacement hypothesis independently, ie, displacement-invariant cost learning. Specifically, we apply the same 2D convolution-based matching net independently on each 2D displacement hypothesis to learn a 4D cost volume. Moreover, we propose a displacement-aware projection layer to scale the learned cost volume, which reconsiders the correlation between different displacement candidates and mitigates the multi-modal problem in the learned cost volume. The cost volume is then projected to optical flow estimation through a 2D soft-argmin layer. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on various datasets, and outperforms all published optical flow methods on the Sintel benchmark.
abstract_zh: 学习匹配成本已被证明对于最先进的深度立体匹配方法的成功至关重要，其中将 3D 卷积应用于 4D 特征体以学习 3D 成本体。然而，这种机制从未用于光流任务。这主要是由于在光流计算的情况下搜索维度显着增加，即直接扩展需要密集的4D卷积才能处理5D特征量，这在计算上是令人望而却步的。本文提出了一种新颖的解决方案，能够绕过构建 5D 特征量的要求，同时仍然允许网络从数据中学习合适的匹配成本。我们的关键创新是解耦二维位移之间的联系，并独立学习每个二维位移假设的匹配成本，即位移不变成本学习。具体来说，我们对每个 2D 位移假设独立应用相同的基于 2D 卷积的匹配网络来学习 4D 成本量。此外，我们提出了一个位移感知投影层来缩放学习成本量，它重新考虑不同位移候选之间的相关性，并减轻学习成本量中的多模态问题。然后，通过 2D soft-argmin 层将成本量投影到光流估计。大量实验表明，我们的方法在各种数据集上实现了最先进的准确性，并且在 Sintel 基准测试上优于所有已发布的光流方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需构建5D特征体积的位移不变匹配成本学习方法，以提高光流估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D卷积的立体匹配方法难以直接扩展到光流任务，因光流计算需处理5D特征体积导致计算量过大。
AI.method: 通过解耦2D位移连接，在每个位移假设上独立应用2D卷积匹配网络学习4D成本体积，并引入位移感知投影层优化成本体积相关性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到最优精度，尤其在Sintel基准测试中超越所有已发布光流方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过位移不变成本学习有效避免了高维计算，为光流估计提供了高效且精确的解决方案。

title: Micro Stripes Analyses for Iris Presentation Attack Detection
title_zh: 用于虹膜呈现攻击检测的微条纹分析
comment: Accepted at International Join Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2020)
comments: Accepted at International Join Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2020)
abstract: Iris recognition systems are vulnerable to the presentation attacks, such as textured contact lenses or printed images. In this paper, we propose a lightweight framework to detect iris presentation attacks by extracting multiple micro-stripes of expanded normalized iris textures. In this procedure, a standard iris segmentation is modified. For our presentation attack detection network to better model the classification problem, the segmented area is processed to provide lower dimensional input segments and a higher number of learning samples. Our proposed Micro Stripes Analyses (MSA) solution samples the segmented areas as individual stripes. Then, the majority vote makes the final classification decision of those micro-stripes. Experiments are demonstrated on five databases, where two databases (IIITD-WVU and Notre Dame) are from the LivDet-2017 Iris competition. An in-depth experimental evaluation of this framework reveals a superior performance compared with state-of-the-art algorithms. Moreover, our solution minimizes the confusion between textured (attack) and soft (bona fide) contact lens presentations.
summary: Iris recognition systems are vulnerable to the presentation attacks, such as textured contact lenses or printed images. In this paper, we propose a lightweight framework to detect iris presentation attacks by extracting multiple micro-stripes of expanded normalized iris textures. In this procedure, a standard iris segmentation is modified. For our presentation attack detection network to better model the classification problem, the segmented area is processed to provide lower dimensional input segments and a higher number of learning samples. Our proposed Micro Stripes Analyses (MSA) solution samples the segmented areas as individual stripes. Then, the majority vote makes the final classification decision of those micro-stripes. Experiments are demonstrated on five databases, where two databases (IIITD-WVU and Notre Dame) are from the LivDet-2017 Iris competition. An in-depth experimental evaluation of this framework reveals a superior performance compared with state-of-the-art algorithms. Moreover, our solution minimizes the confusion between textured (attack) and soft (bona fide) contact lens presentations.
abstract_zh: 虹膜识别系统容易受到呈现攻击，例如纹理隐形眼镜或印刷图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级框架，通过提取扩展归一化虹膜纹理的多个微条纹来检测虹膜呈现攻击。在此过程中，修改了标准虹膜分割。为了我们的演示攻击检测网络更好地对分类问题进行建模，对分割区域进行处理以提供较低维度的输入片段和更多数量的学习样本。我们提出的微条纹分析 (MSA) 解决方案将分段区域采样为单独的条纹。然后，多数票做出这些微条纹的最终分类决定。在五个数据库上进行了实验演示，其中两个数据库（IIITD-WVU 和 Notre Dame）来自 LivDet-2017 Iris 竞赛。对该框架的深入实验评估表明，与最先进的算法相比，该框架具有优越的性能。此外，我们的解决方案最大限度地减少了纹理（攻击）和软（真正）隐形眼镜演示之间的混淆。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于微条纹分析的轻量级框架，用于检测虹膜呈现攻击。
AI.motivation: 虹膜识别系统易受纹理隐形眼镜或打印图像等攻击，需更有效的检测方法。
AI.method: 通过修改标准虹膜分割流程，提取扩展归一化纹理的微条纹，结合多数投票进行分类决策。
AI.result: 在五个数据库实验中优于现有算法，尤其减少纹理攻击与软隐形眼镜的混淆。
AI.conclusion: MSA方法在攻击检测性能和轻量化设计上均表现优异，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Micro Stripes Analyses for Iris Presentation Attack Detection 用于虹膜呈现攻击检测的微条纹分析 Iris recognition systems are vulnerable to the presentation attacks, such as textured contact lenses or printed images. In this paper, we propose a lightweight framework to detect iris presentation attacks by extracting multiple micro-stripes of expanded normalized iris textures. In this procedure, a standard iris segmentation is modified. For our presentation attack detection network to better model the classification problem, the segmented area is processed to provide lower dimensional input segments and a higher number of learning samples. Our proposed Micro Stripes Analyses (MSA) solution samples the segmented areas as individual stripes. Then, the majority vote makes the final classification decision of those micro-stripes. Experiments are demonstrated on five databases, where two databases (IIITD-WVU and Notre Dame) are from the LivDet-2017 Iris competition. An in-depth experimental evaluation of this framework reveals a superior performance compared with state-of-the-art algorithms. Moreover, our solution minimizes the confusion between textured (attack) and soft (bona fide) contact lens presentations. 虹膜识别系统容易受到呈现攻击，例如纹理隐形眼镜或印刷图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级框架，通过提取扩展归一化虹膜纹理的多个微条纹来检测虹膜呈现攻击。在此过程中，修改了标准虹膜分割。为了我们的演示攻击检测网络更好地对分类问题进行建模，对分割区域进行处理以提供较低维度的输入片段和更多数量的学习样本。我们提出的微条纹分析 (MSA) 解决方案将分段区域采样为单独的条纹。然后，多数票做出这些微条纹的最终分类决定。在五个数据库上进行了实验演示，其中两个数据库（IIITD-WVU 和 Notre Dame）来自 LivDet-2017 Iris 竞赛。对该框架的深入实验评估表明，与最先进的算法相比，该框架具有优越的性能。此外，我们的解决方案最大限度地减少了纹理（攻击）和软（真正）隐形眼镜演示之间的混淆。 本文提出一种基于微条纹分析的轻量级框架，用于检测虹膜呈现攻击。 Meiling Fang,Naser Damer,Florian Kirchbuchner,Arjan Kuijper cs.CV

authors_text: Yiwu Yao,Yuchao Li,Chengyu Wang,Tianhang Yu,Houjiang Chen,Xiaotang Jiang,Jun Yang,Jun Huang,Wei Lin,Hui Shu,Chengfei Lv
title: INT8 Winograd Acceleration for Conv1D Equipped ASR Models Deployed on Mobile Devices
title_zh: 针对部署在移动设备上的配备 Conv1D 的 ASR 模型的 INT8 Winograd 加速
abstract: The intensive computation of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models obstructs them from being deployed on mobile devices. In this paper, we present a novel quantized Winograd optimization pipeline, which combines the quantization and fast convolution to achieve efficient inference acceleration on mobile devices for ASR models. To avoid the information loss due to the combination of quantization and Winograd convolution, a Range-Scaled Quantization (RSQ) training method is proposed to expand the quantized numerical range and to distill knowledge from high-precision values. Moreover, an improved Conv1D equipped DFSMN (ConvDFSMN) model is designed for mobile deployment. We conduct extensive experiments on both ConvDFSMN and Wav2letter models. Results demonstrate the models can be effectively optimized with the proposed pipeline. Especially, Wav2letter achieves 1.48* speedup with an approximate 0.07% WER decrease on ARMv7-based mobile devices.
summary: The intensive computation of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models obstructs them from being deployed on mobile devices. In this paper, we present a novel quantized Winograd optimization pipeline, which combines the quantization and fast convolution to achieve efficient inference acceleration on mobile devices for ASR models. To avoid the information loss due to the combination of quantization and Winograd convolution, a Range-Scaled Quantization (RSQ) training method is proposed to expand the quantized numerical range and to distill knowledge from high-precision values. Moreover, an improved Conv1D equipped DFSMN (ConvDFSMN) model is designed for mobile deployment. We conduct extensive experiments on both ConvDFSMN and Wav2letter models. Results demonstrate the models can be effectively optimized with the proposed pipeline. Especially, Wav2letter achieves 1.48* speedup with an approximate 0.07% WER decrease on ARMv7-based mobile devices.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）模型的密集计算阻碍了它们在移动设备上的部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的量化 Winograd 优化管道，它将量化和快速卷积相结合，以在移动设备上实现 ASR 模型的高效推理加速。为了避免量化和 Winograd 卷积相结合造成的信息丢失，提出了一种范围缩放量化（RSQ）训练方法来扩展量化数值范围并从高精度值中提取知识。此外，改进的配备Conv1D的DFSMN（ConvDFSMN）模型专为移动部署而设计。我们对 ConvDFSMN 和 Wav2letter 模型进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，可以使用所提出的管道有效优化模型。特别是，Wav2letter 在基于 ARMv7 的移动设备上实现了 1.48* 的加速，同时 WER 降低了约 0.07%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合INT8量化和Winograd加速的优化方法，用于在移动设备上高效部署卷积一维（Conv1D）语音识别模型。
AI.motivation: 自动语音识别（ASR）模型计算量大，难以在计算资源受限的移动设备上部署，需通过优化算法提升推理效率。
AI.method: 设计量化Winograd优化流水线，结合范围缩放量化（RSQ）训练方法减少信息损失，并改进Conv1D结构的深度前馈序列记忆网络（ConvDFSMN）模型以适应移动端。
AI.result: 实验表明，Wav2letter模型在ARMv7移动设备上实现1.48倍加速，词错误率（WER）仅增加0.07%；ConvDFSMN模型也表现出有效优化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化方法在保持模型精度的同时显著提升移动端ASR模型推理速度，为轻量化部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Utsav Patel,Nithish Kumar,Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Dinesh Manocha
title: Dynamically Feasible Deep Reinforcement Learning Policy for Robot Navigation in Dense Mobile Crowds
title_zh: 密集移动人群中机器人导航的动态可行深度强化学习策略
abstract: We present a novel Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) based policy to compute dynamically feasible and spatially aware velocities for a robot navigating among mobile obstacles. Our approach combines the benefits of the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) in terms of satisfying the robot's dynamics constraints with state-of-the-art DRL-based navigation methods that can handle moving obstacles and pedestrians well. Our formulation achieves these goals by embedding the environmental obstacles' motions in a novel low-dimensional observation space. It also uses a novel reward function to positively reinforce velocities that move the robot away from the obstacle's heading direction leading to significantly lower number of collisions. We evaluate our method in realistic 3-D simulated environments and on a real differential drive robot in challenging dense indoor scenarios with several walking pedestrians. We compare our method with state-of-the-art collision avoidance methods and observe significant improvements in terms of success rate (up to 33\% increase), number of dynamics constraint violations (up to 61\% decrease), and smoothness. We also conduct ablation studies to highlight the advantages of our observation space formulation, and reward structure.
summary: We present a novel Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) based policy to compute dynamically feasible and spatially aware velocities for a robot navigating among mobile obstacles. Our approach combines the benefits of the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) in terms of satisfying the robot's dynamics constraints with state-of-the-art DRL-based navigation methods that can handle moving obstacles and pedestrians well. Our formulation achieves these goals by embedding the environmental obstacles' motions in a novel low-dimensional observation space. It also uses a novel reward function to positively reinforce velocities that move the robot away from the obstacle's heading direction leading to significantly lower number of collisions. We evaluate our method in realistic 3-D simulated environments and on a real differential drive robot in challenging dense indoor scenarios with several walking pedestrians. We compare our method with state-of-the-art collision avoidance methods and observe significant improvements in terms of success rate (up to 33\% increase), number of dynamics constraint violations (up to 61\% decrease), and smoothness. We also conduct ablation studies to highlight the advantages of our observation space formulation, and reward structure.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的新颖策略，用于计算机器人在移动障碍物中导航的动态可行且空间感知的速度。我们的方法结合了动态窗口方法（DWA）在满足机器人动力学约束方面的优点和最先进的基于 DRL 的导航方法，可以很好地处理移动障碍物和行人。我们的公式通过将环境障碍物的运动嵌入到新颖的低维观察空间中来实现这些目标。它还使用新颖的奖励函数来积极增强机器人远离障碍物前进方向的速度，从而显着减少碰撞次数。我们在真实的 3D 模拟环境和真实的差动驱动机器人上评估我们的方法，以应对具有多个步行行人的密集室内场景。我们将我们的方法与最先进的防撞方法进行比较，并观察到在成功率（增加高达 33%）、违反动力学约束的数量（减少高达 61%）和平滑度方面的显着改进。我们还进行消融研究，以突出我们的观察空间制定和奖励结构的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习（DRL）与动态窗口方法（DWA）的策略，用于解决密集移动人群中机器人的动态可行导航问题。
AI.motivation: 传统DWA方法难以处理复杂动态障碍物场景，而现有DRL方法常忽略机器人动力学约束，需设计兼顾动态可行性与避障能力的新策略。
AI.method: 通过构建嵌入障碍物运动信息的低维观察空间，并设计引导机器人远离障碍物运动方向的奖励函数，将DWA动力学约束与DRL决策能力相结合。
AI.result: 在3D仿真和真实机器人实验中，成功率提升33%，动力学约束违反减少61%，运动平滑性显著改善，消融实验验证了观察空间与奖励函数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效融合了DWA与DRL优势，在密集动态场景中实现了更安全、平滑的机器人导航，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了新思路。

We evaluate our method in realistic 3-D simulated environments and on a real differential drive robot in challenging dense indoor scenarios with several walking pedestrians. We compare our method with state-of-the-art collision avoidance methods and observe significant improvements in terms of success rate (up to 33\% increase), number of dynamics constraint violations (up to 61\% decrease), and smoothness. We also conduct ablation studies to highlight the advantages of our observation space formulation, and reward structure. 我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的新颖策略，用于计算机器人在移动障碍物中导航的动态可行且空间感知的速度。我们的方法结合了动态窗口方法（DWA）在满足机器人动力学约束方面的优点和最先进的基于 DRL 的导航方法，可以很好地处理移动障碍物和行人。我们的公式通过将环境障碍物的运动嵌入到新颖的低维观察空间中来实现这些目标。它还使用新颖的奖励函数来积极增强机器人远离障碍物前进方向的速度，从而显着减少碰撞次数。我们在真实的 3D 模拟环境和真实的差动驱动机器人上评估我们的方法，以应对具有多个步行行人的密集室内场景。我们将我们的方法与最先进的防撞方法进行比较，并观察到在成功率（增加高达 33%）、违反动力学约束的数量（减少高达 61%）和平滑度方面的显着改进。我们还进行消融研究，以突出我们的观察空间制定和奖励结构的优势。 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习（DRL）与动态窗口方法（DWA）的策略，用于解决密集移动人群中机器人的动态可行导航问题。 Utsav Patel,Nithish Kumar,Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

title: DeepQ Stepper: A framework for reactive dynamic walking on uneven terrain
title_zh: DeepQ Stepper：在不平坦地形上进行反应式动态行走的框架
abstract: Reactive stepping and push recovery for biped robots is often restricted to flat terrains because of the difficulty in computing capture regions for nonlinear dynamic models. In this paper, we address this limitation by using reinforcement learning to approximately learn the 3D capture region for such systems. We propose a novel 3D reactive stepper, The DeepQ stepper, that computes optimal step locations for walking at different velocities using the 3D capture regions approximated by the action-value function. We demonstrate the ability of the approach to learn stepping with a simplified 3D pendulum model and a full robot dynamics. Further, the stepper achieves a higher performance when it learns approximate capture regions while taking into account the entire dynamics of the robot that are often ignored in existing reactive steppers based on simplified models. The DeepQ stepper can handle non convex terrain with obstacles, walk on restricted surfaces like stepping stones and recover from external disturbances for a constant computational cost.
summary: Reactive stepping and push recovery for biped robots is often restricted to flat terrains because of the difficulty in computing capture regions for nonlinear dynamic models. In this paper, we address this limitation by using reinforcement learning to approximately learn the 3D capture region for such systems. We propose a novel 3D reactive stepper, The DeepQ stepper, that computes optimal step locations for walking at different velocities using the 3D capture regions approximated by the action-value function. We demonstrate the ability of the approach to learn stepping with a simplified 3D pendulum model and a full robot dynamics. Further, the stepper achieves a higher performance when it learns approximate capture regions while taking into account the entire dynamics of the robot that are often ignored in existing reactive steppers based on simplified models. The DeepQ stepper can handle non convex terrain with obstacles, walk on restricted surfaces like stepping stones and recover from external disturbances for a constant computational cost.
abstract_zh: 由于计算非线性动态模型的捕获区域很困难，双足机器人的反应式步进和推动恢复通常仅限于平坦的地形。在本文中，我们通过使用强化学习来近似学习此类系统的 3D 捕获区域来解决此限制。我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 反应式步进器 DeepQ 步进器，它使用由动作值函数近似的 3D 捕获区域来计算以不同速度行走的最佳步进位置。我们通过简化的 3D 摆模型和完整的机器人动力学演示了该方法学习步进的能力。此外，当步进器学习近似捕获区域时，同时考虑到机器人的整个动态特性，而这在基于简化模型的现有反应式步进器中经常被忽略，因此它可以实现更高的性能。 DeepQ 步进器可以处理有障碍物的非凸地形，在踏脚石等受限表面上行走，并以恒定的计算成本从外部干扰中恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepQ Stepper框架，通过强化学习近似学习三维捕获区域，实现双足机器人在复杂地形上的动态行走与推力恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人反应式步态和推力恢复方法受限于平坦地形，因非线性动态模型的捕获区域计算复杂，难以适应复杂地形。
AI.method: 利用强化学习近似学习三维捕获区域，设计DeepQ Stepper框架，基于动作价值函数计算不同速度下的最优步态位置，并考虑机器人完整动力学模型。
AI.result: 方法在简化三维摆锤模型和完整机器人动力学中验证有效，可处理非凸地形、石板路等受限表面，并实现恒定计算成本下的外部扰动恢复。
AI.conclusion: DeepQ Stepper通过整合完整机器人动力学，提升了复杂地形下的步态生成性能，为动态行走提供了高效解决方案。

title: Deep Manifold Transformation for Nonlinear Dimensionality Reduction
title_zh: 用于非线性降维的深度流形变换
abstract: Manifold learning-based encoders have been playing important roles in nonlinear dimensionality reduction (NLDR) for data exploration. However, existing methods can often fail to preserve geometric, topological and/or distributional structures of data. In this paper, we propose a deep manifold learning framework, called deep manifold transformation (DMT) for unsupervised NLDR and embedding learning. DMT enhances deep neural networks by using cross-layer local geometry-preserving (LGP) constraints. The LGP constraints constitute the loss for deep manifold learning and serve as geometric regularizers for NLDR network training. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world data demonstrate that DMT networks outperform existing leading manifold-based NLDR methods in terms of preserving the structures of data.
summary: Manifold learning-based encoders have been playing important roles in nonlinear dimensionality reduction (NLDR) for data exploration. However, existing methods can often fail to preserve geometric, topological and/or distributional structures of data. In this paper, we propose a deep manifold learning framework, called deep manifold transformation (DMT) for unsupervised NLDR and embedding learning. DMT enhances deep neural networks by using cross-layer local geometry-preserving (LGP) constraints. The LGP constraints constitute the loss for deep manifold learning and serve as geometric regularizers for NLDR network training. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world data demonstrate that DMT networks outperform existing leading manifold-based NLDR methods in terms of preserving the structures of data.
abstract_zh: 基于流形学习的编码器在数据探索的非线性降维（NLDR）中发挥着重要作用。然而，现有方法通常无法保留数据的几何、拓扑和/或分布结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度流形学习框架，称为深度流形变换（DMT），用于无监督 NLDR 和嵌入学习。 DMT 通过使用跨层局部几何保留 (LGP) 约束来增强深度神经网络。 LGP 约束构成深度流形学习的损失，并充当 NLDR 网络训练的几何正则化器。对合成数据和真实世界数据的大量实验表明，DMT 网络在保留数据结构方面优于现有领先的基于流形的 NLDR 方法。

AI.tldr: 提出深度流形变换（DMT）框架，用于非线性降维，以更好地保留数据的几何、拓扑和分布结构。
AI.motivation: 现有流形学习方法在保留数据的几何、拓扑和分布结构方面存在不足，需改进。
AI.method: 通过跨层局部几何保持（LGP）约束作为损失函数和几何正则化器，增强深度神经网络。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，DMT在保留数据结构方面优于现有主流流形降维方法。
AI.conclusion: DMT框架有效提升了非线性降维性能，适用于无监督嵌入学习任务。

title: Receptor Saturation Modeling for Synaptic DMC
title_zh: 突触 DMC 的受体饱和建模
comment: 6 pages, 1 table, 4 figures. Presented at the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC)
comments: 6 pages, 1 table, 4 figures. Presented at the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC)
abstract: Synaptic communication is a natural Molecular Communication (MC) system which may serve as a blueprint for the design of synthetic MC systems. In particular, it features highly specialized mechanisms to enable inter-symbol interference (ISI)-free and energy efficient communication. The understanding of synaptic MC is furthermore critical for disruptive innovations in the context of brain-machine interfaces. However, the physical modeling of synaptic MC is complicated by the possible saturation of the molecular receiver arising from the competition of postsynaptic receptors for neurotransmitters. Saturation renders the system behavior nonlinear and is commonly neglected in existing analytical models. In this work, we propose a novel model for receptor saturation in terms of a nonlinear, state-dependent boundary condition for Fick's diffusion equation. We solve the resulting boundary-value problem using an eigenfunction expansion of the Laplace operator and the incorporation of the receiver memory as feedback system into the corresponding state-space description. The presented solution is numerically stable and computationally efficient. Furthermore, the proposed model is validated with particle-based stochastic computer simulations.
summary: Synaptic communication is a natural Molecular Communication (MC) system which may serve as a blueprint for the design of synthetic MC systems. In particular, it features highly specialized mechanisms to enable inter-symbol interference (ISI)-free and energy efficient communication. The understanding of synaptic MC is furthermore critical for disruptive innovations in the context of brain-machine interfaces. However, the physical modeling of synaptic MC is complicated by the possible saturation of the molecular receiver arising from the competition of postsynaptic receptors for neurotransmitters. Saturation renders the system behavior nonlinear and is commonly neglected in existing analytical models. In this work, we propose a novel model for receptor saturation in terms of a nonlinear, state-dependent boundary condition for Fick's diffusion equation. We solve the resulting boundary-value problem using an eigenfunction expansion of the Laplace operator and the incorporation of the receiver memory as feedback system into the corresponding state-space description. The presented solution is numerically stable and computationally efficient. Furthermore, the proposed model is validated with particle-based stochastic computer simulations.
abstract_zh: 突触通讯是一种自然的分子通讯（MC）系统，可以作为合成 MC 系统设计的蓝图。特别是，它具有高度专业化的机制，可实现无码间干扰 (ISI) 且节能的通信。此外，对突触 MC 的理解对于脑机接口领域的颠覆性创新至关重要。然而，由于突触后受体与神经递质的竞争而导致分子接收器可能饱和，因此突触 MC 的物理建模变得复杂。饱和度使系统行为呈非线性，并且在现有分析模型中通常被忽略。在这项工作中，我们根据菲克扩散方程的非线性、状态相关边界条件提出了一种新的受体饱和模型。我们使用拉普拉斯算子的本征函数展开以及将接收器存储器作为反馈系统合并到相应的状态空间描述中来解决由此产生的边值问题。所提出的解决方案数值稳定且计算效率高。此外，所提出的模型通过基于粒子的随机计算机模拟进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的突触分子通信中受体饱和的非线性边界条件模型，以提高系统行为的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有突触通信模型忽略受体饱和导致的非线性特性，而饱和现象对脑机接口等应用的创新至关重要。
AI.method: 通过将接收器记忆反馈纳入状态空间描述，并结合拉普拉斯算子的本征函数展开法求解扩散方程边界值问题。
AI.result: 提出模型具有数值稳定性与计算效率，并通过粒子级随机模拟验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为合成分子通信系统设计及脑机接口技术提供了更精确的物理建模基础。

tldr: 本文提出一种新的突触分子通信中受体饱和的非线性边界条件模型，以提高系统行为的准确性。
motivation: 现有突触通信模型忽略受体饱和导致的非线性特性，而饱和现象对脑机接口等应用的创新至关重要。
method: 通过将接收器记忆反馈纳入状态空间描述，并结合拉普拉斯算子的本征函数展开法求解扩散方程边界值问题。
result: 提出模型具有数值稳定性与计算效率，并通过粒子级随机模拟验证了其有效性。
conclusion: 该模型为合成分子通信系统设计及脑机接口技术提供了更精确的物理建模基础。
search_text: Receptor Saturation Modeling for Synaptic DMC 突触 DMC 的受体饱和建模 Synaptic communication is a natural Molecular Communication (MC) system which may serve as a blueprint for the design of synthetic MC systems. In particular, it features highly specialized mechanisms to enable inter-symbol interference (ISI)-free and energy efficient communication. The understanding of synaptic MC is furthermore critical for disruptive innovations in the context of brain-machine interfaces. However, the physical modeling of synaptic MC is complicated by the possible saturation of the molecular receiver arising from the competition of postsynaptic receptors for neurotransmitters. Saturation renders the system behavior nonlinear and is commonly neglected in existing analytical models. In this work, we propose a novel model for receptor saturation in terms of a nonlinear, state-dependent boundary condition for Fick's diffusion equation. We solve the resulting boundary-value problem using an eigenfunction expansion of the Laplace operator and the incorporation of the receiver memory as feedback system into the corresponding state-space description. The presented solution is numerically stable and computationally efficient. Furthermore, the proposed model is validated with particle-based stochastic computer simulations. 突触通讯是一种自然的分子通讯（MC）系统，可以作为合成 MC 系统设计的蓝图。特别是，它具有高度专业化的机制，可实现无码间干扰 (ISI) 且节能的通信。此外，对突触 MC 的理解对于脑机接口领域的颠覆性创新至关重要。然而，由于突触后受体与神经递质的竞争而导致分子接收器可能饱和，因此突触 MC 的物理建模变得复杂。饱和度使系统行为呈非线性，并且在现有分析模型中通常被忽略。在这项工作中，我们根据菲克扩散方程的非线性、状态相关边界条件提出了一种新的受体饱和模型。我们使用拉普拉斯算子的本征函数展开以及将接收器存储器作为反馈系统合并到相应的状态空间描述中来解决由此产生的边值问题。所提出的解决方案数值稳定且计算效率高。此外，所提出的模型通过基于粒子的随机计算机模拟进行了验证。 本文提出一种新的突触分子通信中受体饱和的非线性边界条件模型，以提高系统行为的准确性。 Sebastian Lotter,Maximilian Schäfer,Johannes Zeitler,Robert Schober cs.ET,cs.IT,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Kai Han,Yunhe Wang,Qiulin Zhang,Wei Zhang,Chunjing Xu,Tong Zhang
title: Model Rubik's Cube: Twisting Resolution, Depth and Width for TinyNets
title_zh: 魔方模型：调整 TinyNets 的分辨率、深度和宽度
abstract: To obtain excellent deep neural architectures, a series of techniques are carefully designed in EfficientNets. The giant formula for simultaneously enlarging the resolution, depth and width provides us a Rubik's cube for neural networks. So that we can find networks with high efficiency and excellent performance by twisting the three dimensions. This paper aims to explore the twisting rules for obtaining deep neural networks with minimum model sizes and computational costs. Different from the network enlarging, we observe that resolution and depth are more important than width for tiny networks. Therefore, the original method, i.e., the compound scaling in EfficientNet is no longer suitable. To this end, we summarize a tiny formula for downsizing neural architectures through a series of smaller models derived from the EfficientNet-B0 with the FLOPs constraint. Experimental results on the ImageNet benchmark illustrate that our TinyNet performs much better than the smaller version of EfficientNets using the inversed giant formula. For instance, our TinyNet-E achieves a 59.9% Top-1 accuracy with only 24M FLOPs, which is about 1.9% higher than that of the previous best MobileNetV3 with similar computational cost. Code will be available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/ghostnet/tree/master/tinynet_pytorch, and https://gitee.com/mindspore/mindspore/tree/master/model_zoo/research/cv/tinynet.
summary: To obtain excellent deep neural architectures, a series of techniques are carefully designed in EfficientNets. The giant formula for simultaneously enlarging the resolution, depth and width provides us a Rubik's cube for neural networks. So that we can find networks with high efficiency and excellent performance by twisting the three dimensions. This paper aims to explore the twisting rules for obtaining deep neural networks with minimum model sizes and computational costs. Different from the network enlarging, we observe that resolution and depth are more important than width for tiny networks. Therefore, the original method, i.e., the compound scaling in EfficientNet is no longer suitable. To this end, we summarize a tiny formula for downsizing neural architectures through a series of smaller models derived from the EfficientNet-B0 with the FLOPs constraint. Experimental results on the ImageNet benchmark illustrate that our TinyNet performs much better than the smaller version of EfficientNets using the inversed giant formula. For instance, our TinyNet-E achieves a 59.9% Top-1 accuracy with only 24M FLOPs, which is about 1.9% higher than that of the previous best MobileNetV3 with similar computational cost. Code will be available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/ghostnet/tree/master/tinynet_pytorch, and https://gitee.com/mindspore/mindspore/tree/master/model_zoo/research/cv/tinynet.
abstract_zh: 为了获得优秀的深度神经架构，EfficientNets 中精心设计了一系列技术。同时扩大分辨率、深度和宽度的巨大公式为我们提供了神经网络的魔方。这样我们就可以通过扭转三个维度来找到高效、性能优异的网络。本文旨在探索获得具有最小模型大小和计算成本的深度神经网络的扭曲规则。与网络放大不同，我们观察到对于微型网络来说，分辨率和深度比宽度更重要。因此，原来的方法，即EfficientNet中的复合缩放已经不再适用。为此，我们总结了一个小公式，通过从具有 FLOPs 约束的 EfficientNet-B0 派生的一系列较小模型来缩小神经架构的规模。 ImageNet 基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的 TinyNet 的性能比使用反转巨公式的较小版本的 EfficientNets 好得多。例如，我们的 TinyNet-E 仅用 24M FLOP 就实现了 59.9% 的 Top-1 精度，比之前具有类似计算成本的最佳 MobileNetV3 高出约 1.9%。代码可在 https://github.com/huawei-noah/ghostnet/tree/master/tinynet_pytorch 和 https://gitee.com/mindspore/mindspore/tree/master/model_zoo/research/cv/tinynet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TinyNet的模型，通过调整分辨率、深度和宽度，以在最小模型大小和计算成本下获得高效的深度神经网络。
AI.motivation: EfficientNet通过同时扩大分辨率、深度和宽度来设计高效网络，但这种方法并不适用于小型网络，因为分辨率和深度比宽度更重要。
AI.method: 本文通过从EfficientNet-B0中推导出一系列小型模型，并在FLOPs约束下总结出一个小型化公式，以调整网络的三个维度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，TinyNet-E在ImageNet基准测试中以24M FLOPs实现了59.9%的Top-1准确率，比类似计算成本的MobileNetV3高出约1.9%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为设计小型高效网络提供了一种新的思路，通过调整分辨率和深度来优化模型性能。

authors_text: Quan Kong,Wenpeng Wei,Ziwei Deng,Tomoaki Yoshinaga,Tomokazu Murakami
title: Cycle-Contrast for Self-Supervised Video Representation Learning
title_zh: 自监督视频表示学习的循环对比
abstract: We present Cycle-Contrastive Learning (CCL), a novel self-supervised method for learning video representation. Following a nature that there is a belong and inclusion relation of video and its frames, CCL is designed to find correspondences across frames and videos considering the contrastive representation in their domains respectively. It is different from recent approaches that merely learn correspondences across frames or clips. In our method, the frame and video representations are learned from a single network based on an R3D architecture, with a shared non-linear transformation for embedding both frame and video features before the cycle-contrastive loss. We demonstrate that the video representation learned by CCL can be transferred well to downstream tasks of video understanding, outperforming previous methods in nearest neighbour retrieval and action recognition tasks on UCF101, HMDB51 and MMAct.
summary: We present Cycle-Contrastive Learning (CCL), a novel self-supervised method for learning video representation. Following a nature that there is a belong and inclusion relation of video and its frames, CCL is designed to find correspondences across frames and videos considering the contrastive representation in their domains respectively. It is different from recent approaches that merely learn correspondences across frames or clips. In our method, the frame and video representations are learned from a single network based on an R3D architecture, with a shared non-linear transformation for embedding both frame and video features before the cycle-contrastive loss. We demonstrate that the video representation learned by CCL can be transferred well to downstream tasks of video understanding, outperforming previous methods in nearest neighbour retrieval and action recognition tasks on UCF101, HMDB51 and MMAct.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了循环对比学习（CCL），这是一种用于学习视频表示的新型自监督方法。遵循视频及其帧之间存在归属和包含关系的性质，CCL 旨在分别考虑帧和视频域中的对比表示来查找帧和视频之间的对应关系。它与最近仅学习帧或剪辑之间的对应关系的方法不同。在我们的方法中，帧和视频表示是从基于 R3D 架构的单个网络学习的，具有共享的非线性变换，用于在循环对比损失之前嵌入帧和视频特征。我们证明，CCL 学习的视频表示可以很好地迁移到视频理解的下游任务，在 UCF101、HMDB51 和 MMAct 上的最近邻检索和动作识别任务中优于先前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cycle-Contrastive Learning (CCL)的自监督方法，用于学习视频表示，通过考虑视频与其帧之间的归属关系来建立跨帧和视频的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅学习帧或片段间的对应关系，忽略了视频与帧之间的整体关联，导致视频表示学习效果有限。
AI.method: 基于R3D架构设计单网络，通过共享非线性变换对帧和视频特征进行嵌入，并引入循环对比损失函数，联合优化帧与视频表示。
AI.result: CCL在UCF101、HMDB51和MMAct数据集的最近邻检索和动作识别任务中优于先前方法，证明了其表示迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模视频与帧的对比关系，CCL能够学习到更具判别性的视频表示，为下游任务提供了更优的特征表达。

authors_text: Jun Ma,Yao Zhang,Song Gu,Cheng Zhu,Cheng Ge,Yichi Zhang,Xingle An,Congcong Wang,Qiyuan Wang,Xin Liu,Shucheng Cao,Qi Zhang,Shangqing Liu,Yunpeng Wang,Yuhui Li,Jian He,Xiaoping Yang
title: AbdomenCT-1K: Is Abdominal Organ Segmentation A Solved Problem?
title_zh: AbdomenCT-1K：腹部器官分割问题已解决吗？
abstract: With the unprecedented developments in deep learning, automatic segmentation of main abdominal organs seems to be a solved problem as state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods have achieved comparable results with inter-rater variability on many benchmark datasets. However, most of the existing abdominal datasets only contain single-center, single-phase, single-vendor, or single-disease cases, and it is unclear whether the excellent performance can generalize on diverse datasets. This paper presents a large and diverse abdominal CT organ segmentation dataset, termed AbdomenCT-1K, with more than 1000 (1K) CT scans from 12 medical centers, including multi-phase, multi-vendor, and multi-disease cases. Furthermore, we conduct a large-scale study for liver, kidney, spleen, and pancreas segmentation and reveal the unsolved segmentation problems of the SOTA methods, such as the limited generalization ability on distinct medical centers, phases, and unseen diseases. To advance the unsolved problems, we further build four organ segmentation benchmarks for fully supervised, semi-supervised, weakly supervised, and continual learning, which are currently challenging and active research topics. Accordingly, we develop a simple and effective method for each benchmark, which can be used as out-of-the-box methods and strong baselines. We believe the AbdomenCT-1K dataset will promote future in-depth research towards clinical applicable abdominal organ segmentation methods. The datasets, codes, and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/JunMa11/AbdomenCT-1K.
summary: With the unprecedented developments in deep learning, automatic segmentation of main abdominal organs seems to be a solved problem as state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods have achieved comparable results with inter-rater variability on many benchmark datasets. However, most of the existing abdominal datasets only contain single-center, single-phase, single-vendor, or single-disease cases, and it is unclear whether the excellent performance can generalize on diverse datasets. This paper presents a large and diverse abdominal CT organ segmentation dataset, termed AbdomenCT-1K, with more than 1000 (1K) CT scans from 12 medical centers, including multi-phase, multi-vendor, and multi-disease cases. Furthermore, we conduct a large-scale study for liver, kidney, spleen, and pancreas segmentation and reveal the unsolved segmentation problems of the SOTA methods, such as the limited generalization ability on distinct medical centers, phases, and unseen diseases. To advance the unsolved problems, we further build four organ segmentation benchmarks for fully supervised, semi-supervised, weakly supervised, and continual learning, which are currently challenging and active research topics. Accordingly, we develop a simple and effective method for each benchmark, which can be used as out-of-the-box methods and strong baselines. We believe the AbdomenCT-1K dataset will promote future in-depth research towards clinical applicable abdominal organ segmentation methods. The datasets, codes, and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/JunMa11/AbdomenCT-1K.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习空前的发展，主要腹部器官的自动分割似乎已成为一个已解决的问题，因为最先进的（SOTA）方法已经在许多基准数据集上取得了与评估者间变异性相当的结果。然而，大多数现有的腹部数据集仅包含单中心、单阶段、单供应商或单疾病病例，并且尚不清楚优异的性能是否可以推广到不同的数据集。本文提出了一个大型且多样化的腹部 CT 器官分割数据集，称为 AbdomenCT-1K，包含来自 12 个医疗中心的 1000 多个 (1K) CT 扫描，包括多阶段、多供应商和多疾病病例。此外，我们对肝脏、肾脏、脾脏和胰腺分割进行了大规模研究，揭示了 SOTA 方法尚未解决的分割问题，例如对不同医疗中心、阶段和未见疾病的泛化能力有限。为了推进未解决的问题，我们进一步建立了全监督、半监督、弱监督和持续学习的四个器官分割基准，这是目前具有挑战性和活跃的研究课题。因此，我们为每个基准开发了一种简单有效的方法，可以用作开箱即用的方法和强大的基线。我们相信 AbdomenCT-1K 数据集将促进未来对临床适用的腹部器官分割方法的深入研究。数据集、代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/JunMa11/AbdomenCT-1K 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为AbdomenCT-1K的腹部CT器官分割数据集，并评估现有最先进方法在多样化数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有腹部器官分割数据集存在单中心、单阶段、单厂商或单疾病等局限，难以验证模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建包含12个医疗中心、多阶段、多厂商和多疾病的1000+CT扫描数据集，并建立四种分割基准（全监督、半监督、弱监督和持续学习）及对应方法。
AI.result: 发现最先进方法在不同医疗中心、阶段和未见疾病上表现下降，所提方法可作为各基准的强基线。
AI.conclusion: AbdomenCT-1K数据集将推动临床可用的腹部器官分割方法研究。

search_text: AbdomenCT-1K: Is Abdominal Organ Segmentation A Solved Problem? AbdomenCT-1K：腹部器官分割问题已解决吗？ With the unprecedented developments in deep learning, automatic segmentation of main abdominal organs seems to be a solved problem as state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods have achieved comparable results with inter-rater variability on many benchmark datasets. However, most of the existing abdominal datasets only contain single-center, single-phase, single-vendor, or single-disease cases, and it is unclear whether the excellent performance can generalize on diverse datasets. This paper presents a large and diverse abdominal CT organ segmentation dataset, termed AbdomenCT-1K, with more than 1000 (1K) CT scans from 12 medical centers, including multi-phase, multi-vendor, and multi-disease cases. Furthermore, we conduct a large-scale study for liver, kidney, spleen, and pancreas segmentation and reveal the unsolved segmentation problems of the SOTA methods, such as the limited generalization ability on distinct medical centers, phases, and unseen diseases. To advance the unsolved problems, we further build four organ segmentation benchmarks for fully supervised, semi-supervised, weakly supervised, and continual learning, which are currently challenging and active research topics. Accordingly, we develop a simple and effective method for each benchmark, which can be used as out-of-the-box methods and strong baselines. We believe the AbdomenCT-1K dataset will promote future in-depth research towards clinical applicable abdominal organ segmentation methods. The datasets, codes, and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/JunMa11/AbdomenCT-1K. 随着深度学习空前的发展，主要腹部器官的自动分割似乎已成为一个已解决的问题，因为最先进的（SOTA）方法已经在许多基准数据集上取得了与评估者间变异性相当的结果。然而，大多数现有的腹部数据集仅包含单中心、单阶段、单供应商或单疾病病例，并且尚不清楚优异的性能是否可以推广到不同的数据集。本文提出了一个大型且多样化的腹部 CT 器官分割数据集，称为 AbdomenCT-1K，包含来自 12 个医疗中心的 1000 多个 (1K) CT 扫描，包括多阶段、多供应商和多疾病病例。此外，我们对肝脏、肾脏、脾脏和胰腺分割进行了大规模研究，揭示了 SOTA 方法尚未解决的分割问题，例如对不同医疗中心、阶段和未见疾病的泛化能力有限。为了推进未解决的问题，我们进一步建立了全监督、半监督、弱监督和持续学习的四个器官分割基准，这是目前具有挑战性和活跃的研究课题。因此，我们为每个基准开发了一种简单有效的方法，可以用作开箱即用的方法和强大的基线。我们相信 AbdomenCT-1K 数据集将促进未来对临床适用的腹部器官分割方法的深入研究。数据集、代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/JunMa11/AbdomenCT-1K 上公开获取。 本文提出一个名为AbdomenCT-1K的腹部CT器官分割数据集，并评估现有最先进方法在多样化数据上的泛化能力。 Jun Ma,Yao Zhang,Song Gu,Cheng Zhu,Cheng Ge,Yichi Zhang,Xingle An,Congcong Wang,Qiyuan Wang,Xin Liu,Shucheng Cao,Qi Zhang,Shangqing Liu,Yunpeng Wang,Yuhui Li,Jian He,Xiaoping Yang cs.CV

title: Large-Scale MIDI-based Composer Classification
title_zh: 基于 MIDI 的大规模作曲家分类
abstract: Music classification is a task to classify a music piece into labels such as genres or composers. We propose large-scale MIDI based composer classification systems using GiantMIDI-Piano, a transcription-based dataset. We propose to use piano rolls, onset rolls, and velocity rolls as input representations and use deep neural networks as classifiers. To our knowledge, we are the first to investigate the composer classification problem with up to 100 composers. By using convolutional recurrent neural networks as models, our MIDI based composer classification system achieves a 10-composer and a 100-composer classification accuracies of 0.648 and 0.385 (evaluated on 30-second clips) and 0.739 and 0.489 (evaluated on music pieces), respectively. Our MIDI based composer system outperforms several audio-based baseline classification systems, indicating the effectiveness of using compact MIDI representations for composer classification.
summary: Music classification is a task to classify a music piece into labels such as genres or composers. We propose large-scale MIDI based composer classification systems using GiantMIDI-Piano, a transcription-based dataset. We propose to use piano rolls, onset rolls, and velocity rolls as input representations and use deep neural networks as classifiers. To our knowledge, we are the first to investigate the composer classification problem with up to 100 composers. By using convolutional recurrent neural networks as models, our MIDI based composer classification system achieves a 10-composer and a 100-composer classification accuracies of 0.648 and 0.385 (evaluated on 30-second clips) and 0.739 and 0.489 (evaluated on music pieces), respectively. Our MIDI based composer system outperforms several audio-based baseline classification systems, indicating the effectiveness of using compact MIDI representations for composer classification.
abstract_zh: 音乐分类是将音乐作品分类为流派或作曲家等标签的任务。我们使用基于转录的数据集 GiantMIDI-Piano 提出了基于大规模 MIDI 的作曲家分类系统。我们建议使用钢琴卷、起始卷和速度卷作为输入表示，并使用深度神经网络作为分类器。据我们所知，我们是第一个调查多达 100 名作曲家的作曲家分类问题的人。通过使用卷积循环神经网络作为模型，我们基于 MIDI 的作曲家分类系统分别实现了 10 名作曲家和 100 名作曲家的分类准确度为 0.648 和 0.385（在 30 秒剪辑上评估）以及 0.739 和 0.489（在音乐作品上评估）。我们基于 MIDI 的作曲家系统优于多个基于音频的基线分类系统，表明使用紧凑的 MIDI 表示进行作曲家分类的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于MIDI数据的大规模作曲家分类系统，使用GiantMIDI-Piano数据集和深度神经网络进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统音频分类存在数据复杂度高、特征提取困难等问题，而MIDI数据具有紧凑性和结构化优势，但此前未有研究覆盖超过100位作曲家的分类任务。
AI.method: 采用钢琴卷、起始卷和速度卷作为输入表示，构建卷积循环神经网络模型，基于GiantMIDI-Piano数据集进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 在30秒片段测试中，10作曲家分类准确率为0.648，100作曲家为0.385；完整曲目测试中分别为0.739和0.489，优于音频基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MIDI表示能有效捕捉作曲家风格特征，尤其在大规模分类任务中展现优势，验证了结构化数据用于音乐分类的可行性。

authors_text: Zhonghao Li,Benlai Tang,Xiang Yin,Yuan Wan,Ling Xu,Chen Shen,Zejun Ma
title: PPG-based singing voice conversion with adversarial representation learning
title_zh: 基于 PPG 的歌声转换与对抗性表示学习
abstract: Singing voice conversion (SVC) aims to convert the voice of one singer to that of other singers while keeping the singing content and melody. On top of recent voice conversion works, we propose a novel model to steadily convert songs while keeping their naturalness and intonation. We build an end-to-end architecture, taking phonetic posteriorgrams (PPGs) as inputs and generating mel spectrograms. Specifically, we implement two separate encoders: one encodes PPGs as content, and the other compresses mel spectrograms to supply acoustic and musical information. To improve the performance on timbre and melody, an adversarial singer confusion module and a mel-regressive representation learning module are designed for the model. Objective and subjective experiments are conducted on our private Chinese singing corpus. Comparing with the baselines, our methods can significantly improve the conversion performance in terms of naturalness, melody, and voice similarity. Moreover, our PPG-based method is proved to be robust for noisy sources.
summary: Singing voice conversion (SVC) aims to convert the voice of one singer to that of other singers while keeping the singing content and melody. On top of recent voice conversion works, we propose a novel model to steadily convert songs while keeping their naturalness and intonation. We build an end-to-end architecture, taking phonetic posteriorgrams (PPGs) as inputs and generating mel spectrograms. Specifically, we implement two separate encoders: one encodes PPGs as content, and the other compresses mel spectrograms to supply acoustic and musical information. To improve the performance on timbre and melody, an adversarial singer confusion module and a mel-regressive representation learning module are designed for the model. Objective and subjective experiments are conducted on our private Chinese singing corpus. Comparing with the baselines, our methods can significantly improve the conversion performance in terms of naturalness, melody, and voice similarity. Moreover, our PPG-based method is proved to be robust for noisy sources.
abstract_zh: 歌声转换（SVC）旨在将一位歌手的声音转换为其他歌手的声音，同时保留演唱内容和旋律。在最近的语音转换工作的基础上，我们提出了一种新颖的模型，可以稳定地转换歌曲，同时保持其自然性和语调。我们构建了一个端到端的架构，以语音后验图（PPG）作为输入并生成梅尔谱图。具体来说，我们实现了两个独立的编码器：一个将 PPG 编码为内容，另一个压缩梅尔频谱图以提供声学和音乐信息。为了提高音色和旋律的表现，该模型设计了对抗性歌手混淆模块和梅尔回归表示学习模块。在我们私人的中文歌唱语料库上进行了客观和主观实验。与基线相比，我们的方法可以在自然度、旋律和语音相似度方面显着提高转换性能。此外，我们基于 PPG 的方法被证明对于噪声源具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于PPG的歌声转换模型，结合对抗表示学习以保持自然性和旋律。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在音色和旋律转换上存在不足，需更稳健的模型处理噪声并提升自然度与相似性。
AI.method: 采用端到端架构，使用PPG作为输入生成梅尔频谱图，包含内容编码器和声学编码器，并设计对抗混淆模块与梅尔回归模块进行表示学习。
AI.result: 在中文歌库实验中，方法在自然度、旋律和声音相似性上显著优于基线，且对噪声源具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PPG基方法有效提升歌声转换性能，验证了对抗表示学习在保持音色与旋律中的优势。

search_text: PPG-based singing voice conversion with adversarial representation learning 基于 PPG 的歌声转换与对抗性表示学习 Singing voice conversion (SVC) aims to convert the voice of one singer to that of other singers while keeping the singing content and melody. On top of recent voice conversion works, we propose a novel model to steadily convert songs while keeping their naturalness and intonation. We build an end-to-end architecture, taking phonetic posteriorgrams (PPGs) as inputs and generating mel spectrograms. Specifically, we implement two separate encoders: one encodes PPGs as content, and the other compresses mel spectrograms to supply acoustic and musical information. To improve the performance on timbre and melody, an adversarial singer confusion module and a mel-regressive representation learning module are designed for the model. Objective and subjective experiments are conducted on our private Chinese singing corpus. Comparing with the baselines, our methods can significantly improve the conversion performance in terms of naturalness, melody, and voice similarity. Moreover, our PPG-based method is proved to be robust for noisy sources. 歌声转换（SVC）旨在将一位歌手的声音转换为其他歌手的声音，同时保留演唱内容和旋律。在最近的语音转换工作的基础上，我们提出了一种新颖的模型，可以稳定地转换歌曲，同时保持其自然性和语调。我们构建了一个端到端的架构，以语音后验图（PPG）作为输入并生成梅尔谱图。具体来说，我们实现了两个独立的编码器：一个将 PPG 编码为内容，另一个压缩梅尔频谱图以提供声学和音乐信息。为了提高音色和旋律的表现，该模型设计了对抗性歌手混淆模块和梅尔回归表示学习模块。在我们私人的中文歌唱语料库上进行了客观和主观实验。与基线相比，我们的方法可以在自然度、旋律和语音相似度方面显着提高转换性能。此外，我们基于 PPG 的方法被证明对于噪声源具有鲁棒性。 提出基于PPG的歌声转换模型，结合对抗表示学习以保持自然性和旋律。 Zhonghao Li,Benlai Tang,Xiang Yin,Yuan Wan,Ling Xu,Chen Shen,Zejun Ma cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhitian Zhang,Jimin Rhim,Taher Ahmadi,Kefan Yang,Angelica Lim,Mo Chen
title: SFU-Store-Nav: A Multimodal Dataset for Indoor Human Navigation
title_zh: SFU-Store-Nav：室内人类导航的多模态数据集
comment: 5 pages, paper submitted to Data In Brief Journal
comments: 5 pages, paper submitted to Data In Brief Journal
abstract: This article describes a dataset collected in a set of experiments that involves human participants and a robot. The set of experiments was conducted in the computing science robotics lab in Simon Fraser University, Burnaby, BC, Canada, and its aim is to gather data containing common gestures, movements, and other behaviours that may indicate humans' navigational intent relevant for autonomous robot navigation. The experiment simulates a shopping scenario where human participants come in to pick up items from his/her shopping list and interact with a Pepper robot that is programmed to help the human participant. We collected visual data and motion capture data from 108 human participants. The visual data contains live recordings of the experiments and the motion capture data contains the position and orientation of the human participants in world coordinates. This dataset could be valuable for researchers in the robotics, machine learning and computer vision community.
summary: This article describes a dataset collected in a set of experiments that involves human participants and a robot. The set of experiments was conducted in the computing science robotics lab in Simon Fraser University, Burnaby, BC, Canada, and its aim is to gather data containing common gestures, movements, and other behaviours that may indicate humans' navigational intent relevant for autonomous robot navigation. The experiment simulates a shopping scenario where human participants come in to pick up items from his/her shopping list and interact with a Pepper robot that is programmed to help the human participant. We collected visual data and motion capture data from 108 human participants. The visual data contains live recordings of the experiments and the motion capture data contains the position and orientation of the human participants in world coordinates. This dataset could be valuable for researchers in the robotics, machine learning and computer vision community.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了在涉及人类参与者和机器人的一组实验中收集的数据集。这组实验是在加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省伯纳比西蒙弗雷泽大学的计算科学机器人实验室进行的，其目的是收集包含常见手势、动作和其他行为的数据，这些数据可能表明与自主机器人导航相关的人类导航意图。该实验模拟了一个购物场景，其中人类参与者进来从他/她的购物清单中挑选商品，并与经过编程以帮助人类参与者的 Pepper 机器人进行交互。我们收集了 108 名人类参与者的视觉数据和动作捕捉数据。视觉数据包含实验的实时记录，动作捕捉数据包含人类参与者在世界坐标中的位置和方向。该数据集对于机器人、机器学习和计算机视觉社区的研究人员来说可能很有价值。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为SFU-Store-Nav的多模态数据集，用于室内人类导航研究，包含人类参与者与机器人交互的视觉和运动捕捉数据。
AI.motivation: 为自主机器人导航研究提供真实场景下人类导航意图的数据支持，特别是在购物等交互场景中提升机器人辅助能力。
AI.method: 在加拿大西蒙弗雷泽大学实验室开展实验，模拟购物场景让108名参与者与Pepper机器人交互，同时采集实时视频和运动捕捉数据。
AI.result: 成功收集了包含人类位置、姿态及交互行为的多模态数据集，可为机器人、机器学习和计算机视觉领域研究提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为研究室内人类导航行为与机器人交互提供了高质量的基准数据，有助于推动自主导航技术的发展。

authors_text: Shuai Zhang,Jiangyan Yi,Zhengkun Tian,Ye Bai,Jianhua Tao,Zhengqi wen
title: Decoupling Pronunciation and Language for End-to-end Code-switching Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 解耦发音和语言，实现端到端语码转换自动语音识别
abstract: Despite the recent significant advances witnessed in end-to-end (E2E) ASR system for code-switching, hunger for audio-text paired data limits the further improvement of the models' performance. In this paper, we propose a decoupled transformer model to use monolingual paired data and unpaired text data to alleviate the problem of code-switching data shortage. The model is decoupled into two parts: audio-to-phoneme (A2P) network and phoneme-to-text (P2T) network. The A2P network can learn acoustic pattern scenarios using large-scale monolingual paired data. Meanwhile, it generates multiple phoneme sequence candidates for single audio data in real-time during the training process. Then the generated phoneme-text paired data is used to train the P2T network. This network can be pre-trained with large amounts of external unpaired text data. By using monolingual data and unpaired text data, the decoupled transformer model reduces the high dependency on code-switching paired training data of E2E model to a certain extent. Finally, the two networks are optimized jointly through attention fusion. We evaluate the proposed method on the public Mandarin-English code-switching dataset. Compared with our transformer baseline, the proposed method achieves 18.14% relative mix error rate reduction.
summary: Despite the recent significant advances witnessed in end-to-end (E2E) ASR system for code-switching, hunger for audio-text paired data limits the further improvement of the models' performance. In this paper, we propose a decoupled transformer model to use monolingual paired data and unpaired text data to alleviate the problem of code-switching data shortage. The model is decoupled into two parts: audio-to-phoneme (A2P) network and phoneme-to-text (P2T) network. The A2P network can learn acoustic pattern scenarios using large-scale monolingual paired data. Meanwhile, it generates multiple phoneme sequence candidates for single audio data in real-time during the training process. Then the generated phoneme-text paired data is used to train the P2T network. This network can be pre-trained with large amounts of external unpaired text data. By using monolingual data and unpaired text data, the decoupled transformer model reduces the high dependency on code-switching paired training data of E2E model to a certain extent. Finally, the two networks are optimized jointly through attention fusion. We evaluate the proposed method on the public Mandarin-English code-switching dataset. Compared with our transformer baseline, the proposed method achieves 18.14% relative mix error rate reduction.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在用于代码转换的端到端（E2E）ASR系统方面取得了重大进展，但对音频文本配对数据的渴望限制了模型性能的进一步提高。在本文中，我们提出了一种解耦变压器模型，使用单语言配对数据和不配对文本数据来缓解语码转换数据短缺的问题。该模型被解耦为两部分：音频到音素（A2P）网络和音素到文本（P2T）网络。 A2P 网络可以使用大规模单语配对数据来学习声学模式场景。同时，它在训练过程中实时为单个音频数据生成多个候选音素序列。然后生成的音素-文本配对数据用于训练 P2T 网络。该网络可以使用大量外部不配对文本数据进行预训练。解耦的Transformer模型通过使用单语数据和不成对的文本数据，在一定程度上降低了E2E模型对语码转换成对训练数据的高度依赖。最后，两个网络通过注意力融合联合优化。我们在公共普通话-英语语码转换数据集上评估了所提出的方法。与我们的变压器基线相比，所提出的方法实现了 18.14% 的相对混合错误率降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种解耦的Transformer模型，通过分离发音与语言处理模块，解决代码切换场景下端到端语音识别数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端代码切换语音识别模型因依赖大量音文配对数据而受限，而实际中此类数据稀缺，需探索利用单语数据和未配对文本数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 将模型解耦为音频到音素（A2P）网络和音素到文本（P2T）网络。A2P网络利用单语配对数据学习声学模式并生成候选音素序列，P2T网络通过外部未配对文本预训练，最终通过注意力融合联合优化两网络。
AI.result: 在公开的中英代码切换数据集上，相比基线Transformer模型，相对混合错误率降低18.14%。
AI.conclusion: 解耦架构有效降低了对代码切换配对数据的依赖，通过音素级数据生成与联合优化提升了模型性能。
