By using monolingual data and unpaired text data, the decoupled transformer model reduces the high dependency on code-switching paired training data of E2E model to a certain extent. Finally, the two networks are optimized jointly through attention fusion. We evaluate the proposed method on the public Mandarin-English code-switching dataset. Compared with our transformer baseline, the proposed method achieves 18.14% relative mix error rate reduction. 尽管最近在用于代码转换的端到端（E2E）ASR系统方面取得了重大进展，但对音频文本配对数据的渴望限制了模型性能的进一步提高。在本文中，我们提出了一种解耦变压器模型，使用单语言配对数据和不配对文本数据来缓解语码转换数据短缺的问题。该模型被解耦为两部分：音频到音素（A2P）网络和音素到文本（P2T）网络。 A2P 网络可以使用大规模单语配对数据来学习声学模式场景。同时，它在训练过程中实时为单个音频数据生成多个候选音素序列。然后生成的音素-文本配对数据用于训练 P2T 网络。该网络可以使用大量外部不配对文本数据进行预训练。解耦的Transformer模型通过使用单语数据和不成对的文本数据，在一定程度上降低了E2E模型对语码转换成对训练数据的高度依赖。最后，两个网络通过注意力融合联合优化。我们在公共普通话-英语语码转换数据集上评估了所提出的方法。与我们的变压器基线相比，所提出的方法实现了 18.14% 的相对混合错误率降低。 本文提出一种解耦的Transformer模型，通过分离发音与语言处理模块，解决代码切换场景下端到端语音识别数据不足的问题。 Shuai Zhang,Jiangyan Yi,Zhengkun Tian,Ye Bai,Jianhua Tao,Zhengqi wen cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

title: Seen and Unseen emotional style transfer for voice conversion with a new emotional speech dataset
title_zh: 使用新的情感语音数据集进行语音转换的已见和未见情感风格转换
abstract: Emotional voice conversion aims to transform emotional prosody in speech while preserving the linguistic content and speaker identity. Prior studies show that it is possible to disentangle emotional prosody using an encoder-decoder network conditioned on discrete representation, such as one-hot emotion labels. Such networks learn to remember a fixed set of emotional styles. In this paper, we propose a novel framework based on variational auto-encoding Wasserstein generative adversarial network (VAW-GAN), which makes use of a pre-trained speech emotion recognition (SER) model to transfer emotional style during training and at run-time inference. In this way, the network is able to transfer both seen and unseen emotional style to a new utterance. We show that the proposed framework achieves remarkable performance by consistently outperforming the baseline framework. This paper also marks the release of an emotional speech dataset (ESD) for voice conversion, which has multiple speakers and languages.
summary: Emotional voice conversion aims to transform emotional prosody in speech while preserving the linguistic content and speaker identity. Prior studies show that it is possible to disentangle emotional prosody using an encoder-decoder network conditioned on discrete representation, such as one-hot emotion labels. Such networks learn to remember a fixed set of emotional styles. In this paper, we propose a novel framework based on variational auto-encoding Wasserstein generative adversarial network (VAW-GAN), which makes use of a pre-trained speech emotion recognition (SER) model to transfer emotional style during training and at run-time inference. In this way, the network is able to transfer both seen and unseen emotional style to a new utterance. We show that the proposed framework achieves remarkable performance by consistently outperforming the baseline framework. This paper also marks the release of an emotional speech dataset (ESD) for voice conversion, which has multiple speakers and languages.
abstract_zh: 情感语音转换旨在改变语音中的情感韵律，同时保留语言内容和说话者身份。先前的研究表明，可以使用以离散表示为条件的编码器-解码器网络来解开情感韵律，例如单热情感标签。这样的网络学会记住一组固定的情感风格。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变分自动编码 Wasserstein 生成对抗网络（VAW-GAN）的新颖框架，该框架利用预先训练的语音情感识别（SER）模型在训练和运行时推理期间转移情感风格。通过这种方式，网络能够将可见和不可见的情感风格转移到新的话语中。我们表明，所提出的框架通过始终优于基准框架而实现了卓越的性能。本文还标志着用于语音转换的情感语音数据集（ESD）的发布，该数据集具有多个说话者和语言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VAW-GAN的情感语音转换框架，实现已知和未知情感风格迁移，并发布多说话人多语言情感语音数据集ESD。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音转换模型仅能处理已知情感风格，无法迁移未知情感，且缺乏多语言多说话人数据集限制研究进展。
AI.method: 设计VAW-GAN框架结合预训练情感识别模型，在训练和推理阶段均利用SER模型实现情感风格迁移，通过变分自编码器和Wasserstein GAN提升生成质量。
AI.result: 框架在情感迁移任务中持续优于基线方法，新发布的ESD数据集包含多语言多说话人情感语音样本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VAW-GAN框架有效支持未知情感迁移，ESD数据集为语音转换研究提供重要资源。

title: Class-Agnostic Segmentation Loss and Its Application to Salient Object Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: 与类无关的分割损失及其在显着目标检测和分割中的应用
abstract: In this paper we present a novel loss function, called class-agnostic segmentation (CAS) loss. With CAS loss the class descriptors are learned during training of the network. We don't require to define the label of a class a-priori, rather the CAS loss clusters regions with similar appearance together in a weakly-supervised manner. Furthermore, we show that the CAS loss function is sparse, bounded, and robust to class-imbalance. We apply our CAS loss function with fully-convolutional ResNet101 and DeepLab-v3 architectures to the binary segmentation problem of salient object detection. We investigate the performance against the state-of-the-art methods in two settings of low and high-fidelity training data on seven salient object detection datasets. For low-fidelity training data (incorrect class label) class-agnostic segmentation loss outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on salient object detection datasets by staggering margins of around 50%. For high-fidelity training data (correct class labels) class-agnostic segmentation models perform as good as the state-of-the-art approaches while beating the state-of-the-art methods on most datasets. In order to show the utility of the loss function across different domains we also test on general segmentation dataset, where class-agnostic segmentation loss outperforms cross-entropy based loss by huge margins on both region and edge metrics.
summary: In this paper we present a novel loss function, called class-agnostic segmentation (CAS) loss. With CAS loss the class descriptors are learned during training of the network. We don't require to define the label of a class a-priori, rather the CAS loss clusters regions with similar appearance together in a weakly-supervised manner. Furthermore, we show that the CAS loss function is sparse, bounded, and robust to class-imbalance. We apply our CAS loss function with fully-convolutional ResNet101 and DeepLab-v3 architectures to the binary segmentation problem of salient object detection. We investigate the performance against the state-of-the-art methods in two settings of low and high-fidelity training data on seven salient object detection datasets. For low-fidelity training data (incorrect class label) class-agnostic segmentation loss outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on salient object detection datasets by staggering margins of around 50%. For high-fidelity training data (correct class labels) class-agnostic segmentation models perform as good as the state-of-the-art approaches while beating the state-of-the-art methods on most datasets. In order to show the utility of the loss function across different domains we also test on general segmentation dataset, where class-agnostic segmentation loss outperforms cross-entropy based loss by huge margins on both region and edge metrics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，称为与类别无关的分割（CAS）损失。通过 CAS 损失，类描述符是在网络训练期间学习的。我们不需要先验地定义类的标签，而是 CAS 损失以弱监督的方式将具有相似外观的区域聚集在一起。此外，我们还表明 CAS 损失函数是稀疏的、有界的并且对类不平衡具有鲁棒性。我们将 CAS 损失函数与全卷积 ResNet101 和 DeepLab-v3 架构应用于显着对象检测的二进制分割问题。我们在七个显着目标检测数据集上的低保真度和高保真度训练数据的两种设置中研究了最先进方法的性能。对于低保真度训练数据（不正确的类标签），与类别无关的分割损失在显着对象检测数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法，其性能提升了 50% 左右。对于高保真训练数据（正确的类别标签），类别无关的分割模型的性能与最先进的方法一样好，同时在大多数数据集上击败了最先进的方法。为了展示损失函数在不同领域的实用性，我们还在一般分割数据集上进行了测试，其中与类无关的分割损失在区域和边缘指标上都远远优于基于交叉熵的损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预定义类别标签的类无关分割损失函数（CAS损失），并应用于显著物体检测和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法依赖预定义类别标签且对类别不平衡敏感，而实际场景中标签可能不准确或缺失，需设计弱监督方法提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计类无关分割损失函数，通过训练过程自动学习区域特征聚类，结合全卷积ResNet101和DeepLab-v3架构，在二分类分割任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 在低质量标签数据下，CAS损失显著优于现有方法（约50%提升）；高质量数据下表现与SOTA相当或更优，且在通用分割数据集上优于交叉熵损失。
AI.conclusion: CAS损失无需先验类别信息，具有稀疏性、鲁棒性和广泛适用性，为弱监督分割提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Nathan Dahlin,Krishna Chaitanya Kalagarla,Nikhil Naik,Rahul Jain,Pierluigi Nuzzo
title: Designing Interpretable Approximations to Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 设计深度强化学习的可解释近似
abstract: In an ever expanding set of research and application areas, deep neural networks (DNNs) set the bar for algorithm performance. However, depending upon additional constraints such as processing power and execution time limits, or requirements such as verifiable safety guarantees, it may not be feasible to actually use such high-performing DNNs in practice. Many techniques have been developed in recent years to compress or distill complex DNNs into smaller, faster or more understandable models and controllers. This work seeks to identify reduced models that not only preserve a desired performance level, but also, for example, succinctly explain the latent knowledge represented by a DNN. We illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on the evaluation of decision tree variants and kernel machines in the context of benchmark reinforcement learning tasks.
summary: In an ever expanding set of research and application areas, deep neural networks (DNNs) set the bar for algorithm performance. However, depending upon additional constraints such as processing power and execution time limits, or requirements such as verifiable safety guarantees, it may not be feasible to actually use such high-performing DNNs in practice. Many techniques have been developed in recent years to compress or distill complex DNNs into smaller, faster or more understandable models and controllers. This work seeks to identify reduced models that not only preserve a desired performance level, but also, for example, succinctly explain the latent knowledge represented by a DNN. We illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on the evaluation of decision tree variants and kernel machines in the context of benchmark reinforcement learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 在不断扩大的研究和应用领域中，深度神经网络 (DNN) 为算法性能设定了标准。然而，根据处理能力和执行时间限制等附加约束，或可验证的安全保证等要求，在实践中实际使用这种高性能的 DNN 可能并不可行。近年来，人们开发了许多技术来将复杂的 DNN 压缩或提炼成更小、更快或更容易理解的模型和控制器。这项工作旨在找到简化的模型，不仅可以保持所需的性能水平，而且还可以简洁地解释 DNN 所代表的潜在知识。我们说明了所提出的方法在基准强化学习任务的背景下评估决策树变体和内核机器的有效性。

AI.tldr: 设计可解释的深度强化学习近似模型，以在保持性能的同时简化复杂DNN
AI.motivation: 尽管DNN性能优异，但实际应用中可能受限于计算资源或安全需求，需更简洁可解释的模型
AI.method: 通过决策树和核机器等可解释模型替代复杂DNN，并在基准强化学习任务中验证其有效性
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在基准强化学习任务中有效，能够保持性能并提供可解释性
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种在保持深度强化学习性能的同时提高模型可解释性的方法，适用于需透明度的应用场景

search_text: Designing Interpretable Approximations to Deep Reinforcement Learning 设计深度强化学习的可解释近似 In an ever expanding set of research and application areas, deep neural networks (DNNs) set the bar for algorithm performance. However, depending upon additional constraints such as processing power and execution time limits, or requirements such as verifiable safety guarantees, it may not be feasible to actually use such high-performing DNNs in practice. Many techniques have been developed in recent years to compress or distill complex DNNs into smaller, faster or more understandable models and controllers. This work seeks to identify reduced models that not only preserve a desired performance level, but also, for example, succinctly explain the latent knowledge represented by a DNN. We illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on the evaluation of decision tree variants and kernel machines in the context of benchmark reinforcement learning tasks. 在不断扩大的研究和应用领域中，深度神经网络 (DNN) 为算法性能设定了标准。然而，根据处理能力和执行时间限制等附加约束，或可验证的安全保证等要求，在实践中实际使用这种高性能的 DNN 可能并不可行。近年来，人们开发了许多技术来将复杂的 DNN 压缩或提炼成更小、更快或更容易理解的模型和控制器。这项工作旨在找到简化的模型，不仅可以保持所需的性能水平，而且还可以简洁地解释 DNN 所代表的潜在知识。我们说明了所提出的方法在基准强化学习任务的背景下评估决策树变体和内核机器的有效性。 设计可解释的深度强化学习近似模型，以在保持性能的同时简化复杂DNN Nathan Dahlin,Krishna Chaitanya Kalagarla,Nikhil Naik,Rahul Jain,Pierluigi Nuzzo cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Classification Beats Regression: Counting of Cells from Greyscale Microscopic Images based on Annotation-free Training Samples
title_zh: 分类击败回归：基于无注释训练样本的灰度显微图像的细胞计数
comment: ef:The CAAI International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CICAI 2021)
comments: ef:The CAAI International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CICAI 2021)
abstract: Modern methods often formulate the counting of cells from microscopic images as a regression problem and more or less rely on expensive, manually annotated training images (e.g., dot annotations indicating the centroids of cells or segmentation masks identifying the contours of cells). This work proposes a supervised learning framework based on classification-oriented convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to count cells from greyscale microscopic images without using annotated training images. In this framework, we formulate the cell counting task as an image classification problem, where the cell counts are taken as class labels. This formulation has its limitation when some cell counts in the test stage do not appear in the training data. Moreover, the ordinal relation among cell counts is not utilized. To deal with these limitations, we propose a simple but effective data augmentation (DA) method to synthesize images for the unseen cell counts. We also introduce an ensemble method, which can not only moderate the influence of unseen cell counts but also utilize the ordinal information to improve the prediction accuracy. This framework outperforms many modern cell counting methods and won the data analysis competition (Case Study 1: Counting Cells From Microscopic Images https://ssc.ca/en/case-study/case-study-1-counting-cells-microscopic-images) of the 47th Annual Meeting of the Statistical Society of Canada (SSC). Our code is available at https://github.com/anno2020/CellCount_TinyBBBC005.
summary: Modern methods often formulate the counting of cells from microscopic images as a regression problem and more or less rely on expensive, manually annotated training images (e.g., dot annotations indicating the centroids of cells or segmentation masks identifying the contours of cells). This work proposes a supervised learning framework based on classification-oriented convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to count cells from greyscale microscopic images without using annotated training images. In this framework, we formulate the cell counting task as an image classification problem, where the cell counts are taken as class labels. This formulation has its limitation when some cell counts in the test stage do not appear in the training data. Moreover, the ordinal relation among cell counts is not utilized. To deal with these limitations, we propose a simple but effective data augmentation (DA) method to synthesize images for the unseen cell counts. We also introduce an ensemble method, which can not only moderate the influence of unseen cell counts but also utilize the ordinal information to improve the prediction accuracy. This framework outperforms many modern cell counting methods and won the data analysis competition (Case Study 1: Counting Cells From Microscopic Images https://ssc.ca/en/case-study/case-study-1-counting-cells-microscopic-images) of the 47th Annual Meeting of the Statistical Society of Canada (SSC). Our code is available at https://github.com/anno2020/CellCount_TinyBBBC005.
abstract_zh: 现代方法通常将显微图像中的细胞计数公式化为回归问题，并且或多或少依赖于昂贵的手动注释训练图像（例如，指示细胞质心的点注释或识别细胞轮廓的分割掩模）。这项工作提出了一种基于面向分类的卷积神经网络（CNN）的监督学习框架，可以在不使用带注释的训练图像的情况下对灰度显微图像中的细胞进行计数。在此框架中，我们将细胞计数任务表述为图像分类问题，其中细胞计数被视为类别标签。当测试阶段的某些细胞计数未出现在训练数据中时，此公式有其局限性。此外，未利用细胞计数之间的顺序关系。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种简单但有效的数据增强（DA）方法来合成看不见的细胞计数的图像。我们还引入了一种集成方法，它不仅可以减轻看不见的细胞计数的影响，还可以利用序数信息来提高预测精度。该框架优于许多现代细胞计数方法，并赢得了加拿大统计学会（SSC）第 47 届年会的数据分析竞赛（案例研究 1：从显微图像计数细胞 https://ssc.ca/en/case-study/case-study-1-counting-cells-microscope-images）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/anno2020/CellCount_TinyBBBC005 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注数据的细胞计数方法，通过分类框架替代传统回归方法处理显微图像。
AI.motivation: 传统细胞计数依赖昂贵的手动标注数据（如中心点或分割掩膜），而本文旨在开发无需标注的高效计数方法。
AI.method: 将细胞计数转化为分类问题，以计数为类别标签；通过数据增强生成未见计数的合成图像，并引入集成方法利用计数的序关系提升精度。
AI.result: 该框架在加拿大统计学会竞赛中胜出，优于多种现代细胞计数方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 分类框架结合数据增强与集成策略可有效解决无标注数据下的细胞计数问题，验证了分类优于回归的可行性。

authors_text: Md Osman Gani,Shravan Kethireddy,Marvi Bikak,Paul Griffin,Mohammad Adibuzzaman
title: Structural Causal Model with Expert Augmented Knowledge to Estimate the Effect of Oxygen Therapy on Mortality in the ICU
title_zh: 利用专家增强知识的结构因果模型来估计氧疗对 ICU 死亡率的影响
abstract: Recent advances in causal inference techniques, more specifically, in the theory of structural causal models, provide the framework for identification of causal effects from observational data in the cases where the causal graph is identifiable, i.e., the data generating mechanism can be recovered from the joint distribution. However, no such studies have been done to demonstrate this concept with a clinical example. We present a complete framework to estimate the causal effect from observational data by augmenting expert knowledge in the model development phase and with a practical clinical application. Our clinical application entails a timely and important research question, i.e., the effect of oxygen therapy intervention in the intensive care unit (ICU); the result of this project is useful in a variety of disease conditions, including severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus-2 (SARS-CoV-2) patients in the ICU. We used data from the MIMIC III database, a standard database in the machine learning community that contains 58,976 admissions from an ICU in Boston, MA, for estimating the oxygen therapy effect on morality. We also identified the covariate-specific effect to oxygen therapy from the model for more personalized intervention.
summary: Recent advances in causal inference techniques, more specifically, in the theory of structural causal models, provide the framework for identification of causal effects from observational data in the cases where the causal graph is identifiable, i.e., the data generating mechanism can be recovered from the joint distribution. However, no such studies have been done to demonstrate this concept with a clinical example. We present a complete framework to estimate the causal effect from observational data by augmenting expert knowledge in the model development phase and with a practical clinical application. Our clinical application entails a timely and important research question, i.e., the effect of oxygen therapy intervention in the intensive care unit (ICU); the result of this project is useful in a variety of disease conditions, including severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus-2 (SARS-CoV-2) patients in the ICU. We used data from the MIMIC III database, a standard database in the machine learning community that contains 58,976 admissions from an ICU in Boston, MA, for estimating the oxygen therapy effect on morality. We also identified the covariate-specific effect to oxygen therapy from the model for more personalized intervention.
abstract_zh: 因果推理技术的最新进展，更具体地说，在结构因果模型理论中，为在因果图可识别的情况下从观测数据中识别因果效应提供了框架，即可以从联合分布中恢复数据生成机制。然而，尚未进行此类研究以临床实例来证明这一概念。我们提出了一个完整的框架，通过增强模型开发阶段的专家知识和实际的临床应用来估计观察数据的因果效应。我们的临床应用带来了一个及时而重要的研究问题，即重症监护病房（ICU）氧疗干预的效果；该项目的结果可用于多种疾病，包括 ICU 中的严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒-2 (SARS-CoV-2) 患者。我们使用 MIMIC III 数据库（机器学习社区的标准数据库）中的数据来估计氧疗对道德的影响，其中包含来自马萨诸塞州波士顿 ICU 的 58,976 例入院病例。我们还从模型中确定了氧疗的协变量特异性效应，以进行更个性化的干预。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合专家知识的结构因果模型框架，用于从观察数据中估计ICU氧气治疗对死亡率的因果效应，并分析协变量特异性效果。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推理方法缺乏临床应用验证，而ICU氧气治疗效果评估对重症患者（如新冠患者）的精准干预具有重要意义。
AI.method: 基于结构因果模型整合专家知识，利用MIMIC III数据库中的58,976例ICU住院数据，通过协变量特异性分析实现个性化干预评估。
AI.result: 成功量化氧气治疗的因果效应，识别出不同患者特征下的治疗效果差异，为重症监护提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了结构因果模型在临床场景中的有效性，结合领域知识可提升因果推断准确性，对多种重症疾病的治疗决策具有指导价值。

motivation: 现有因果推理方法缺乏临床应用验证，而ICU氧气治疗效果评估对重症患者（如新冠患者）的精准干预具有重要意义。
method: 基于结构因果模型整合专家知识，利用MIMIC III数据库中的58,976例ICU住院数据，通过协变量特异性分析实现个性化干预评估。
result: 成功量化氧气治疗的因果效应，识别出不同患者特征下的治疗效果差异，为重症监护提供数据支持。
conclusion: 该框架验证了结构因果模型在临床场景中的有效性，结合领域知识可提升因果推断准确性，对多种重症疾病的治疗决策具有指导价值。
search_text: Structural Causal Model with Expert Augmented Knowledge to Estimate the Effect of Oxygen Therapy on Mortality in the ICU 利用专家增强知识的结构因果模型来估计氧疗对 ICU 死亡率的影响 Recent advances in causal inference techniques, more specifically, in the theory of structural causal models, provide the framework for identification of causal effects from observational data in the cases where the causal graph is identifiable, i.e., the data generating mechanism can be recovered from the joint distribution. However, no such studies have been done to demonstrate this concept with a clinical example. We present a complete framework to estimate the causal effect from observational data by augmenting expert knowledge in the model development phase and with a practical clinical application. Our clinical application entails a timely and important research question, i.e., the effect of oxygen therapy intervention in the intensive care unit (ICU); the result of this project is useful in a variety of disease conditions, including severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus-2 (SARS-CoV-2) patients in the ICU. We used data from the MIMIC III database, a standard database in the machine learning community that contains 58,976 admissions from an ICU in Boston, MA, for estimating the oxygen therapy effect on morality. We also identified the covariate-specific effect to oxygen therapy from the model for more personalized intervention. 因果推理技术的最新进展，更具体地说，在结构因果模型理论中，为在因果图可识别的情况下从观测数据中识别因果效应提供了框架，即可以从联合分布中恢复数据生成机制。然而，尚未进行此类研究以临床实例来证明这一概念。我们提出了一个完整的框架，通过增强模型开发阶段的专家知识和实际的临床应用来估计观察数据的因果效应。我们的临床应用带来了一个及时而重要的研究问题，即重症监护病房（ICU）氧疗干预的效果；该项目的结果可用于多种疾病，包括 ICU 中的严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒-2 (SARS-CoV-2) 患者。我们使用 MIMIC III 数据库（机器学习社区的标准数据库）中的数据来估计氧疗对道德的影响，其中包含来自马萨诸塞州波士顿 ICU 的 58,976 例入院病例。我们还从模型中确定了氧疗的协变量特异性效应，以进行更个性化的干预。 本文提出一种结合专家知识的结构因果模型框架，用于从观察数据中估计ICU氧气治疗对死亡率的因果效应，并分析协变量特异性效果。 Md Osman Gani,Shravan Kethireddy,Marvi Bikak,Paul Griffin,Mohammad Adibuzzaman cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Batch Reinforcement Learning with a Nonparametric Off-Policy Policy Gradient
title_zh: 具有非参数离策略策略梯度的批量强化学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2001.02435
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2001.02435
abstract: Off-policy Reinforcement Learning (RL) holds the promise of better data efficiency as it allows sample reuse and potentially enables safe interaction with the environment. Current off-policy policy gradient methods either suffer from high bias or high variance, delivering often unreliable estimates. The price of inefficiency becomes evident in real-world scenarios such as interaction-driven robot learning, where the success of RL has been rather limited, and a very high sample cost hinders straightforward application. In this paper, we propose a nonparametric Bellman equation, which can be solved in closed form. The solution is differentiable w.r.t the policy parameters and gives access to an estimation of the policy gradient. In this way, we avoid the high variance of importance sampling approaches, and the high bias of semi-gradient methods. We empirically analyze the quality of our gradient estimate against state-of-the-art methods, and show that it outperforms the baselines in terms of sample efficiency on classical control tasks.
summary: Off-policy Reinforcement Learning (RL) holds the promise of better data efficiency as it allows sample reuse and potentially enables safe interaction with the environment. The solution is differentiable w.r.t the policy parameters and gives access to an estimation of the policy gradient. We empirically analyze the quality of our gradient estimate against state-of-the-art methods, and show that it outperforms the baselines in terms of sample efficiency on classical control tasks.
abstract_zh: 离策略强化学习 (RL) 有望提高数据效率，因为它允许重复使用样本，并有可能实现与环境的安全交互。当前的离政策政策梯度方法要么存在高偏差，要么存在高方差，通常会提供不可靠的估计。在交互驱动的机器人学习等现实场景中，低效率的代价变得显而易见，其中强化学习的成功相当有限，而且非常高的样本成本阻碍了直接应用。在本文中，我们提出了一个非参数贝尔曼方程，它可以以封闭形式求解。该解决方案对于策略参数是可微分的，并且可以估计策略梯度。通过这种方式，我们避免了重要性采样方法的高方差和半梯度方法的高偏差。我们根据最先进的方法对梯度估计的质量进行了实证分析，并表明它在经典控制任务的样本效率方面优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非参数化离线策略梯度方法，解决现有方法的高偏差和高方差问题，提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有离线策略梯度方法在样本效率和估计可靠性上存在不足，限制了其在实际场景中的应用，如机器人学习。
AI.method: 提出非参数贝尔曼方程，通过闭式求解获得可微分的策略梯度估计，避免重要性抽样的高方差和半梯度的高偏差。
AI.result: 在经典控制任务中，该方法在样本效率上优于现有先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 非参数化方法有效平衡偏差与方差，为高效离线强化学习提供新思路，适用于样本成本高的实际场景。

title: A short note on the decision tree based neural turing machine
title_zh: 关于基于决策树的神经图灵机的简短说明
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.02921
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.02921
abstract: Turing machine and decision tree have developed independently for a long time. With the recent development of differentiable models, there is an intersection between them. Neural turing machine(NTM) opens door for the memory network. It use differentiable attention mechanism to read/write external memory bank. Differentiable forest brings differentiable properties to classical decision tree. In this short note, we show the deep connection between these two models. That is: differentiable forest is a special case of NTM. Differentiable forest is actually decision tree based neural turing machine. Based on this deep connection, we propose a response augmented differential forest (RaDF). The controller of RaDF is differentiable forest, the external memory of RaDF are response vectors which would be read/write by leaf nodes.
summary: Turing machine and decision tree have developed independently for a long time. With the recent development of differentiable models, there is an intersection between them. Neural turing machine(NTM) opens door for the memory network. It use differentiable attention mechanism to read/write external memory bank. Differentiable forest brings differentiable properties to classical decision tree. In this short note, we show the deep connection between these two models. That is: differentiable forest is a special case of NTM. Differentiable forest is actually decision tree based neural turing machine. Based on this deep connection, we propose a response augmented differential forest (RaDF). The controller of RaDF is differentiable forest, the external memory of RaDF are response vectors which would be read/write by leaf nodes.
abstract_zh: 图灵机和决策树长期以来都是独立发展的。随着最近可微分模型的发展，它们之间出现了交叉点。神经图灵机（NTM）为记忆网络打开了大门。它使用可微分注意力机制来读/写外部存储体。可微森林为经典决策树带来了可微属性。在这篇简短的文章中，我们展示了这两个模型之间的深层联系。即：可微森林是NTM的一个特例。可微森林实际上是基于决策树的神经图灵机。基于这种深层连接，我们提出了响应增强差分森林（RaDF）。 RaDF的控制器是可微森林，RaDF的外部存储器是由叶节点读/写的响应向量。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了可微森林与神经图灵机（NTM）之间的深层联系，并提出了一种基于决策树的响应增强可微森林（RaDF）模型。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树与神经图灵机（NTM）各自发展，缺乏联系。本文旨在通过可微分模型将两者结合，提升记忆网络的性能。
AI.method: 将可微森林作为NTM的特例，提出响应增强可微森林（RaDF），其中控制器采用可微森林，外部存储为响应向量，由叶节点进行读写操作。
AI.result: 证明了可微森林是NTM的特例，并通过RaDF模型展示了其在记忆网络中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RaDF模型有效结合了决策树与NTM的优势，为可微分记忆网络的研究提供了新方向。

title: Competitive Analysis of Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM) Online List Update Algorithm
title_zh: 移动到前端或中间（MFM）在线列表更新算法的竞争分析
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.13042
comments: 11 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.13042
abstract: The design and analysis of efficient algorithms with the knowledge of current and past inputs is a non-trivial and challenging research area in computer science. In many practical applications the future inputs are not available to the algorithm at any instance of time. So the algorithm has to make decisions based on a sequence of inputs that are in order and on the fly. Such algorithms are known as online algorithms. For measuring the performance of online algorithms, a standard measure, known as competitive analysis, has been extensively used in the literature. List update problem is a well studied research problem in the area of online algorithms since last few decades. One of the widely used deterministic online list update algorithm is the Move-To-Front (MTF) algorithm, which has been shown to be 2-competitive with best performance in practical real life inputs. In this paper we analyse the Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM) algorithm using competitive analysis by addressing one of an open question raised by Albers that whether dynamic offline algorithm can be used in finding the competitiveness of an online algorithm? Move-To-Front-or-Middle (MFM) was experimentally studied and observed to be performing better than MTF algorithm by using the Calgary Corpus and Canterbury Corpus data set. However, it is interesting and challenging to find the lower bound and upper bound on the competitive ratio of MFM algorithm. We make a first attempt to find the competitiveness of MFM algorithm. Our new results show that MFM is not 2-competitive with respect to static optimum offline algorithm, whereas it is 2-competitive with respect to dynamic optimum offline algorithm. Our new theoretical results may open up a new direction of research in the online list update problem by characterising the structure of competitive and non competitive deterministic online algorithms.

In this paper we analyse the Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM) algorithm using competitive analysis by addressing one of an open question raised by Albers that whether dynamic offline algorithm can be used in finding the competitiveness of an online algorithm? Our new results show that MFM is not 2-competitive with respect to static optimum offline algorithm, whereas it is 2-competitive with respect to dynamic optimum offline algorithm. Our new theoretical results may open up a new direction of research in the online list update problem by characterising the structure of competitive and non competitive deterministic online algorithms.
abstract_zh: 利用当前和过去输入的知识来设计和分析有效算法是计算机科学中一个重要且具有挑战性的研究领域。在许多实际应用中，未来的输入在任何时候都不可用于算法。因此，算法必须根据一系列有序且动态的输入做出决策。此类算法称为在线算法。为了测量在线算法的性能，一种称为竞争分析的标准测量方法已在文献中广泛使用。列表更新问题是近几十年来在线算法领域中一个经过深入研究的研究问题。广泛使用的确定性在线列表更新算法之一是前移 (MTF) 算法，该算法已被证明在实际的现实生活输入中具有最佳性能的 2-competitive 性能。在本文中，我们通过竞争分析来分析移动到前端或中间（MFM）算法，解决了 Albers 提出的一个悬而未决的问题，即是否可以使用动态离线算法来寻找在线算法的竞争力？通过使用卡尔加里语料库和坎特伯雷语料库数据集，对移动到前面或中间 (MFM) 进行了实验研究，发现其性能优于 MTF 算法。然而，寻找MFM算法竞争比的下界和上限是有趣且具有挑战性的。我们首次尝试寻找MFM算法的竞争力。我们的新结果表明，MFM 相对于静态最优离线算法不是 2-竞争的，而相对于动态最优离线算法是 2-竞争的。我们的新理论结果可能通过表征竞争性和非竞争性确定性在线算法的结构，为在线列表更新问题开辟新的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过竞争分析研究Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM)在线列表更新算法的竞争力，探讨其相对于静态和动态最优离线算法的性能边界。
AI.motivation: 在线列表更新问题中，Move-To-Front (MTF)算法虽被证明为2-competitive，但实验显示MFM算法表现更优。然而，MFM的竞争力理论分析尚未明确，尤其是动态离线算法是否可用于评估在线算法竞争力这一开放问题。
AI.method: 采用竞争分析方法，通过理论证明和实验验证，比较MFM算法在静态最优离线算法与动态最优离线算法下的竞争力差异。
AI.result: MFM算法对静态最优离线算法不具备2-竞争力，但对动态最优离线算法仍保持2-竞争力，揭示了动态离线算法在评估在线算法中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为在线列表更新问题提供了新视角，表明动态最优离线算法的特性可作为区分竞争性与非竞争性在线算法的理论依据，推动该领域进一步研究。

search_text: Competitive Analysis of Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM) Online List Update Algorithm 移动到前端或中间（MFM）在线列表更新算法的竞争分析 The design and analysis of efficient algorithms with the knowledge of current and past inputs is a non-trivial and challenging research area in computer science. In many practical applications the future inputs are not available to the algorithm at any instance of time. So the algorithm has to make decisions based on a sequence of inputs that are in order and on the fly. Such algorithms are known as online algorithms. For measuring the performance of online algorithms, a standard measure, known as competitive analysis, has been extensively used in the literature. List update problem is a well studied research problem in the area of online algorithms since last few decades. One of the widely used deterministic online list update algorithm is the Move-To-Front (MTF) algorithm, which has been shown to be 2-competitive with best performance in practical real life inputs. In this paper we analyse the Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM) algorithm using competitive analysis by addressing one of an open question raised by Albers that whether dynamic offline algorithm can be used in finding the competitiveness of an online algorithm? Move-To-Front-or-Middle (MFM) was experimentally studied and observed to be performing better than MTF algorithm by using the Calgary Corpus and Canterbury Corpus data set. However, it is interesting and challenging to find the lower bound and upper bound on the competitive ratio of MFM algorithm. We make a first attempt to find the competitiveness of MFM algorithm. Our new results show that MFM is not 2-competitive with respect to static optimum offline algorithm, whereas it is 2-competitive with respect to dynamic optimum offline algorithm. Our new theoretical results may open up a new direction of research in the online list update problem by characterising the structure of competitive and non competitive deterministic online algorithms. 利用当前和过去输入的知识来设计和分析有效算法是计算机科学中一个重要且具有挑战性的研究领域。在许多实际应用中，未来的输入在任何时候都不可用于算法。因此，算法必须根据一系列有序且动态的输入做出决策。此类算法称为在线算法。为了测量在线算法的性能，一种称为竞争分析的标准测量方法已在文献中广泛使用。列表更新问题是近几十年来在线算法领域中一个经过深入研究的研究问题。广泛使用的确定性在线列表更新算法之一是前移 (MTF) 算法，该算法已被证明在实际的现实生活输入中具有最佳性能的 2-competitive 性能。在本文中，我们通过竞争分析来分析移动到前端或中间（MFM）算法，解决了 Albers 提出的一个悬而未决的问题，即是否可以使用动态离线算法来寻找在线算法的竞争力？通过使用卡尔加里语料库和坎特伯雷语料库数据集，对移动到前面或中间 (MFM) 进行了实验研究，发现其性能优于 MTF 算法。然而，寻找MFM算法竞争比的下界和上限是有趣且具有挑战性的。我们首次尝试寻找MFM算法的竞争力。我们的新结果表明，MFM 相对于静态最优离线算法不是 2-竞争的，而相对于动态最优离线算法是 2-竞争的。我们的新理论结果可能通过表征竞争性和非竞争性确定性在线算法的结构，为在线列表更新问题开辟新的研究方向。 本文通过竞争分析研究Move-to-Front-or-Middle (MFM)在线列表更新算法的竞争力，探讨其相对于静态和动态最优离线算法的性能边界。 Baisakh,Rakesh Mohanty cs.DS,cs.CC

title: An iterative framework for self-supervised deep speaker representation learning
title_zh: 自监督深度说话人表征学习的迭代框架
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.12731
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.12731
abstract: In this paper, we propose an iterative framework for self-supervised speaker representation learning based on a deep neural network (DNN). The framework starts with training a self-supervision speaker embedding network by maximizing agreement between different segments within an utterance via a contrastive loss. Taking advantage of DNN's ability to learn from data with label noise, we propose to cluster the speaker embedding obtained from the previous speaker network and use the subsequent class assignments as pseudo labels to train a new DNN. Moreover, we iteratively train the speaker network with pseudo labels generated from the previous step to bootstrap the discriminative power of a DNN. Speaker verification experiments are conducted on the VoxCeleb dataset. The results show that our proposed iterative self-supervised learning framework outperformed previous works using self-supervision. The speaker network after 5 iterations obtains a 61% performance gain over the speaker embedding model trained with contrastive loss.
summary: In this paper, we propose an iterative framework for self-supervised speaker representation learning based on a deep neural network (DNN). The framework starts with training a self-supervision speaker embedding network by maximizing agreement between different segments within an utterance via a contrastive loss. Taking advantage of DNN's ability to learn from data with label noise, we propose to cluster the speaker embedding obtained from the previous speaker network and use the subsequent class assignments as pseudo labels to train a new DNN. Moreover, we iteratively train the speaker network with pseudo labels generated from the previous step to bootstrap the discriminative power of a DNN. Speaker verification experiments are conducted on the VoxCeleb dataset. The results show that our proposed iterative self-supervised learning framework outperformed previous works using self-supervision. The speaker network after 5 iterations obtains a 61% performance gain over the speaker embedding model trained with contrastive loss.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的自监督说话人表示学习的迭代框架。该框架首先通过对比损失来最大化话语中不同片段之间的一致性，从而训练自监督说话人嵌入网络。利用 DNN 从带有标签噪声的数据中学习的能力，我们建议对从先前的说话人网络获得的说话人嵌入进行聚类，并使用后续的类分配作为伪标签来训练新的 DNN。此外，我们使用上一步生成的伪标签迭代训练说话人网络，以增强 DNN 的判别能力。说话人验证实验是在 VoxCeleb 数据集上进行的。结果表明，我们提出的迭代自我监督学习框架优于以前使用自我监督的工作。经过 5 次迭代后，说话人网络比使用对比损失训练的说话人嵌入模型获得了 61% 的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的迭代自监督说话人表示学习框架，通过对比损失和伪标签迭代训练提升说话人验证性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习在说话人表示中存在标签噪声和判别力不足的问题，需通过迭代优化提升模型性能。
AI.method: 首先用对比损失训练说话人嵌入网络，再通过聚类生成伪标签迭代训练新DNN，循环优化提升判别能力。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb数据集上，5次迭代后模型性能较对比损失基线提升61%，优于现有自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 迭代自监督框架通过伪标签循环优化有效提升说话人表示性能，为无监督学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Mandy Xie,Karl Van Wyk,Anqi Li,Muhammad Asif Rana,Qian Wan,Dieter Fox,Byron Boots,Nathan Ratliff
title: Geometric Fabrics for the Acceleration-based Design of Robotic Motion
title_zh: 用于基于加速度的机器人运动设计的几何织物
abstract: This paper describes the pragmatic design and construction of geometric fabrics for shaping a robot's task-independent nominal behavior, capturing behavioral components such as obstacle avoidance, joint limit avoidance, redundancy resolution, global navigation heuristics, etc. Geometric fabrics constitute the most concrete incarnation of a new mathematical formulation for reactive behavior called optimization fabrics. Fabrics generalize recent work on Riemannian Motion Policies (RMPs); they add provable stability guarantees and improve design consistency while promoting the intuitive acceleration-based principles of modular design that make RMPs successful. We describe a suite of mathematical modeling tools that practitioners can employ in practice and demonstrate both how to mitigate system complexity by constructing behaviors layer-wise and how to employ these tools to design robust, strongly-generalizing, policies that solve practical problems one would expect to find in industry applications. Our system exhibits intelligent global navigation behaviors expressed entirely as provably stable fabrics with zero planning or state machine governance.
summary: This paper describes the pragmatic design and construction of geometric fabrics for shaping a robot's task-independent nominal behavior, capturing behavioral components such as obstacle avoidance, joint limit avoidance, redundancy resolution, global navigation heuristics, etc. Geometric fabrics constitute the most concrete incarnation of a new mathematical formulation for reactive behavior called optimization fabrics. Fabrics generalize recent work on Riemannian Motion Policies (RMPs); they add provable stability guarantees and improve design consistency while promoting the intuitive acceleration-based principles of modular design that make RMPs successful. We describe a suite of mathematical modeling tools that practitioners can employ in practice and demonstrate both how to mitigate system complexity by constructing behaviors layer-wise and how to employ these tools to design robust, strongly-generalizing, policies that solve practical problems one would expect to find in industry applications. Our system exhibits intelligent global navigation behaviors expressed entirely as provably stable fabrics with zero planning or state machine governance.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了几何结构的实用设计和构造，用于塑造机器人与任务无关的标称行为，捕获避障、关节极限避免、冗余解析、全局导航启发式等行为组件。几何结构构成了一种称为优化结构的反应行为新数学公式的最具体化身。 Fabrics 概括了黎曼运动策略 (RMP) 的最新工作；他们增加了可证明的稳定性保证并提高了设计一致性，同时推广了基于加速的直观模块化设计原则，使 RMP 取得了成功。我们描述了一套数学建模工具，从业者可以在实践中使用，并演示如何通过分层构建行为来降低系统复杂性，以及如何使用这些工具来设计强大的、强泛化的策略来解决人们期望在行业应用中发现的实际问题。我们的系统展示了智能全局导航行为，完全表现为具有零规划或状态机治理的可证明稳定的结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出几何织物方法，用于加速机器人运动的基于加速度的设计，通过优化织物实现任务无关的机器人行为塑造。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在机器人行为设计中存在稳定性不足、模块化设计复杂等问题，需更直观且可证明稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于优化织物数学框架，结合黎曼运动策略（RMPs），构建分层几何织物模型，实现避障、冗余解决等行为的模块化设计。
AI.result: 开发了实用数学工具套件，验证了分层构建行为以降低系统复杂度的有效性，并展示了工业级鲁棒策略的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 几何织物方法通过可证明的稳定性与加速度原理，为工业机器人提供了高效、通用的运动策略设计范式。

search_text: Geometric Fabrics for the Acceleration-based Design of Robotic Motion 用于基于加速度的机器人运动设计的几何织物 This paper describes the pragmatic design and construction of geometric fabrics for shaping a robot's task-independent nominal behavior, capturing behavioral components such as obstacle avoidance, joint limit avoidance, redundancy resolution, global navigation heuristics, etc. Geometric fabrics constitute the most concrete incarnation of a new mathematical formulation for reactive behavior called optimization fabrics. Fabrics generalize recent work on Riemannian Motion Policies (RMPs); they add provable stability guarantees and improve design consistency while promoting the intuitive acceleration-based principles of modular design that make RMPs successful. We describe a suite of mathematical modeling tools that practitioners can employ in practice and demonstrate both how to mitigate system complexity by constructing behaviors layer-wise and how to employ these tools to design robust, strongly-generalizing, policies that solve practical problems one would expect to find in industry applications. Our system exhibits intelligent global navigation behaviors expressed entirely as provably stable fabrics with zero planning or state machine governance. 本文描述了几何结构的实用设计和构造，用于塑造机器人与任务无关的标称行为，捕获避障、关节极限避免、冗余解析、全局导航启发式等行为组件。几何结构构成了一种称为优化结构的反应行为新数学公式的最具体化身。 Fabrics 概括了黎曼运动策略 (RMP) 的最新工作；他们增加了可证明的稳定性保证并提高了设计一致性，同时推广了基于加速的直观模块化设计原则，使 RMP 取得了成功。我们描述了一套数学建模工具，从业者可以在实践中使用，并演示如何通过分层构建行为来降低系统复杂性，以及如何使用这些工具来设计强大的、强泛化的策略来解决人们期望在行业应用中发现的实际问题。我们的系统展示了智能全局导航行为，完全表现为具有零规划或状态机治理的可证明稳定的结构。 本文提出几何织物方法，用于加速机器人运动的基于加速度的设计，通过优化织物实现任务无关的机器人行为塑造。 Mandy Xie,Karl Van Wyk,Anqi Li,Muhammad Asif Rana,Qian Wan,Dieter Fox,Byron Boots,Nathan Ratliff cs.RO

title: Continuous Lyapunov Controller and Chaotic Non-linear System Optimization using Deep Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用深度机器学习的连续 Lyapunov 控制器和混沌非线性系统优化
abstract: The introduction of unexpected system disturbances and new system dynamics does not allow guaranteed continuous system stability. In this research we present a novel approach for detecting early failure indicators of non-linear highly chaotic system and accordingly predict the best parameter calibrations to offset such instability using deep machine learning regression model. The approach proposed continuously monitors the system and controller signals. The Re-calibration of the system and controller parameters is triggered according to a set of conditions designed to maintain system stability without compromise to the system speed, intended outcome or required processing power. The deep neural model predicts the parameter values that would best counteract the expected system in-stability. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, it is applied to the non-linear complex combination of Duffing Van der pol oscillators. The approach is also tested under different scenarios the system and controller parameters are initially chosen incorrectly or the system parameters are changed while running or new system dynamics are introduced while running to measure effectiveness and reaction time.
summary: The introduction of unexpected system disturbances and new system dynamics does not allow guaranteed continuous system stability. In this research we present a novel approach for detecting early failure indicators of non-linear highly chaotic system and accordingly predict the best parameter calibrations to offset such instability using deep machine learning regression model. The approach proposed continuously monitors the system and controller signals. The Re-calibration of the system and controller parameters is triggered according to a set of conditions designed to maintain system stability without compromise to the system speed, intended outcome or required processing power. The deep neural model predicts the parameter values that would best counteract the expected system in-stability. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, it is applied to the non-linear complex combination of Duffing Van der pol oscillators. The approach is also tested under different scenarios the system and controller parameters are initially chosen incorrectly or the system parameters are changed while running or new system dynamics are introduced while running to measure effectiveness and reaction time.
abstract_zh: 意外系统扰动和新系统动态的引入无法保证系统的连续稳定性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新方法，用于检测非线性高度混沌系统的早期故障指标，并使用深度机器学习回归模型相应地预测最佳参数校准以抵消这种不稳定性。所提出的方法持续监控系统和控制器信号。系统和控制器参数的重新校准是根据一组旨在保持系统稳定性而不影响系统速度、预期结果或所需处理能力的条件触发的。深度神经模型预测最能抵消预期系统不稳定的参数值。为了证明所提出方法的有效性，将其应用于 Duffing Van der pol 振荡器的非线性复组合。该方法还在不同的场景下进行了测试，系统和控制器参数最初选择不正确，或者系统参数在运行时发生变化，或者在运行时引入新的系统动态，以测量有效性和反应时间。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度机器学习的连续李雅普诺夫控制器，用于优化混沌非线性系统的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在面临意外干扰和动态变化时难以维持稳定性，需实时调整参数以保持稳定。
AI.method: 采用深度神经网络回归模型持续监控系统信号，根据预设条件触发参数重新校准，预测最佳参数以抵消不稳定。
AI.result: 在Duffing Van der Pol振荡器组合中验证了方法的有效性，能在多种动态变化场景下保持系统稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效应对系统参数变化和动态扰动，保持稳定性，且具有快速反应能力。

authors_text: Nathan D. Ratliff,Karl Van Wyk,Mandy Xie,Anqi Li,Muhammad Asif Rana
title: Generalized Nonlinear and Finsler Geometry for Robotics
title_zh: 机器人学的广义非线性和芬斯勒几何
abstract: Robotics research has found numerous important applications of Riemannian geometry. Despite that, the concept remain challenging to many roboticists because the background material is complex and strikingly foreign. Beyond {\em Riemannian} geometry, there are many natural generalizations in the mathematical literature -- areas such as Finsler geometry and spray geometry -- but those generalizations are largely inaccessible, and as a result there remain few applications within robotics. This paper presents a re-derivation of spray and Finsler geometries we found critical for the development of our recent work on a powerful behavioral design tool we call geometric fabrics. These derivations build from basic tools in advanced calculus and the calculus of variations making them more accessible to a robotics audience than standard presentations. We focus on the pragmatic and calculable results, avoiding the use of tensor notation to appeal to a broader audience, emphasizing geometric path consistency over ideas around connections and curvature. We hope that these derivations will contribute to an increased understanding of generalized nonlinear, and even classical Riemannian, geometry within the robotics community and inspire future research into new applications.
summary: Robotics research has found numerous important applications of Riemannian geometry. Despite that, the concept remain challenging to many roboticists because the background material is complex and strikingly foreign. Beyond {\em Riemannian} geometry, there are many natural generalizations in the mathematical literature -- areas such as Finsler geometry and spray geometry -- but those generalizations are largely inaccessible, and as a result there remain few applications within robotics. This paper presents a re-derivation of spray and Finsler geometries we found critical for the development of our recent work on a powerful behavioral design tool we call geometric fabrics. These derivations build from basic tools in advanced calculus and the calculus of variations making them more accessible to a robotics audience than standard presentations. We focus on the pragmatic and calculable results, avoiding the use of tensor notation to appeal to a broader audience, emphasizing geometric path consistency over ideas around connections and curvature. We hope that these derivations will contribute to an increased understanding of generalized nonlinear, and even classical Riemannian, geometry within the robotics community and inspire future research into new applications.
abstract_zh: 机器人研究发现了黎曼几何的许多重要应用。尽管如此，这个概念对许多机器人专家来说仍然具有挑战性，因为背景材料非常复杂并且非常陌生。除了黎曼几何之外，数学文献中还有许多自然的概括——例如芬斯勒几何和喷雾几何——但这些概括在很大程度上是难以理解的，因此在机器人领域的应用仍然很少。本文介绍了喷雾和芬斯勒几何形状的重新推导，我们发现这对于我们最近开发强大的行为设计工具（我们称为几何织物）的工作至关重要。这些推导基于高级微积分和变分演算的基本工具，使机器人观众比标准演示更容易理解它们。我们专注于实用和可计算的结果，避免使用张量符号来吸引更广泛的受众，强调几何路径的一致性而不是有关连接和曲率的想法。我们希望这些推导将有助于增进对机器人界内广义非线性甚至经典黎曼几何的理解，并激发未来对新应用的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文重新推导了喷射和芬斯勒几何，以更易理解的方式为机器人学中的几何织物工具提供理论支持。
AI.motivation: 黎曼几何在机器人学中应用广泛但难以理解，更高级的几何理论如芬斯勒几何因表述复杂而缺乏应用。
AI.method: 基于高等微积分和变分法重新推导几何理论，避免使用张量符号，强调几何路径一致性。
AI.result: 提供了更易被机器人学家接受的几何理论框架，促进几何织物工具的开发与应用。
AI.conclusion: 期望提升机器人社区对广义非线性几何的理解，并推动其在机器人学中的新应用研究。

authors_text: Hochul Hwang,Cheongjae Jang,Geonwoo Park,Junghyun Cho,Ig-Jae Kim
title: ElderSim: A Synthetic Data Generation Platform for Human Action Recognition in Eldercare Applications
title_zh: ElderSim：用于老年护理应用中人类行为识别的综合数据生成平台
abstract: To train deep learning models for vision-based action recognition of elders' daily activities, we need large-scale activity datasets acquired under various daily living environments and conditions. However, most public datasets used in human action recognition either differ from or have limited coverage of elders' activities in many aspects, making it challenging to recognize elders' daily activities well by only utilizing existing datasets. Recently, such limitations of available datasets have actively been compensated by generating synthetic data from realistic simulation environments and using those data to train deep learning models. In this paper, based on these ideas we develop ElderSim, an action simulation platform that can generate synthetic data on elders' daily activities. For 55 kinds of frequent daily activities of the elders, ElderSim generates realistic motions of synthetic characters with various adjustable data-generating options, and provides different output modalities including RGB videos, two- and three-dimensional skeleton trajectories. We then generate KIST SynADL, a large-scale synthetic dataset of elders' activities of daily living, from ElderSim and use the data in addition to real datasets to train three state-of the-art human action recognition models. From the experiments following several newly proposed scenarios that assume different real and synthetic dataset configurations for training, we observe a noticeable performance improvement by augmenting our synthetic data. We also offer guidance with insights for the effective utilization of synthetic data to help recognize elders' daily activities.

However, most public datasets used in human action recognition either differ from or have limited coverage of elders' activities in many aspects, making it challenging to recognize elders' daily activities well by only utilizing existing datasets. In this paper, based on these ideas we develop ElderSim, an action simulation platform that can generate synthetic data on elders' daily activities. For 55 kinds of frequent daily activities of the elders, ElderSim generates realistic motions of synthetic characters with various adjustable data-generating options, and provides different output modalities including RGB videos, two- and three-dimensional skeleton trajectories. We then generate KIST SynADL, a large-scale synthetic dataset of elders' activities of daily living, from ElderSim and use the data in addition to real datasets to train three state-of the-art human action recognition models. From the experiments following several newly proposed scenarios that assume different real and synthetic dataset configurations for training, we observe a noticeable performance improvement by augmenting our synthetic data. We also offer guidance with insights for the effective utilization of synthetic data to help recognize elders' daily activities.
abstract_zh: 为了训练深度学习模型对老年人的日常活动进行基于视觉的动作识别，我们需要在各种日常生活环境和条件下获取的大规模活动数据集。然而，大多数用于人体动作识别的公共数据集在许多方面与老年人的活动不同或覆盖范围有限，这使得仅利用现有数据集很难很好地识别老年人的日常活动。最近，通过从现实模拟环境生成合成数据并使用这些数据训练深度学习模型，可用数据集的这种局限性得到了积极的补偿。在本文中，基于这些想法，我们开发了ElderSim，一个动作模拟平台，可以生成老年人日常活动的综合数据。针对长者日常频繁进行的 55 种活动，ElderSim 通过各种可调整的数据生成选项生成合成角色的逼真动作，并提供不同的输出模式，包括 RGB 视频、二维和三维骨骼轨迹。然后，我们从 ElderSim 生成 KIST SynADL，这是一个老年人日常生活活动的大规模综合数据集，并使用这些数据和真实数据集来训练三个最先进的人类动作识别模型。从以下几个新提出的场景（假设不同的真实和合成数据集配置进行训练）的实验中，我们观察到通过增强合成数据可以显着提高性能。我们还提供有效利用合成数据的见解指导，以帮助识别老年人的日常活动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ElderSim平台，用于生成老年人日常活动的合成数据，以提升基于视觉的动作识别模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集在覆盖老年人日常活动类型和场景方面存在局限，难以有效训练动作识别模型。
AI.method: 开发ElderSim模拟平台生成55种日常活动的合成数据，支持RGB视频、2D/3D骨骼轨迹等多种输出形式，并构建KIST SynADL数据集与真实数据结合训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，合成数据增强后模型性能显著提升，不同训练场景配置下均验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效补充真实数据不足，为老年人日常活动识别提供新方法及数据利用指导。
